Convicted felon and sex offender Donald Trump wants to illegally deport “bad people” who are United States citizens.
To Trump, bad people are people he doesn’t like. Remember when he said he hates Democrats?
Trump has threatened to strip long time critic and comedian Rosie O’Donnell of her citizenship.
He has suggested he would deport Zohran Mamdani, the Democratic candidate for New York mayor.
He is trying to end birthright citizenship.
**Our dictator wannabe wants to deport everyone who refuses to bend their knee in fealty to Trump.**

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: this is a different type of email than I usually send…
body:
|
#
Friend, this is a different type of email than I usually send. I’m not asking for a donation. Instead, I’m asking you to personally endorse my re-election campaign for Congress.**Now that we officially have our first opponent, I need to know you’re on our team. ** **[We want to add 500 grassroots names to our list of endorsers today. **But if Stephen Colbert moves to MSNBC,** he can continue his reporting and EXPOSE Trump’s dangerous lies — _this would INFURIATE TRUMP!_

Things are tough right now, Peter. Trust me, I get it. Prices are still too high. Republicans are coming for our health care and Social Security to deliver a massive tax break to billionaires. People are being kidnapped off our streets. That’s why I wish I didn’t have to ask for money in emails like these. It’s one of my least favorite parts of the job. But if I’m being honest, it’s also a necessary part of the job. Elections typically come down to who has the most money to spend on running ads, training volunteers, and reaching voters — and since billionaires send more and more money to GOP candidates who will give them tax cuts and provide backing for Trump’s authoritarian agenda, it’s important to build a strong grassroots base that can stand up against them. Even just $1 will help me fight against Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans in Congress, defend working families from their billionaire-first agenda, stand up to the Trump administration’s lawlessness, and continue to listen and show up for Vermonters. **[So if you can, Peter — and only if you can — please pitch in $1 today. Elections typically come down to who has the most money to spend on running ads, training volunteers, and reaching voters — and since billionaires send more and more money to GOP candidates who will give them tax cuts and provide backing for Trump’s authoritarian agenda, it’s important to build a strong grassroots base that can stand up against them. Even just $1 will help me fight against Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans in Congress, defend working families from their billionaire-first agenda, stand up to the Trump administration’s lawlessness, and continue to listen and show up for Vermonters. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Becca mailto:beccabalintvt@beccabalint.com | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont P.O. Box 291 Burlington, VT 05402

name: Eliza Walton
subject: Enter OLCV’s 2025 Environmental Photo Contest!
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/2B44466345777536584973617A43452B6D75575A564550592B493559386465584F5637353668682F4A7953546F6F422F4C444842335674703769487356784C4D/editor_images/72225%202025%20Photo%20Contest%20-%20email%20header.png]
Photo from OLCV's 2023 Photo Contest, by Victoria Hawkins
Dear Peter,
It’s that time again... OLCV’s Environmental Photo Contest is here! We’re already working on our Environmental Scorecard for the Oregon Legislature and we need your help. Enter this year’s photo contest for a chance to have your photo included — you might even end up on the cover!
Our Environmental Scorecard is our number one tool for holding our elected leaders accountable and educating Oregonians on how their legislators voted on the environment and climate this session. This is where we need your help: We want your photos to feature in the Scorecard and remind us all why we’re doing this important work.
One of our favorite parts of the Scorecard is all of the photos we get to see from you! We want to see your photos that relate to any or all of these three categories:
1. You, your family, friends and pets on our public lands (we love photos with people in them!)
2. Wildlife
3. Climate
Here are some photos from our last photo contest!
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/2B44466345777536584973617A43452B6D75575A564550592B493559386465584F5637353668682F4A7953546F6F422F4C444842335674703769487356784C4D/editor_images/2025%20Photo%20Contest%20-%20photos.png]
Be a part of this tradition by submitting your photos by September 1st. How to enter:
* Send up to 3 photos in an email to respond@olcv.org [respond@olcv.org] with ‘Photo Contest’ in the subject line
* Include your name, where the photo was taken, and a short description of why it’s meaningful to you
Our favorites will be featured in OLCV’s 2025 Environmental Scorecard, and one lucky winner will have their photo on the cover! We’ll also share all the photos on Facebook after the Scorecard is released in the fall, so find and tag yours.
We’re looking forward to seeing your photos!
Sincerely,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Eliza.png]
Eliza Walton (she/they)
OLCV Coalition Director
https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv [https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv] https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org [https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org] https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F [https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F] https://x.com/OLCV [https://x.com/OLCV]

Oregon League of Conservation Voters
1110 SE Alder Suite 220
Portland, OR 97214
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/ReVeUSnqh0mAa9rjhFdl7A2?unsubscribedata=bxldI8Q6YE4vQjce9yL9rRzt8ukjM2ysm4RRbGWq2Eb%2By2hgG4Fkqd54r2vsxR7gOhCgLFEle9YOnLvIx1w42d8MNzFsP%2FfI4mnnCNMFvH5FhQW8fuQ%2B2XzEn35PD1Hf%2F3Aayj%2FZdt%2FeD1BgMM7Pfzxu9Q8d6pgTSmUdNr5ScKLUMjSBJehzE5WsXZLX4E33T7NKIEILNDq3hiMhFZsMcAmReb2QJhcOf72CS1sOULpyhiN3iduiu4%2FuCEJJGBYwao%2BevlYE6gNt2ooDqiHZ1LpfJJdqCghRDK43iCkr9lxLcIYu5XZ1VbJQ3SRTVCCgFy8Fbj0Z1%2FMR7tzwownoD30SlqODMl5cNftNPwXuaHf7CPvOBbXMP%2B%2FWp6TSSe2gxckUTy%2Bd6ax8cPwAUXfSZpc9tKtQ2DITJkdNPlxKjEQ%3D .

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
What’s happening in Texas needs all of our attention. Let’s talk about how we’re fighting back.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111950919/558957629/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYwNzljMjgwLTYwNjctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7prhhsk6bbeyBycT29gBYio0qtv7EQbRcsDo9nDqEa0=&emci=7c31164f-4767-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6079c280-6067-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8431045)
---

Hey Peter, A special legislative session began in Texas yesterday, and on the agenda is a congressional map redraw, thanks to President Trump’s demand to deliver “five seats” for Republicans. **What’s happening in Texas is an existential threat to democracy — a brazen attempt to steal the midterm elections — and it requires all of our attention.** That’s why tomorrow, A.G. Eric Holder will be joining House Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries, Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi, Congressman Greg Casar (TX-35), and Texas House Democratic Caucus Chair, Representative Gene Wu, for an emergency strategy call to discuss what they’re trying to do in Texas and how we’re fighting back. Here are the details: **WHAT:** Stop The Texas Takeover: A Live Event With AG Eric Holder and Special Guests
**WHEN:** Wednesday, July 23, at 7:00 p.m. EST
**WHERE:** Register on Mobilize | [RSVP](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111950920/558957630/421868197?utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=eng&utm_content=20250722-NDRC-Tier1-TxLivestream_&utm_campaign=TxLivestream&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYwNzljMjgwLTYwNjctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7prhhsk6bbeyBycT29gBYio0qtv7EQbRcsDo9nDqEa0=&emci=7c31164f-4767-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6079c280-6067-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8431045)
---
It’s no secret: Republicans know their policies are deeply unpopular and threaten their hold on power in the midterms. So they’ve resorted to using every tactic they’ve got to try to cheat instead.
**We’re fighting back to prevent another illegitimate power grab by Trump loyalists in Texas – but this doesn’t just affect Texas. This redraw could have national implications ahead of the 2026 midterms.** That’s why it’s so important that we are all aligned on our strategy, understand what’s at stake, and how to move forward knowing the potential impact this could have on our upcoming elections.
If we work together, we can fight to make sure that Texas maps are fair and its elections reflect the will of the people. **But we need to be prepared so that our grassroots movement has the information and tools needed to build a strong opposition to what we’re up against. **
[**Will you join the NDRC in collaboration with All On The Line tomorrow at 7:00 p.m. EST for this special livestream event on Zoom?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111950921/558957631/-1794448058?utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=eng&utm_content=20250722-NDRC-Tier1-TxLivestream_&utm_campaign=TxLivestream&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYwNzljMjgwLTYwNjctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7prhhsk6bbeyBycT29gBYio0qtv7EQbRcsDo9nDqEa0=&emci=7c31164f-4767-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6079c280-6067-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8431045)
Yes, I’ll be there. [**Sign me up!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111950922/558957632/-1794448058?utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=eng&utm_content=20250722-NDRC-Tier1-TxLivestream_&utm_campaign=TxLivestream&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYwNzljMjgwLTYwNjctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7prhhsk6bbeyBycT29gBYio0qtv7EQbRcsDo9nDqEa0=&emci=7c31164f-4767-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6079c280-6067-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8431045)
I can’t make it. But I’ll [**rush a donation to help power this critical work.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111950923/558957633/-246980373?refcode=eng_ndrc_tier1_email_TxLivestream_email_20250722-NDRC-Tier1-TxLivestream_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=eng&utm_content=20250722-NDRC-Tier1-TxLivestream_&utm_campaign=TxLivestream&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYwNzljMjgwLTYwNjctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7prhhsk6bbeyBycT29gBYio0qtv7EQbRcsDo9nDqEa0=)

Thank you, and we hope to see you tomorrow evening.
NDRC

clean_body: What’s happening in Texas needs all of our attention. Let’s talk about how we’re fighting back. | Hey Peter, A special legislative session began in Texas yesterday, and on the agenda is a congressional map redraw, thanks to President Trump’s demand to deliver “five seats” for Republicans. What’s happening in Texas is an existential threat to democracy — a brazen attempt to steal the midterm elections — and it requires all of our attention. That’s why tomorrow, A.G. Eric Holder will be joining House Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries, Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi, Congressman Greg Casar (TX-35), and Texas House Democratic Caucus Chair, Representative Gene Wu, for an emergency strategy call to discuss what they’re trying to do in Texas and how we’re fighting back. Here are the details: WHAT: Stop The Texas Takeover: A Live Event With AG Eric Holder and Special Guests WHEN: Wednesday, July 23, at 7:00 p.m. EST WHERE: Register on Mobilize | It’s no secret: Republicans know their policies are deeply unpopular and threaten their hold on power in the midterms. So they’ve resorted to using every tactic they’ve got to try to cheat instead. We’re fighting back to prevent another illegitimate power grab by Trump loyalists in Texas – but this doesn’t just affect Texas. This redraw could have national implications ahead of the 2026 midterms. That’s why it’s so important that we are all aligned on our strategy, understand what’s at stake, and how to move forward knowing the potential impact this could have on our upcoming elections. If we work together, we can fight to make sure that Texas maps are fair and its elections reflect the will of the people. But we need to be prepared so that our grassroots movement has the information and tools needed to build a strong opposition to what we’re up against. Yes, I’ll be there. I can’t make it. But I’ll = Thank you, and we hope to see you tomorrow evening. NDRC No candidates appearing at this event are asking for any funds or donations. = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Powered by People
subject: We’re on a downward trend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

We’ve been looking closely at our numbers this month, and here’s where
things stand: We’re starting to head on a downward trend.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250722-1.A2Cia-&refcode=ema20250722-240232&t=1002&akid=240232%2E444211%2E-1LUzv ]Screenshot of fundraising

That’s a problem because Powered by People was built to do politics
differently.

That means getting out from behind screens and office doors and into real
communities. It means hitting the road, hosting town halls, listening to
all, and meeting people where they’re at—not where it’s easy or
convenient.

But that kind of organizing takes time, energy, and real resources.
Travel, venue rentals, materials, and more—it all adds up. And because
we’re powered entirely by grassroots support, when donations slow down, so
does our ability to show up.

If we’re going to keep doing the work that actually builds trust, empowers
communities, and turns out voters, we need to close the gap—now.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250722-1.A2Cia-&refcode=ema20250722-240232&t=1003&akid=240232%2E444211%2E-1LUzv ]Will you contribute $3 today to help power this work?
Every dollar drives the kind of engagement needed in communities and with
voters to win.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250722-1.A2Cia-&refcode=ema20250722-240232&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=240232%2E444211%2E-1LUzv ]DONATE $3

With gratitude,

Powered by People

name: Powered by People
subject: We’ve seen this playbook before
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

For decades, Trump moved in the same circles, flew on the same planes, and
crossed paths with Jeffrey Epstein.

He even said in 2002, “I’ve known Jeff for 15 years. Terrific guy. He’s a
lot of fun to be with.”^1

Now, with new records and files coming to light, he’s doing what he always
does—trying to rewrite history and bury the truth. That’s not
transparency. That’s control.

But we’ve seen this playbook before. This isn’t about protecting his name.
It’s about distracting the public, intimidating the press, and dodging
accountability. It’s about what Trump does with power, including trying to
weaponize the courts to avoid facing consequences.

That’s why we’re organizing.

Powered by People is out in communities, hosting town halls, and reaching
voters every day—because the only way to defeat authoritarianism is by
empowering people.

We’re meeting folks where they are, listening to what matters, and helping
them use their voice where it counts. But we can’t do it without you.

This movement runs on the strength of grassroots supporters—people like
you who know democracy isn’t a given. It’s something we build together.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250722-2.n3QgGN&refcode=ema20250722-240233&t=1002&akid=240233%2E444211%2EvpwjY_ ]Can you chip in $3 today to help us keep organizing,
keep showing up, and keep rooting out authoritarianism from our democracy?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250722-2.n3QgGN&refcode=ema20250722-240233&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=240233%2E444211%2EvpwjY_ ]DONATE $3

We’re building something stronger than Trump’s scare tactics. We’re
building a movement that never backs down.

Let’s get to work,

Powered by People

1 - [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/65368?t=1022&akid=240233%2E444211%2EvpwjY_ ]The Guardian

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=240233%2E444211%2EvpwjY_

name: ICYMI News
subject: Victor Davis Hanson: Ten Paradoxes of Our Age
body:
Tech is moving fast. Don't get left behind. Get your early copy of the Stanford Emerging Tech Review now.

# The Stanford Emerging Tech Review 2025
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zufgkfk6gqf973vmr1tpopiavju4bd3mh5nftkvo_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9hm2o71c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Have you noticed how our world seems full of contradictions lately?
Prosperity is rising. Yet freedom, in many places, is retreating.

Global diplomacy expands. But so do threats.

Cultural traditions persist. Still, they're strained by mass migration and ideological division.
---
|
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2ucds7fecp49b93amlch2is1o19a2romlles6h8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9hm2o71c9h2bs)
---
| | These aren't just abstract concepts--they're reshaping the world we live in right now.

And if we don't understand them, we risk misunderstanding the forces at work and misjudging our response.

That's why the Hoover Institution is sharing a **powerful new analysis from Senior Fellow Victor Davis Hanson:_Ten Paradoxes of Our Age_.**

In it, he outlines ten defining paradoxes of our time, including:
* Why economic growth doesn't always bring political freedom
* How diplomacy can coexist with rising global insecurity
* What happens when cultural pressures outpace integration

Whether you're concerned about America's future role in the world or seeking clarity amid global confusion, this piece offers a timely perspective.

These paradoxes are reshaping our world, and understanding them is crucial.

"If we do not understand the paradoxes of our age, we will continue to be confused by the outcomes." -- Victor Davis Hanson

**Download your free copy of '_Ten Paradoxes of Our Age_ ' now and gain the insights you need to navigate our complex world.**

Access your free copy today: [https://resources.hoover.org/ten-paradoxes-of-our-age](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl6eaeoc7vuggkq8vh3t0ciqc6oqhrv758mm40f8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9hm2o71c9h2bs)Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

[Make a Gift to Hoover](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn02n1217rta3q91leikmjg9keu77r2p3cufue38_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9hm2o71c9h2bs)
With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world.

Hoover Institution, 434 Galvez Mall, Stanford University, Stanford, CA 94305 USA

subject: The cure for the radical left’s lunacy

body:
For the American left, if you burn down whole city blocks and riot, you'll probably get a financial settlement.

|

| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7jv26357bvlnjgu2u9km8bg223c9lgsb820ruqo_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9hm1ob6cth2bs)
Friend,

For the American left, if you burn down whole city blocks and riot, you'll probably get a financial settlement.

If you invade the country, NGOs will pay your legal bills as you enjoy free housing and debit cards filled with taxpayer cash.

If you wave the Mexican flag while assaulting law enforcement, the news will call it a _"potent sign of protest."_

If you burn the American flag, they'll call it free speech.

But if you dare tear down a Pride flag, you face years in prison.

This demonstrates the lunacy of the radical left.

It’s also what’s at stake if we rest on our laurels instead of taking action to win in 2026, 2028, and beyond...

**Turning Point PAC has a plan to hold the line!**

We have identified 3 battleground states where we can have the most impact: Arizona, Nevada, and New Hampshire.

By establishing field offices and ramping up field operations in those states, [you and I can build a RED WALL](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z89unr4slssc020ack23q0401o2s6crmb8v8c5h0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9hm1ob6cth2bs) to protect our America First victories.

To do so, we’ll need to raise $75,000 before the end of the month to fund this mission.

I know this is no small ask, but this is no small operation.

**Winning in Arizona, Nevada, and New Hampshire is critical to the enduring success of President Trump’s America First agenda.**

These states have a number of important factors that make them the perfect targets for our grassroots ground game.
1. They are considered contested states that are important to both parties.
2. These states are growing.
3. **Republicans outnumber Democrats.**

Plus, if we win these states, we don’t have to worry about winning in other states like Michigan, Pennsylvania, or Wisconsin.

That’s the truth.

_**Only three states stand between us and a series of America First victories in 2026, 2028, and beyond.**_

Please help us [finish what we started](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi1ud71fllfi03r40ks7o5e6imh48noh5vhj960o_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9hm1ob6cth2bs) and secure an America First future by donating today.

For America,

Charlie Kirk
Turning Point PAC

Everything President Trump has achieved... _undone_.
Our America First movement... _finished_.
Our freedom... _surrendered_.
The future of America... _**in peril!**_

We CANNOT let that happen.

name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: Socialism in America
body:
You have been selected to represent citizens in your state in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on Socialism.

This sponsored message from Great Amercian Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zvj9qis92fj6j81u0gf5pq8br86cd8pfti8os270_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9hm9pj4c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend of Liberty,

**You have been selected to represent citizens in your state in Hillsdale College's National Survey on Socialism. You can complete your survey at the link below: **

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/socialism-survey**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zkoqvskv03k5an8ojd6nvfmpk9sms3musos6tqpo_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9hm9pj4c5h2bs)

With your response, you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of opinion that can help us more clearly understand real Americans' views--views that will interest policymakers and opinion leaders.

A recent poll showed that over half of Generation Z is likely to vote for candidates with socialist positions. We have seen some of this in recent elections.

Recently, voters in America's largest city nominated a self-avowed socialist to be mayor. Some of his proposals include...
* Banning ICE agents from city limits

* Establishing city-owned grocery stores

* Instituting a $30-an-hour minimum wage

* Replacing the police with social workers

**In short, this candidate will bring _real, unapologetic socialism_ to America.**

**Why did this happen? **

For one thing, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried.

For another, too many are no longer being taught about America's great heritage of liberty and the importance of the Constitution to freedom.

This is because of the "progressive" Left's increasing success in hijacking American education at both the K-12 and college levels. **So, it 's no surprise that those who support socialist candidates tend to be college-educated!**

In the face of these efforts to indoctrinate the young and undermine informed patriotism, **Hillsdale 's educational outreach is needed now more than ever.**

By responding to **Hillsdale College 's National Survey on Socialism**, your honest opinions will help us understand the rise of socialism and form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.

We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country--Americans like you, who still revere our founding principles of liberty, as set forth in the Declaration of Independence, and which form the foundation of our Constitution.

If you agree, please represent your state and take **Hillsdale College 's National Survey on Socialism** today.

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/socialism-survey**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z53sjn8632d4nhvq74v5k2f9gevcat7o26bcpikg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9hm9pj4c5h2bs)

In the face of socialism's recent success, we must remember: **it is never too late to preserve and defend liberty through education.**

You can easily make your gift after completing the **National Survey on Socialism**, which you can access at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/socialism-survey**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7imhm9vh3d34lmnmp7lv22n59ih5oobpga6k4fg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9hm9pj4c5h2bs)

Warm regards,
Labin Duke, Th.M.
Associate Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pop Acta Media | Updates for Great Americans
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z1if8aqrpdipgolatranuio62p4oa8r4asmkicm8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjklo72d1hekr76dtiesp7ad1hegqracjkmoq37djjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8ob7cpg6eo3246h22sh2s8i6epb6c9hm9pj4c5h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z9f9mkksuqdbpubnn5d84og2n80st6bp7ngp2kqg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9hm9pj4c5h2bs)_

body:
Take our quick poll on President Trump’s performance.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Peter,
Go to China and try to buy land.
__See how that works out for you.__
Now, try buying land near their military bases.
**__You’d vanish without a trace.__**
But here in America?
**__China continues to buy land dangerously close to U.S. military facilities.__**
Whoever allowed this has betrayed our country.
It’s time to **SEIZE that land** and shut this down, permanently.
**[Do YOU agree?](https://trk.emails.troydowning._zvwITeLGiEq0iTGAA)**[ VOTE NOW

Stand for America. Act now.
**— Team Downing HQ**|

body:
President Trump has announced that the [U.S. will withdraw from UNESCO](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2unDAQhZ_GdF6Z4cekcJGG7qZNiQY8LBMZ28Ljvdq3j9g8QroZHenT-c7vr-ULOXB8_sKTnOxpifRdAonQtdQSCF9UaqSypQ0jlfrEa0sLGBi0sRq6xSOH99I33u1EQF1DrrVDB-MAMDSHs5OZzN6iX7GltSU_rJ2dwFM7Yk-tadjdNGOha42xpnv0PeKEiBuN9oexq-oNeZZ0Pf4kjnLQHt7pRddjS2cT3CGSi-p-KpgVzPGdU5E7UjDfYAWzsfcNCuZa9O2nYJarnllL0rmGoGvRqYpOu_7nqm--9sQ6p8AbU9H5SjpjoCIcGePn3w6OqIWDKJiby_n8zSFwGa3qzfNEDp-O8l_Dvhz8DQAA__9-7Y4R), citing concerns over the organization's diversity and inclusion policies, treatment of Israel, and growing Chinese influence.

# Wednesday, July 23, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1973, President Richard Nixon [refused to turn over secret Oval Office recordings](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHOozAQBOCnMR3IWds4FC6uocu1V6KNWcAnYyN7A8rb_0pe4a-_0Wg0_x7TA0MMaf2LOzle8pToqpGYqUyvGglPqq9E1WePieprxeLzBBJMK20LapoxxPekm9ktRECqIXezRkFvAEyzud6YAeCuyWOv58HP_eC9vD-lNE-zaNkE92mTFtRNSitVpzXiHRE99XaQ9im0pDlwLt3_HBJvtMR3Pql0Pu9NdBvzUYX6I2AUMF7X1V1Yt5BWzunIlT-xDxxtLaeAMSGHnDAKGGNOK1P5MjKVFZkEjFg4-EhVwCgtaKvaW7fx3hQ3H1eIMdTeCi3XHUP8juBfPXc6-AkAAP__hZCDRA) to the Senate Watergate Committee, invoking executive privilege--a move that triggered a constitutional showdown and set the stage for his eventual resignation. Have you ever wondered how big _The Flyover_ is? Many readers have written us asking about similar statistics. Well, you might be surprised to know that _The Flyover_ family of newsletters is among the largest newsletters in the world. With a family of 2.7 million readers across 11 state and national publications, our growth over the last 2.5 years has soared like a rocket ship. ## US Olympics Ban Transgender Athletes
Transgender athletes born as biological men [will no longer be eligible to compete](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMGK5CAURb_G7Az6NDG1cDEwZFezGYZZhhfzkrIxGtRUkb9vquk_6N2FC5d7zv_7dEcffNz-4E62rmmK9CqBaqU8nSUQPqmckYpLDiOVc8Ps0gQCOi4MBzUt6MM16WaxKxGQashK0ynoO4CueVhc1-GmpXGz7AfToUMxoJZCSoUaSDfevteEASWFMEK1WiMOiOioNzdhZqYFLb6m3H4kH-uD1nClJ-XWpb0J9lHrUZj6xWBkMOLs3gTtlt41g_HfXwbjWXgK1354xw_M-B3TunrnMRQ-Y-Y1YywbxYUyf6WdIndpP6j6uDEYS035Ymr0C1O_JaibGZQWTbbL8fIh-NIbpsW2ow9fv-qPZD4tfAYAAP__ZrGJ1w) for the United States in the Olympic or Paralympic Games in women's categories, U.S. Olympic officials announced Tuesday. The officials cited President Trump's executive order, titled "Keeping Men Out of Women's Sports," which mandates immediate enforcement against athletic associations that "deny women single-sex sports and single-sex locker rooms." _" As a federally chartered organization, we have an obligation to comply with federal expectations,"_ USOPC CEO Sarah Hirshland and President Gene Sykes wrote in a letter. The global International Olympic Committee has allowed individual sports federations to set their own rules at the Olympics, and [stricter rules on transgender athletes](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLEOpCAURb8GOww-FLSgmMZik9l2S_PEp7JBmABq5u837n7Cdje5ycm959d7eqPzLmw_8SBT1jgFurOnUihNZ_aEF-UzULbRYqB8bphsnEBAx4XmIKcFnf9ObbWYlQhIVmQa3UlQHUBX7aazUq2d6OdFKdF0okc59EOjAWmYbasqZx6a0CAbIbSQddsi9ohoSelB6Jm1ghZXYqp_RxfKTqv_xotSbeNRebOX8slMvhiMDMb7vusjh6djMFLgZ2YwPqcYjLHslBiMZ-bRf4-Pszyuq7MOfeYzBl4ShrxRWCjxOx4U-Jri8S9mTheF8nAw8der-aGaPFfJLJ_bee-y0qwV24HO_11W_kvnZeBPAAAA__9NaIsR) -- barring anyone who went through male puberty from competing in women's events--have been passed by swimming, cycling, and track and field federations.
## Trump to Withdraw U.S. from UNESCO
President Trump has announced that the [U.S. will withdraw from UNESCO](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2unDAQhZ_GdF6Z4cekcJGG7qZNiQY8LBMZ28Ljvdq3j9g8QroZHenT-c7vr-ULOXB8_sKTnOxpifRdAonQtdQSCF9UaqSypQ0jlfrEa0sLGBi0sRq6xSOH99I33u1EQF1DrrVDB-MAMDSHs5OZzN6iX7GltSU_rJ2dwFM7Yk-tadjdNGOha42xpnv0PeKEiBuN9oexq-oNeZZ0Pf4kjnLQHt7pRddjS2cT3CGSi-p-KpgVzPGdU5E7UjDfYAWzsfcNCuZa9O2nYJarnllL0rmGoGvRqYpOu_7nqm--9sQ6p8AbU9H5SjpjoCIcGePn3w6OqIWDKJiby_n8zSFwGa3qzfNEDp-O8l_Dvhz8DQAA__9-7Y4R), citing concerns over the organization's diversity and inclusion policies, treatment of Israel, and growing Chinese influence. A White House review found that certain UNESCO initiatives, such as designating Jewish heritage sites as Palestinian and promoting social justice toolkits, conflicted with U.S. policy goals. Officials emphasized that the decision reflects a commitment to ensuring that U.S. involvement in international bodies aligns with national interests. This is the [second U.S. withdrawal](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpDAQRL8GMo9MG-MhcHDJZHPphaixm6FPxka2GTR_v2L3EzYslVR6r_49pydy4Pj6ixvZuqQp0lkC1Up5OkogfFM5IhWXHEYqxwuzSxNI0EIaAWryyOEz9a23CxGQasl2RisYNIBuV2s0gFLkPQ735T7r2RhN3Ywa1ADj7Fq215o0oDopjVS3vke8I6KjwYzSzE0vyXNN-fY_cawrLeGT3pRvLm1tsGute2nUnwYeDTxwvwSu6gq5sgvUwONHQdR8bLs4ua4-4yl2zFzEEbmSFxErp1gEl4wURAcj9ssyO9IDUIfYjxciydl7rVG32fr95BC4DKbp5WtDDt9I9Vc_vi18BQAA___3togm) from UNESCO under Trump, following a similar move in his first administration in 2017.
## Ozzy Osbourne Dies at 76
Ozzy Osbourne, the heavy metal icon and reality TV star, [has died at age 76](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0MGuniAUBOCnwR0GDyB1waJpY1d_t12aIxyVBuUG0Bv_p2_sK9z1l0xm5s9remGI4Vh_4062Lmk66LNEqpXydJZIeFE5DyouOTyonCtmlyYQoLkwHOTkMcR7Uo23CxGQbMh2RkvoNYBuNisVeFwUKDSz8IPraHGL9lrrXhg5mCbYJ00YkJ0QRshWKcRviOioN4MwM1OCfKgpt39TOOpGS7zTRbl1aW-i3Wr9KEx-ZzAyGHF2z4J2TQ8zGH-9HvlxxnpmYjCm9_vmqczpzAfxjfC6-U4VI9_PEhyPtNLhuSf03PQMxlJTvpkcg2fyp4F-gK7TTbb-4zPEGEpvmBLrjiH-L1S_9OJl4V8AAAD__xeChhM), his family said Tuesday. Known for fronting the Black Sabbath rock band before launching a successful solo career, Osbourne was a controversial and erratic personality. He passed away surrounded by family just 17 days after performing his final show in Birmingham. [Diagnosed with Parkinson's](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFyhCAURb8GO3bggbIWFGnsNm1K5wnPlQTFEXTH_fqM-YXU586Ze-_Xo39giGF5fuJMtoypX-iVI5VCW7_nSHhQ3hfKLjlcKO9P3FzqQUDNheGgeo8hnr2uvB2JgFRFVppaQVMD1NVkJZhhHFsBXtWayKNs2waoHaWu4e7qKtjLJgwoKYQR6qY14h0RHTWmFWZgWpAPJW237xSWMtEYz3TQdnNprqKdSlkzUx8MOgbdgVugcl6MQXeZGXTznoNj0KUhlP0KZL5SWiPxa-0F3u-TpzykfVuIe0LPh4juh2ccBiwTl6Aa3RgpBYOu2qxfXyHGkBvDtHjOGOJfm_KvCw8LvwEAAP__WliFCg) in 2019 and battling ongoing health issues, Osbourne left his mark on music with hits like _Iron Man_ and _Crazy Train_ , and later found a new audience through _The Osbournes_ family reality show. His final memoir, _Last Rites_ , is set for release in October.

Save up to 80% on your favorite brands when you sign up with today's sponsor, | US Olympics Ban Transgender Athletes Transgender athletes born as biological men for the United States in the Olympic or Paralympic Games in women's categories, U.S. Olympic officials announced Tuesday. The officials cited President Trump's executive order, titled "Keeping Men Out of Women's Sports," which mandates immediate enforcement against athletic associations that "deny women single-sex sports and single-sex locker rooms." " As a federally chartered organization, we have an obligation to comply with federal expectations," USOPC CEO Sarah Hirshland and President Gene Sykes wrote in a letter. The global International Olympic Committee has allowed individual sports federations to set their own rules at the Olympics, and -- barring anyone who went through male puberty from competing in women's events--have been passed by swimming, cycling, and track and field federations. Trump to Withdraw U.S. from UNESCO President Trump has announced that the , citing concerns over the organization's diversity and inclusion policies, treatment of Israel, and growing Chinese influence. A White House review found that certain UNESCO initiatives, such as designating Jewish heritage sites as Palestinian and promoting social justice toolkits, conflicted with U.S. policy goals. Officials emphasized that the decision reflects a commitment to ensuring that U.S. involvement in international bodies aligns with national interests. This is the from UNESCO under Trump, following a similar move in his first administration in 2017. Ozzy Osbourne Dies at 76 Ozzy Osbourne, the heavy metal icon and reality TV star, , his family said Tuesday. Known for fronting the Black Sabbath rock band before launching a successful solo career, Osbourne was a controversial and erratic personality. He passed away surrounded by family just 17 days after performing his final show in Birmingham. in 2019 and battling ongoing health issues, Osbourne left his mark on music with hits like Iron Man and Crazy Train , and later found a new audience through The Osbournes family reality show. His final memoir, Last Rites , is set for release in October. name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Screwworm Bait, UT Football Worth $2.38B, and Indoor Skiing
body:
State and federal authorities previously announced that millions of sterile male flies would be released to combat the spread of the deadly parasitic screwworm. On Monday, Texas Agriculture Commissioner Sid Miller announced another strategy: a [synthetic bait](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u3CAQRp8Gd1gwBmwXLtK4u2lTWvwMuyh4WeHxcvftI6-UvECq0eiTjnTOr6_ty6acHrefdseFvmPZHtiOjERYt8NXbK3U3dlEJ8VSyNmcW9lAgOZi5DBswab83lQXFifCLDtc5KgHMJNWursv2kkxhai00naSzo9hFkZJHwevhzCLLi0XTIwwSCkAVO-l0dOoDUSntDGOKYEhUak93ZHw2x4xv8sLa-_L3uXlTvQ82PCDwcpgba31v18nXiOD1VZKPiOD9fJisObibWawfkB_Lw_4tJV2fBAvkdtbTf7MdFbk_xrwmN_8CsGP681nvahgZj4FFE5bwefZK67mYeLOKMuNQ1DKqyk62dUlPFvKOR1mZErcdpvyR4D-L_trgT8BAAD__5nTlv8) that mimics the scent of open wounds.

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1885, 31 bankers formed the [Texas Bankers Association](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGO4yAUgOHT4M4WPAPOFhTbuMu2W1oP-zlGwRDBm5DcfjS5wlzg-6X__3W5Yogh3f7hSY5fe14StRqJmcpS10Kt5XJ6DPzFe87sMcaWF5Bgejn1MC4bhvhedLc5L7c_qiOnJjOCvRhtusONqwePXtnRTl4DrXaVhDuqTSkNBrvgfjA5waiUBNDDqqy5TMbC7rWx1gstaQucy8AHMb2w7vGdn1SGNZ9ddAfzo4rxr4BZwNxaG7gemFMMiYZcbgLmA9Pmc74LmClxCVQFzB-q95juVGqPteY1IIecuuK2RwsxhmonoeXtxBA_Mf7doqeD7wAAAP__Z0t9oQ) in Lampasas Springs (now Lampasas). With more than [375 member banks](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGSwiAQgOGnIZ0Z2ACJBcU16bz2yswSNsocEQdW0be_0Ve4_p-v-H9OywljitfzN-7k-Lnl5UqtJmKmstS1UGu57B4j33nLmT2m1PICEsxBjgcYloAxvRbdBedlOKqOnBrNAHYy2nQX570a0Epc1-OmAskwaQxab3pa5dEa3UX3xuQIg1ISQPersmYajYXNa2OtF1pSiJxLzxdiemLd0is_qPRr3rvkLsy3KoYvAbOAubXWfyKP118q9R0JmNHnOx_uVcDcFRduLaYUqx2FlucdY_pY_L8DDwd_AQAA__-lCnCp), it is the oldest state bankers’ association in the nation. Have you ever wondered how big _The Flyover_ is? Many readers have written us asking about similar statistics. Well, you might be surprised to know that _The Flyover_ family of newsletters is among the largest newsletters in the world. With a family of 2.7 million readers across 11 state and national publications, our growth over the last 2.5 years has soared like a rocket ship. Thanks for flying with us and being a part of something special! Speaking of soaring, the Irving-based American Athletic Conference unveiled a [new mascot](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOnTAQRb_GdH6CwYBTUKSh27Qp0WCPeZaM58mefd79-4hI-YL0R1f3nN8f-wfGFPP5Cy9a5SvwnqnVRCJU9uoKtcblOjDKpwRmOTClxjv0MOl-0TDuHmP63k3n16P3P4aO1mGZRpjtZKbuuY4jgTXeoMUeLdJsHZExJlhvh2Cxi-s91i8wDkMPYB5umCe7TDOEw0zzfCjTk4_C5SFPEvrCGtI3v6k8HF9dWp8ir6rGnwo2BVtr7eGOWl9cpN6Egs1xSnSS_iegYLstFWyITrsn5pOqzniRFtZ4UYkOs3acAxXKjnTMUth_Oqr6wupYdGUsGqt-YRHNQRc6CmYf83nDESW-ScHWldW_Wkwp1nlRpj8vjOnvcfm_3O8V_gQAAP__9xiZnQ) during a Monday rebranding announcement. Get the details in today's _Sports_ section. Today's sponsor is [Immersed](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDuO3DAMQE8jdzPQ17ILFQEW023alIJs0WMCkmVI9Hj39oEnQS6Qlu-BJN6vT_8ZMOH2_BkyOPpait_gbAmIoPo2VzjPUvMUkA5aSqEppHQWL7k0N25vUvkYMH173UU38TiKDpywRsl-MNp0q1M6THaZRw0GxmUyMIICMQxSWBEM5x26axm3UgnBpdT3WfRmsKaXy6RN309Mc4hIpd5pBYKv0Jb0XV5Q73PJXXIr0d6Y-sHkg8kHbi9odMecoTaIl3MB9Tgo-1aOOgNTH5ADJib7a5gh4pGZ-tgDxtseKm1Q24r7Xz6HvAd8bm_jHxQDv2lu_Z8Ix4YUvDJGSWsHM9iuurifmBK23jLNn9fB98P0f5lfTv4OAAD__8k4kh8), offering a discounted investment opportunity in its revolutionary virtual workspace technology.

## Senate Committee Weighs THC Ban
A Texas Senate committee met yesterday to discuss legislation that would [ban THC products](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGOgzAQRU9jOiN7wHa2cLENXbbdEo1hCJYMjswkTm6_ClfY7hdP_0nv9zpeMaa4335wI8-vJY871SMRM5XxmArVmssWMPKDl5w5YEo1j6DASOUkdOOMMb3Hvpl9UPOXbshrZzqwF9ObZvWAhi4IYNHQDK6zDrUhB8FqnMIyNdF_zpSDTmsF0LeTtubijIUl9MbaIHpFc-RcWl6J6YXHkt75SaWd8tYkvzLfD9F9CxgEDLXW9oS4xPDYqc3lJmD4OAQMyn02CBhORvI6yYN2ZJIBd4khZGa50nYXMDTFz_caU4qHdaJXtw1jOqX8v1RPD38BAAD__5hVfRg) rather than strictly regulate them, as Gov. Greg Abbott directed. Today, lawmakers from both chambers will [hear invited testimony](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1qwzAUhZ9G3mKka0uOBg2lYLqkQyl0NPqNBddRsG7i5O2LA32CroePcw7fz2k62Yz5cv60SzT0SGW6xK1iJIrrVP0at62si7OZbpRKIWcRtzIBB3ngwwG6KdiMz6lvgnE8aNFEIwbZgTrKXjaz0S5Y7S0XTvuowGo9iA60tiqltPPZ7GV8gE4IDtC3Xih5HKSC5HqplGM9jyFTWVuaI8WHrQmf5R7X1pelQTMTXSvr3hiMDEZvr5kKti-wPZc7g5GwhOIrg_GovxiM1c8x3DDuyUwLMhjfoVN_P7jmXLQf36dmNeG6ZcRc1cB6fl5sxtcq_c_V3cBvAAAA__-rS3vL) about disaster preparedness and the state’s response to the July 4 flash floods. Over the next several days, a Senate committee will [hold four virtual hearings](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuO2zAQRb-G6miQw4ekQkUadZs2pcDHyB6ENg1y1tr9-0AL-AvSDeZeHODcPx_bR6BCj-vvcMeFv_a6PfDoBZmxbT01PI7a7jEQf_JeK8dQylE3UOCkGiWYLQcq35sd8hJVnvWAix6dAT8564bbopWD6GzM87QntWfw3ttRR2_8BEbhQMsJUyMYrRWAvSTt3TQ6D3u0zvsorMJMXNuFb8j4FfpevusL2yXV-1CWG_OzC_NLwCpgPY7j8vf1iWcoYA2NKRUUsJ5eAtZnLcSUzrM_MVEosmPvVB8C1h-6fP8LXqmXwPTCd0c2zNS5UWJ6XAWs4Ge5wzwZA1q62RppQRkZU55kniDo3dt5nOehLfl5UCnU_Sisut4DlR8B_r_ZXwv8CwAA___zOJYF) on congressional redistricting, while a House committee will hold in-person hearings. On Monday, House Democrats said they "refuse to engage in any other legislative work" until flood relief and mitigation are addressed. Meanwhile, Army veteran and former federal prosecutor Eric Flores announced Monday he would challenge U.S. Rep. Vicente Gonzalez (D-McAllen) for his seat in Congress, providing Republicans an opportunity to [flip a district](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4yAQRp_G7ojw2EBuQbFNurvtlhY_QzxabCyYhOTtV9lXuPUnfTrn_Plevx1lOu6_3Y6WX6msB_aWkRnr2kLF3kvdvSN-cCqFvcu5lxUkKCGNgHmNjvJ7XcZovYxf04h2MmoGfVWLGjebZmUmM80aojT-qlBHnIxC-TUj6IQj2c-ZNDBPkwRYLmHS6mqUhuQXpbUfFomRuNQLb8j4ci3ld3livYSyj9luzGcb5l8D3Aa49d4vqbw-Fp99gNtZMjGFNsCthVJOUfF8-EzBHSK7xxE2bGIrj4bCUxR_8S1ap-MuIjWuFFjcyykc7U2kTKcACVrsFBnr3sZq49kpZ2raDIu8747yfzD-Wc6nhX8BAAD__5G8jN8) that President Trump won in 2024. Last Friday, Joe Rogan’s interview with State Rep. James Talarico (D-Round Rock) generated headlines when the podcaster [urged him to run for president](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2O6jAQQOGncboge_xHChe3Scdtt4zGzgSMnBg5swTefsW-wtZH-orzdZkumEverv9xpcCvpU4bHXshZmrTnhodR21rxMzfvNTKEUs56gQSbC99D3qaMZf3ZLo5RDkPqqOgvNXgztbY7hZUcvNi02AVGqmGiNqRjZa8BI0q-S6HDyY9aKUkgDkl5ezZWwdLNNa5KIykOXNtJ74R0wv3pbzrk9op1bUr4cb82IX-J2AUMHJe6RMEjF5Lo9QgYLxX6lu94tbfcaW9ZyzYcqoCxq6F-XHkUvLuvDDyumIuvzL_7cczwE8AAAD__5Zuc2Y). Talarico, 36, is a potential candidate for U.S. Senate.
## Kerr County Releases Property Damage Estimate
Kerr County officials estimate the July 4 flash floods damaged over 2,000 buildings and caused at least $200 million in local property damage while claiming over 100 lives. The county is [weighing a property tax increase](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D3u4yAUBPDT4A4LP5uPLSi2cZdtt7QwPGK02Fj4JSS3XyVX-Ncj_UYzf2_LzaWcjvsft6OlVyzLge3KSIR1uXzF1krdV5foQbEUWl3OrSwgQHKhOYxLcCm_l6kLdhXh19ChHbQcQRk5yW6zEmUU0Rgn5Lg6EHIcjALvBKKOoHyX7AcTGsZhEABT7wcljZYK4jpJpVY2CQyJSu1pQ8KXu2J-lyfW3pe9y3YjOi82_mYwM5hba73fajk-KYP5M4fB7Coln5HB_A9r5b48Dnrzr8ZjLiXw4HZ3x4uD0NoYKfpzO7tqw9lSzulSmk3ivruUv7X0s7OeFv4HAAD___2YfsI) to pay for lost revenue and recovery efforts. Kerr County Engineer Charlie Hastings [described the flood](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu4yAQAL8Gd1iAjfEVFNe4e9deaS32kqweNhFsQvz3p9wvvHqkGWn-fq1fQInO2x840PM75vXEVhMyY1nrVrC1XI4AxE-OOXOAlFpejTJWKifNsO5A6VrHbvdB7b90h147O5hptqPt7n53DsOkYRjBaGXDHFFH51SE4OYIsSP_kSlnBq2VMWO_6cnOzk4mhtFOUxCjwp04l57vyPiGGtOVX1j6LR9d8nfmRxXDb2EWYZbWWv_9hvMDhVnofGFlugFTPqswyzeWIrf8PPmSOUbaCJKMKeddNqjSKiUvhCK5Pk84SJilK35_NEqJ6uTEqG4HUPrf5p8de3nzLwAA__-5coJf) as "an inland tsunami" that "ripped everything up." The temporary flight restriction over the affected area was recently lifted, allowing media crews to use aircraft and drones to [survey the flood’s aftermath](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O5CAQhJ8GZ4xwD_6ZgOASZ3vphRaGZo2uPb2C3mH89iffK2zWUpfqq6o_H-uHz5Sfn7_9gU7eidcntkoogmWtoWBrXI7NZ_mWxCybJ2q8goFBm0nDfY0-07naLrrNxEffoeun4Q7jPNih213CYKIfjLUzzg8LYX6EiMkaHJNJGLvsLjMzwb3vDYC9hX4c5mkYIW12GMdNWYMxC5eb7Cj49jXRyS8st8BHR24X-arq_kvBomBprd3-Vi_XU8FytVGwEAdPCpYLpWAx03X3l9xL2HXKpYqOhZ-oe9CvHJF13blV7ZNgObzsmpOO6COdes9EOvD3U8qpEzHHi9EVF79aJsp1nJQ1n4fP9D-j_GzZl4N_AQAA__9bRo4-). Compiled in the days after the flooding, [this chart](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHOozAQBOCnMZ2RWbD5U7i4hi7XXonWeAmWDEb2Jg5vf0pe4e9Hn2bm332-Y4jhePzFnSy_1zQfVEskZspzWTLVmvLuMPCT15TYYYw1zaBASzVK6GePIV7z0HjrlL91Ddlu1D2YHz3oZrNGewINPRKYQSN2yihy5I1ewSl0TbAfTI3Qd50CGNqlM_pn1AZWN2hjnBgU-cApt7wR0xvLGq_0otwuaW-i3ZjPIvo_AiYBU6213a-CBx6cjpA-IQHTZ5WAaQsxyiU9D86XgAkzhyWSgOnryjWm5Ivc8Sxy2TBzkY-M5xaWIkGNpgd9a8_tbLL1Zw0xhmJGMajHjiF-6_DvTnxZ-B8AAP__K--Ibg) shows how quickly the Guadalupe River rose in the early morning hours of July 4. [This analysis](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkMGO3CAMQL8muXkEDoTMIYe5RKrU7bXHiARng0RgCp5l5-8r-gu9Pj9Zz_79sX5YH3z8_GUvmvn7SGukWgIxU17LnqnWlK_Nen7xkRJvNoSaVhSoQRjAYXXWh_eqejdvwt1lT7M0esBx0kr356zx0MZNYlIO78poMSkzOmfuUss7jUPv57ZMGBykFIjqtstRT0aPeGxKj-PWKUHOc8o3Ponp25YjvNMX5duerj7MJ_OzdMOjw6XDpdZ6u0pssw4XivAqjZLlk3KHC6dn4ZQ9NXymClKAj_tJBdIB2foI_MqRHPjICSw4si68YRDQ7odqQ2hmtUwZmt2KOlxshsdD_riun3_6PLtn9SH4MppOic_L-vCvlv_vx18z_g0AAP__7xKRKg) explains the factors that contributed to the disaster and why the Texas Hill Country is known as “Flash Flood Alley.”
## Another Strategy to Combat Screwworm Spread
State and federal authorities previously announced that millions of sterile male flies would be released to combat the spread of the deadly parasitic screwworm. On Monday, Texas Agriculture Commissioner Sid Miller announced another strategy: a [synthetic bait](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u3CAQRp8Gd1gwBmwXLtK4u2lTWvwMuyh4WeHxcvftI6-UvECq0eiTjnTOr6_ty6acHrefdseFvmPZHtiOjERYt8NXbK3U3dlEJ8VSyNmcW9lAgOZi5DBswab83lQXFifCLDtc5KgHMJNWursv2kkxhai00naSzo9hFkZJHwevhzCLLi0XTIwwSCkAVO-l0dOoDUSntDGOKYEhUak93ZHw2x4xv8sLa-_L3uXlTvQ82PCDwcpgba31v18nXiOD1VZKPiOD9fJisObibWawfkB_Lw_4tJV2fBAvkdtbTf7MdFbk_xrwmN_8CsGP681nvahgZj4FFE5bwefZK67mYeLOKMuNQ1DKqyk62dUlPFvKOR1mZErcdpvyR4D-L_trgT8BAAD__5nTlv8) that mimics the scent of open wounds. The compound, called Swormlure-5, is a highly targeted bait that kills screwworm flies when ingested and [poses no danger](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OozAQgJ8GOiMz2IYrXFxDl2uvRP4ZEksGI3sSh7dfkZX2BbadT_Npvvl_W24mxLDf_5kNNb3XtOxYS0QizEtxGWtNebMm0JPWlMiaGGtagINkfGQwLN6EeC6i9dpy_6dvUfejHEBNUsj2oR2Mrre9sygnP4EzxnupcBDcKIHD0AZ9yfgIQ99zANG5XslplApWK6RSthEcfaCUO3og4duUNZ7phblzaWujfhAdpRn-NjA3MNdaO58vXC7ewHwFNTCH3T8L5fN7wmrK0bOfQmYNUUT28TOPR0wnW-PJrnS2hS24wtKBO6vpuV-LuFObtT9qiDEUNTaC3zcT4ucq-t0vXxq-AgAA__8qqo1Z) to honey bees, butterflies, and other pollinators. Two earlier versions of the bait were used during a screwworm outbreak in the 1970s. Miller said the bait killed 90% of the flies [within two to four weeks](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbGu2zAMRb_G3hhIsmSlg4cu2V7XjgZtSzEBSQwk5jn5-8IZ2g_oThzec-_vr_kLKVG5_8IcJnlFnks4Wgoioc5treE4uOYFSZ4SmWXBlA6ejTIOlAczzBtSes-236ZFbT90Hybt3WDGq7Ou3yeFbtAeo9d20fZq1aDdEhePfrsa9Lan6YQpbwatlTH2surRXb0bTVysG8elsypsJFwvsgcJL2wxvfk71MvKuU_TLvJo3fCzM7fO3CK_GhYswoX4vOjM7Z8SfNJ25nbsKEAN2qmXnjWAgw8b8A4r50ytEZdQAcsGz7YhRLrvAsLQhB_wtxtYKzVqkHjFBOcrKAEr5AARa4aKZd3hEZrAykUqp75O2-OglKiNvrPqnpHSR0b-b4LvyfwJAAD___IqoVQ) during previous applications, and the remaining 10% were eliminated by sterile male flies. "_We’ve beaten the New World screwworm before, and we’ll do it again. But it will take all hands on deck_ ," [he said](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2ypCAQhZ8GMyxtQeYGBJuY3U03tBAapaoVC3suM2-_5QT7Apv2z6nzfX--52-XKB3rb7ej5VfM84H1ImTGMl--YK257ItL_OSYMy-OqOYZOtCyMxKGObhE71k1wS5d-OobtL3RA4wPrXSz2ag0gIpKK-P74eEdhsErcMOXMtHosUn2DusMDH3fAajW96N-GD1CXJQex0WoDkPiXFrekPHlrkjv_IOl9XlvyG7M5yWGXwImAVOttT0954PSgfeFgOlGEjB9fmXA0xXe8WCZo3RrSf5J_Cx4byi_L3ndyHRPOMuY1o3lgVXWXCjIf04ETE2x4ayJKF2jEapbd5fo04r_z-WPhb8BAAD__1xLjLs). "_We need another success story like we had in the '70s, and I believe Swormlure-5 bait is the game-changer that will get us there_."

On Monday, Texas Agriculture Commissioner Sid Miller announced another strategy: a that mimics the scent of open wounds. The compound, called Swormlure-5, is a highly targeted bait that kills screwworm flies when ingested and to honey bees, butterflies, and other pollinators. Two earlier versions of the bait were used during a screwworm outbreak in the 1970s. Miller said the bait killed 90% of the flies during previous applications, and the remaining 10% were eliminated by sterile male flies. "We’ve beaten the New World screwworm before, and we’ll do it again. But it will take all hands on deck ," . name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: I just received some disturbing news from home
body:
I’m worried

| | | | |
---
Dear friend,
I've got some bad news and I've got some bad news and no time to waste.
**My radical Democrat opponent just outraised me in the second quarter of this year.**
That's right.
Shawn Harris is a far-left activist who is running a campaign to destroy my name and our movement, and the deep-pocketed liberal elites and the uniparty swamp are flooding his campaign with cash to finance it.
I don’t care that the big donors are lining up behind him. My strength comes from grassroots patriots like you, the real Americans who are demanding our leaders put America First.
**But we can't let them outspend us into defeat. **
**_[Will you rush a donation of $25, $50, or $100 right now to help me close this gap and keep battling the Uniparty](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aQHU/?__vbtrk=MzA0OTg5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA0OTg5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_?**
[STAND WITH MTG](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aQHU/?__vbtrk=MzA0OTg5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA0OTg5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
We’ve defeated the Uniparty together before, and I need you with me to do it again.
_God bless America,_

**Marjorie Taylor Greene**

name: Liya Rechtman, Evergreen
subject: How we can still win clean, affordable transportation
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
This is part two of our plan. Together, we can forge a path forward.
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3803769/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Hi Friend,

You probably know by now how terrible Trump’s budget is for our ability to put more clean energy onto the grid and stave off harmful pollution.

But you know what else his regime is coming after? **All the progress we’ve made when it comes to clean, affordable transportation options.**

Whether that means rescinding federal rules that limit deadly transportation pollution or going after states’ rights to set their own vehicle emissions standards, Trump and his Big Oil backers are doubling down on their crimes against our communities just so they can rake in extra profits.

That’s why—along with our plan to help get more affordable clean energy online in the states—**Evergreen is prioritizing state-level policy solutions that make transportation cleaner, more reliable, and more affordable.** This includes protecting state authority from federal rollbacks and advancing policies that not only ensure electric vehicles are cheaper and more accessible, but also bolster and expand reliable public transit in states like Pennsylvania and Michigan.

But for Evergreen to go all in, we need to meet our goal of raising **$15,000** before the end of this month. [**Will you make a contribution right now to help us get there?**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3803770/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[DONATE TODAY](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3803771/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Everyone deserves access to clean, affordable, and convenient transit—including cleaner cars, reliable buses and trains, and safe walking and biking routes. These options save people money and time while reducing air pollution.

At the same time, we must invest in the clean technologies of the future to keep America competitive as the world races to more modern transportation systems. Our work must ensure those investments benefit everyday people, not just industry.

**Our strategy to get there is ambitious, but with your support, here’s what we can do:** |
---
|
* Convince new governors in 2025 and 2026 to **appoint climate-forward transportation officials via the Clean RIDES Network** , which includes over 100 labor, climate, and health organizations working to promote cleaner transportation options that curb harmful air pollution, cut costs and congestion for commuters, and connect our communities.
* Get leading Michigan gubernatorial candidates to **embrace a unified state transportation policy agenda** that spans both vehicle electrification and public transit—focused on jobs, cost savings, consumer choice, and health.
* Push Pennsylvania lawmakers to **secure the passage of additional funding for SEPTA and other public transit networks across the Commonwealth** that are facing extreme service cuts and fare hikes.
* **Elevate the success of New York’s groundbreaking congestion pricing policy** in the national media and work to protect the program’s authority in federal law.

|
---
| It’s a lot to accomplish, especially with deep-pocketed opponents like the oil industry, truck manufacturers, automakers, and the highway construction industry, who will be fighting progress every step of the way. **But with your help, I know we can do it.**

Every dollar you give right now will allow Evergreen to dive deep into solutions for the transportation sector with what we do best: in-depth policy roadmaps for decision-makers, best-in-class communications work, and strategic advocacy campaigns with movement partners to make those policies a reality.

Whether you’re brand new to our movement or have been with us since the beginning, [**I hope you can help us meet our goal of $15,000 by July 31 by making a gift today.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3803772/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[SUPPORT OUR WORK](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3803773/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| In solidarity, |
---
| | |
---
### Liya Rechtman
Senior Policy Lead - Transportation
Evergreen Action
---
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |
---
---
| | [ ](https://evergreenaction.com/)
---
Follow Evergreen Action on Bluesky and LinkedIn.
---
[ ](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3803774/87SdQ4wZ) | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3803775/87SdQ4wZ)
---|---
And follow our new project, **Hope This Helps.**
---
[ ](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3803776/87SdQ4wZ) | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3803777/87SdQ4wZ) | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3803778/87SdQ4wZ) | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3803779/87SdQ4wZ)
---|---|---|---

Contributions or gifts to Evergreen Action are not tax deductible.
1250 Connecticut Ave NW, Suite 700, Washington DC 20036

[Unsubscribe](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/page/unsubscribe?q=10843&p=797183&b=417193&hash=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC) | [Privacy Policy](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3803780/87SdQ4wZ) | [View in browser](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/page/email/message/view?ea.campaigner.email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&broadcastId=417193&templateId=398658)

name: Defend ICE
subject: AOC and the Squad called for DOXING ICE agents!
body:
...But Karoline Leavitt just put them in their place.

...But Karoline Leavitt just put them in their place.
| Friend,
---
There’s no question about it, far-left radicals and anti-American extremists have truly taken control of the Democrat Party...
---
Today’s Democrat leaders – a handful of socialist Senators, AOC, and the Squad – have called for the **DOXING** of the brave men and women of ICE who are simply trying to carry out their job.
---
**These radicals _knowingly_ put our law enforcement officers in harm's way. _It’s despicable_.**
---
Which is why, straight from the White House podium, Karoline Leavitt just sounded off on them!
---
**_She single-handedly ended AOC’s career when she left her SPEECHLESS with one simple statement:_**
---
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zu9pm0q3c24e00pjql9b1853n9d7nrkftslum8lg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9geepj2c9h2bs) **“I would encourage AOC and other Democrats _to actually meet with the United States Border Patrol..._ These are honorable Americans who are just simply trying to do their job to enforce the law. They go home to their families every night, just like we all do, and they deserve respect and dignity for trying to enforce our nation's immigration laws and to remove public safety threats from our communities.”**
---
Friend, if you agree with Karoline, then we need YOU to go on record!
---
**We’re circulating a 10 MILLION-PATRIOT PETITION to __prove__ just how many American citizens proudly stand with ICE and demand these far-left radicals like AOC be _CENSURED_ for doxing our officers.**

Salena Zito is a Western Pennsylvania-based political reporter for the Washington Examiner, where she covers American politics and culture. She is the author of the New York Times Bestseller “Butler: The Untold Story of the Near Assassination of Donald Trump and the Fight for America’s Heartland” and the co-author of the bestseller “The Great Revolt: Inside the Populist Coalition Reshaping American Politics.

name: Ted Cruz
subject: They want revenge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
We just made history, and now is not the time to let up

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9aTS1KdWx5LU9uZS1Eb2xsYXJfMjAyNTA3MjMmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1aTS1KdWx5LU9uZS1Eb2xsYXImdXRtX2FnZW5jeT1QRyZhbW91bnQ9NzUifQ/bchlCKSOfmJAPWzaooxWXw)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, **I need to ask you something that might feel small -- but matters a lot.** Will you chip in **just $1** today to help us stop the Democrats from taking the Senate? You may not have donated in a while. I get it. But if you ever believed in what we've done together -- the tax cuts, the conservative judges, the border wall -- **I 'm asking you to come off the sidelines for just one dollar**. Because just a couple weeks ago, while you were going about your life, the Senate passed President Trump's "Big Beautiful Bill" and it was signed into law just days later. We pulled an all-nighter to get it done. Why? Because it **locks in permanent tax relief** , **imposes work requirements for welfare** , and **invests over $170 BILLION into border security** , including:
* $46.5 billion for the wall

* $45 billion to expand detention facilities

* $29.9 billion to hire 10,000 new ICE agents

This is real progress -- the kind we dreamed about just a few years ago. But now the Democrats smell blood. They're outraising us, outspending us, and targeting _our_ Senate seats -- even in red states. **They want revenge.** If we lose this next election, everything we just won could vanish. They'll tear it all down. That's why I'm writing you -- not for $10, not for $100 -- **just for $1**. Not because $1 will flip the Senate, but because **it 's a signal that you haven't given up.** **👉[Chip in $1 Now >>](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9aTS1KdWx5LU9uZS1Eb2xsYXJfMjAyNTA3MjMmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1aTS1KdWx5LU9uZS1Eb2xsYXImdXRtX2FnZW5jeT1QRyZhbW91bnQ9NzUifQ/BWhnFPCr_Da50gPSXKsOIg)** Your name on our donor list tells me we're not alone -- that this still matters to you. When Republicans see 10,000 patriots step up with just one dollar, it tells our entire movement: **we 're still in this fight.** You stood with us once. I hope you'll stand with us again -- even if it's just for $1. **For America,**
**Ted Cruz**
---

name: Team AOTL
subject: Re: Texas special session
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Texans don’t deserve this from their representatives.
|
---

Peter,
Earlier this week, the Texas legislature began a special session that will include a proposal for a mid-decade congressional map redraw.
This comes after it was reported last month that the Trump Administration was pushing Texas for an off-cycle redistricting effort, citing the desire for a “ruthless” gerrymander in hopes of picking up as many as five more seats to unfairly advance their highly unpopular far-right agenda
Texas’s current congressional map is already gerrymandered, and it’s at the center of a lawsuit for allegedly violating the Voting Rights Act. Now, with the state threatening to needlessly redistrict in the middle of the decade, extremists in the state could create a map that even further dilutes the voting power of marginalized communities.
Texans do not want more extreme gerrymandering. They want (and are long overdue) their democratic right to fair representation to be fulfilled.
**As we await more information about the potential redraw, we’re educating voters and mobilizing democracy defending activists like you, Peter. **

Right now, our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation, the NRF, is in court fighting to secure fair representation for communities of color in multiple Texas congressional districts.
Whites and Latinos were about equal in population size when the 2020 maps were drawn. The state drew 23 white-majority districts out of 38 total congressional districts. Latino voters made up majorities in only seven. So, the NRF is demanding that the Texas court order a fair congressional map that includes two additional Latino opportunity districts.
The outcome of this case could mean another redraw of the map, and that’s why we’re watching what’s happening in this special session so closely, because this fight for fair maps is at risk.
**We need to be prepared to hold Texas lawmakers accountable, and ensure they respect the voice of Texas voters.** They’ve made it clear that they have every intention of making the maps worse, deliberately engaging in anti-democracy, power-grabbing tactics like gerrymandering.

clean_body: Texans don’t deserve this from their representatives. | Peter, Earlier this week, the Texas legislature began a special session that will include a proposal for a mid-decade congressional map redraw. This comes after it was reported last month that the Trump Administration was pushing Texas for an off-cycle redistricting effort, citing the desire for a “ruthless” gerrymander in hopes of picking up as many as five more seats to unfairly advance their highly unpopular far-right agenda Texas’s current congressional map is already gerrymandered, and it’s at the center of a lawsuit for allegedly violating the Voting Rights Act. Now, with the state threatening to needlessly redistrict in the middle of the decade, extremists in the state could create a map that even further dilutes the voting power of marginalized communities. Texans do not want more extreme gerrymandering. They want (and are long overdue) their democratic right to fair representation to be fulfilled. As we await more information about the potential redraw, we’re educating voters and mobilizing democracy defending activists like you, Peter. Right now, our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation, the NRF, is in court fighting to secure fair representation for communities of color in multiple Texas congressional districts. Whites and Latinos were about equal in population size when the 2020 maps were drawn. The state drew 23 white-majority districts out of 38 total congressional districts. Latino voters made up majorities in only seven. So, the NRF is demanding that the Texas court order a fair congressional map that includes two additional Latino opportunity districts. The outcome of this case could mean another redraw of the map, and that’s why we’re watching what’s happening in this special session so closely, because this fight for fair maps is at risk. We need to be prepared to hold Texas lawmakers accountable, and ensure they respect the voice of Texas voters. They’ve made it clear that they have every intention of making the maps worse, deliberately engaging in anti-democracy, power-grabbing tactics like gerrymandering. Thanks, Team AOTL is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: I was the only one with the courage
body:
We need it now
| | | | Friend,
The Uniparty has struck again.
When I put forward amendments to slash $1.6 billion in foreign aid from our bloated Defense budget (money that's being shipped overseas while Americans are struggling to make ends meet), guess what happened? **They all failed.**
_Why?_ **Because Republicans and Democrats – the uniparty elites – refuse to stop wasting your hard-earned tax dollars on other countries!**
---
* $118 million for "disaster relief" in foreign lands for floods that haven't even happened yet.
* $15 million for AIDS education for soldiers in Africa – seriously, can't they handle that themselves?
* And my big push to stop the endless cash flow to Ukraine? **Shot down too.**

_All while our national debt skyrockets to $37 TRILLION, driving up inflation and making your groceries, gas, and rent unaffordable._
This isn't just incompetence – it's betrayal by the Uniparty that's more interested in funding their globalist agenda than putting America First. Voters demanded an end to this ridiculous spending, but the uniparty doesn’t care, laughing as they spend your money like it's Monopoly cash.
**But I'm not backing down.**
And that's why I need you now more than ever. **_[My grassroots supporters, the real Americans who love this country and hate the waste, are the only ones truly with me in this battle](http://email.email.greene4congress.com/c/eJxckkGPmz4UxD-NuTkyzwT4Hzj8t2yiKtoeVlWl5oIc-0G8MrZrm6TJp68gNK16nTfM_DRYjN7o_taQ6oUAnLWKBIDw_wnAvv5-K3v1Y_9Cj8cDxfYLu89H-LQ6L_D0WinE-_7r20He4-vxltqXI7vkT3e6eXx618oNjkKbWa3aTDV11QvVZ9jk1ZZDVVZQZuemgELmqsBTnfdQ5UzyCuCUc3HKS1mrOtMNMNiyCnjO87ooNgoKwdSJVwxLJth_pGBL0WYIiBYL6ewQMMaNdGNmmnNKPi5cOwK7iHIKuLlqG1DNDgK7UYQPFzTSJG7GBfrIoZF6dN4gdRcM1Dujk5Za2Ejl_FEaOuVsN4qrdJ2dZOe8d7SfOhy738SE78JcGLQdCG9TmJBAOaWxG1HpaSS8XTdaxOimIJHw1krTrSOuJylGL_RgCW8f0XQFEEn_TWFwiguJRZu6frIqCB21Hbql6A_ZGutsQpselfTnUGz9AcuPK4Gys0Yrwtt_xOUB8fbt9dvn-_uWZaFR_qqN0bGsSMGG5U_My18a-BUAAP__lJTOEA)_. **

The big donors and lobbyists? They fund the uniparty.
But you? **_You're my backbone, the patriots who keep our movement going strong._**
That’s why I’m asking you to chip in today to help me keep fighting. **_[A donation of $25, $50, $100, or whatever you can afford will fuel our America First movement and show the uniparty we won't be silenced](http://email.email.greene4congress.com/c/eJxckkGP2yAUhH8NvhGRh42zBx-6682qWm0Pq2ql5oJYeHaoMLiAEyW_vrLjplWv88Yzn8aoYXS2uzSkfiQAR2sSASD8CwF42f24iM78enmkh8MrxfYbu85HeFqdJ7h7vVbq_eX726u-pufDJbePB3ba3t35MuLdu1ZucFDWzWrdFqbZ1Z0yXYHNtq441KIGURybukTBUHxqhpVCZKLqduxBQ2nMri63UNgGGFSsBr7l211ZbgyUiplPXjMUTLEHUrKlaNNHRI-lDr6PmNJGh6FwzTHnMS1cewL7hHqKuDlbH9HMDgL7QcWfIVqkWV1ciPSWQxMdMYwOaThhpGNwNlttlU9Uzx_lXprg5aDOOkg_aRnGMdBukjjIP8SE7-NcGK3vCW9znJCAmPIgBzR2Gghv140WMYUpaiS89drJdcT1pNUwKtt7wttbNF0BVLb_Ujic0kLi0WfZTd5EZZP1vVyK_pKtscFn9PlWSSvI7x8ii6c9ASG9s4bw9j9xeUC8fXv--Hp9r1gRGzOerXM2iZqUrF_-xLz8qYHfAQAA___Oa80w)_.**

Will you pitch in whatever you can to help these Democrats win?| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111970540/558999858/1141545641?refcode=250723em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDQvMS84ODkyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzA1N2ZiOS1jNzY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LSGteHVepv6t9b_eMVyvSeql96ygMLGzouHt8zRI-_o=)
---
Derek, I told you I’d be reaching out about critical upcoming races, and I’m so grateful that so many of you are already joining this effort to win big in Virginia in November. Today I want to share with you some of the Democratic candidates for Virginia House of Delegates who need your support most right now:
* **[Elizabeth Guzman (HD-22)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111970545/558999863/-575250950?refcode=250723em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDQvMS84ODkyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzA1N2ZiOS1jNzY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LSGteHVepv6t9b_eMVyvSeql96ygMLGzouHt8zRI-_o=) **— Elizabeth is a former state delegate and champion for working families who’s running to flip her district blue.
* [**Delegate Josh Thomas (HD-21)**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111970549/558999865/-488214204?refcode=250723em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDQvMS84ODkyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzA1N2ZiOS1jNzY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LSGteHVepv6t9b_eMVyvSeql96ygMLGzouHt8zRI-_o=) — Josh is a Marine Corps veteran and attorney running to defend his seat in a competitive district.
* **[May Nivar (HD-57)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111970553/558999868/-185773026?refcode=250723em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDQvMS84ODkyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzA1N2ZiOS1jNzY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LSGteHVepv6t9b_eMVyvSeql96ygMLGzouHt8zRI-_o=) **— May is a business leader and daughter of immigrants who’s running to flip a district that’s considered the top pick-up opportunity for Democrats.
* [**Lily Franklin (HD-41)**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111970556/558999899/-1597331387?refcode=250723em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDQvMS84ODkyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzA1N2ZiOS1jNzY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LSGteHVepv6t9b_eMVyvSeql96ygMLGzouHt8zRI-_o=) — Lily came within 187 votes of flipping this seat in 2023, and she’s ready to flip it blue this fall and fight for economic opportunity for all.
* **[Delegate Joshua Cole (HD-65)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111970559/558999902/-1941798594?refcode=250723em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDQvMS84ODkyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzA1N2ZiOS1jNzY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LSGteHVepv6t9b_eMVyvSeql96ygMLGzouHt8zRI-_o=) **— Josh is a local pastor who helped flip the House of Delegates in 2023 and is defending his seat this fall.
* **[Leslie Mehta (HD-73)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111970565/558999905/-1737567114?refcode=250723em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDQvMS84ODkyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzA1N2ZiOS1jNzY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LSGteHVepv6t9b_eMVyvSeql96ygMLGzouHt8zRI-_o=) **— Leslie is a strong advocate for access to affordable health care, an attorney, and a champion of justice for all who’s fighting to flip her district blue.
* **[Jessica Anderson (HD-71)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111970569/558999912/-895925528?refcode=250723em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDQvMS84ODkyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzA1N2ZiOS1jNzY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LSGteHVepv6t9b_eMVyvSeql96ygMLGzouHt8zRI-_o=) **— After narrowly losing in 2023, Jessica is returning to the ballot this year to flip her district and push for high-quality education and affordable housing.
* [**Lindsey Dougherty (HD-75)**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111970576/558999919/-1581697751?refcode=250723em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDQvMS84ODkyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzA1N2ZiOS1jNzY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LSGteHVepv6t9b_eMVyvSeql96ygMLGzouHt8zRI-_o=) — After seeing the impacts of DOGE cuts firsthand, Lindsey is running to flip her district blue, fight back against extremism, and give Virginians a strong voice in Richmond.
* [**Kimberly Pope Adams (HD-82)**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111970581/558999924/837740393?refcode=250723em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDQvMS84ODkyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzA1N2ZiOS1jNzY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LSGteHVepv6t9b_eMVyvSeql96ygMLGzouHt8zRI-_o=) — In 2023, Kimberly came within just 53 votes of unseating a Republican incumbent, and this fall she’s running to ensure all working families have economic stability and a thriving future.

To support these great Democrats, [**you can click here to split a donation between all of them**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111970585/558999928/1141545641?refcode=250723em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDQvMS84ODkyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzA1N2ZiOS1jNzY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LSGteHVepv6t9b_eMVyvSeql96ygMLGzouHt8zRI-_o=), or click on their names above to donate to each candidate directly. So many of these races can come down to just a handful of votes. In my first-ever election for Richmond City Council back in 1994, I unseated the incumbent by just 97 votes! So I can tell you firsthand that whatever you can do to support these candidates has the power to make a real difference in their campaigns. I’ll keep updating you on the candidates and races that need your help — and I really appreciate your generous support as we all work together to defend our Democratic majority in the House of Delegates and flip all three statewide offices in November! Sincerely,Tim
---

name: Defend ICE
subject: AOC and the Squad called for DOXING ICE agents!
body:
...But Karoline Leavitt just put them in their place.
...But Karoline Leavitt just put them in their place.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1636006/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvVEI2dmVRcHdlYw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MjM/LbmNsMFpyU3h2WQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNkQUJ1NDZZY0RvMW1scw/gaIDieg/sfv321fb6d6)

| Patriot,
---
There’s no question about it, far-left radicals and anti-American extremists have truly taken control of the Democrat Party...
---
Today’s Democrat leaders – a handful of socialist Senators, AOC, and the Squad – have called for the **DOXING** of the brave men and women of ICE who are simply trying to carry out their job.
---
**These radicals _knowingly_ put our law enforcement officers in harm's way. _It’s despicable_.**
---
Which is why, straight from the White House podium, Karoline Leavitt just sounded off on them!
---
**_She single-handedly ended AOC’s career when she left her SPEECHLESS with one simple statement:_**
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) **“I would encourage AOC and other Democrats _to actually meet with the United States Border Patrol..._ These are honorable Americans who are just simply trying to do their job to enforce the law. They go home to their families every night, just like we all do, and they deserve respect and dignity for trying to enforce our nation's immigration laws and to remove public safety threats from our communities.”**
---
Patriot, if you agree with Karoline, then we need YOU to go on record!
---
**We’re circulating a 10 MILLION-PATRIOT PETITION to __prove__ just how many American citizens proudly stand with ICE and demand these far-left radicals like AOC be _CENSURED_ for doxing our officers.**
---
[**So please, ADD YOUR NAME to the official petition right away to stand with our ICE agents. >>**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[ADD YOUR NAME ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

---
---

---

Thank you for supporting Fight For Reform, a State Level Project of End Citizens United. The Supreme Court's 2010 _Citizens United v. FEC_ decision completely changed the landscape of American politics -- it opened the door for billionaires, corporations, and special interests to spend unlimited, untraceable money to influence our elections.
[ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_ffr_2025_footer?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.X.X_X_FOOTER_X__F1_S1_C1__FOOTER&t=23&refcode2=23232_4449941_uOwavt&akid=23232%2E4449941%2EuOwavt)

Your support is critical to helping us reject the Big Money status quo in states and cities across the country by electing champions of campaign finance reform and voting rights to state government, and passing reform ballot initiatives.
With your support we can harness the power of our grassroots supporters to influence decision makers and put control back in the hands of the people.
