| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6d3c3bdf-e32b-401e-ad8d-7014c4a70171/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Free Media Watch via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Investigate Colbert’s Cancellation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

CBS just canceled The Late Show with Stephen Colbert – 48 hours after
Colbert called out CBS and its parent company, Paramount Global, for
paying Donald Trump a $16 million “big, fat bribe” to settle his bogus
lawsuit.

Colbert’s fearless commentary is exactly what we need right now. But
instead, CBS is cutting the #1 late night show to pander to Trump. It
reeks of corruption – and Bernie isn’t pulling punches:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32976?source=email-20250723&t=1011&akid=9068%2E5885482%2Egzs7Lz ]Bernie tweet calling out the firing of Stephen Colbert

Now, the Writer’s Union is calling for a bribery probe – and together we
can supercharge their call by mobilizing the public to demand the same.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32976?source=email-20250723&t=1012&akid=9068%2E5885482%2Egzs7Lz ]Add your name now to demand a public investigation into Paramount’s
actions!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32976?source=email-20250723&t=1013&akid=9068%2E5885482%2Egzs7Lz ]ADD YOUR NAME

The timing isn’t just suspicious – it reeks of political retaliation. Days
after Colbert exposed Donald Trump’s corruption and attacks on our free
media and democracy, his show was canceled without warning. Then Trump
celebrated, saying “I absolutely love that Colbert got fired.”

The chilling effect is real. Trump has a track record of trying to control
our media – defunding NPR and PBS and filing lawsuits to intimidate
outlets like The Wall Street Journal and 60 Minutes. His goal is simple:
silence every critic, punish anyone brave enough to speak truth to power,
and sabotage free speech across the board.

Today it’s Colbert. Tomorrow it could be any journalist or activist who
challenges the far right. Which is why the Writers Guild of America has
asked New York's Attorney General to launch a bribery investigation into
Paramount Global following its cancellation of Colbert’s show.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32976?source=email-20250723&t=1014&akid=9068%2E5885482%2Egzs7Lz ]Headline: Writers Union Calls for Bribery Probe of Paramount After
Colbert Cancellation

The Writers Guild is right – when media corporations collude behind closed
doors to crush dissent, democracy falters. By axing his show, Paramount
sent a signal: stand up to authoritarianism, and you’re out. And they’re
not alone – across the country, universities, law firms, and media giants
are bending to Trump’s bullying, helping him erode democracy.

Together it’s time we draw and line in the sand.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32976?source=email-20250723&t=1015&akid=9068%2E5885482%2Egzs7Lz ]Stand with Bernie, the Writers Guild, and the grassroots nationwide and
call for an investigation into Paramount’s cancellation of Colbert now!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32976?source=email-20250723&t=1016&akid=9068%2E5885482%2Egzs7Lz ]ADD YOUR NAME

When we organize, we win,

The Our Revolution Team

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Why I founded GIFFORDS
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Fourteen years ago, I was the target of a politically-motivated shooting.
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july25.e1MNu_&refcode=em250723-1-b&t=1&akid=10700%2E3935704%2E3Hi83V)
---
Team --
Every member of this grassroots team has their own motivation for why they want to end the gun violence epidemic. Today, I want to tell you about mine.
Fourteen years ago, I was the target of a politically-motivated shooting. I was at a constituent event outside a Safeway when a man shot me in the head. The shooting nearly killed me, and it changed the trajectory of my life.
It showed the damage a single dangerous person with a gun could do.
As I worked to regain my voice in those early days, one question kept popping in my head: “Why are we letting this happen?”
After the shooting at Sandy Hook Elementary School -- nearly two years after my own shooting -- I watched as Washington leaders once again failed to pass gun safety legislation.
Again, why are we letting this happen? I couldn’t sit still while our families suffered from tragedy after tragedy.
**That’s when I founded an organization to stop gun violence.** I wasn’t naive about the challenges we’d face. People warned me that it would be political poison to try and stand up against the NRA.
But slowly, we changed that narrative. We invested in hard-to-win races. We elected leaders who supported commonsense gun legislation. And we worked to make gun safety one of the most important issues in our country.
**Team, I believe that if we can save even one life from gun violence, then it’s worth it. That’s why I am fighting so hard every day to elect leaders who will put our communities above the gun industry.**
[**If you’re ready to help me build a better future for our country, will you donate to GIFFORDS PAC today? We have a goal of raising $225,000 by the end of this month.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july25.e1MNu_&refcode=em250723-1-b&t=2&akid=10700%2E3935704%2E3Hi83V)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-july25.lWZeCS&amount=3&refcode=em250723-1-b&t=21&akid=10700%2E3935704%2E3Hi83V)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-july25.Pa0HtQ&refcode=em250723-1-b&t=22&akid=10700%2E3935704%2E3Hi83V)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-july25.kqPk76&refcode=em250723-1-b&t=23&akid=10700%2E3935704%2E3Hi83V)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-july25.fCKs9x&refcode=em250723-1-b&t=24&akid=10700%2E3935704%2E3Hi83V)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-july25.-bFWqW&refcode=em250723-1-b&t=25&akid=10700%2E3935704%2E3Hi83V)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-july25.lWZeCS&refcode=em250723-1-b&t=26&akid=10700%2E3935704%2E3Hi83V)**
---
****
My recovery didn’t happen overnight. It’s taken years of hard work to regain my voice and my strength.
I see our fight for gun safety the same way. Some days are more difficult than others, but we cannot afford to give up.
Thank you for all your support.
Gabby

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=10700%2E3935704%2E3Hi83V) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

Team —
Let's talk about the elephant in the room.
Jason Miyares is sitting on one of the biggest war chests in Virginia history — $8.2 million and counting.
So you might rightfully wonder: How could my $20 possibly make a difference against that MAGA money machine?
Here's the truth they don't want you to know: It's not just your $20.
It’s $20 from a teacher in Norfolk who's terrified Trump will gut her classroom funding...
It's $20 from a nurse in Richmond who watched Miyares do nothing while Trump threatens Medicaid for 300,000 Virginians...
It's $20 from a federal worker in Arlington who Miyares won't defend when Trump fires her for refusing to pledge loyalty...
...Add those up tens of thousands of times, and suddenly we're not David facing Goliath — we're an army.
If you're already fired up to join this movement and show the MAGA millionaires that Virginia can't be bought, here’s the link to donate: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?] https://jones4va.org/secure-donate-722 [https://jones4va.org/secure-donate-722] [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?]
They think they can buy this election.
They're wrong. Because here's what your $20 really buys:
Your $20 puts organizers on the ground in communities Miyares has written off.
Your $20 fights back against every lying attack ad.
Your $20 sends a message that Virginia won't be sold to the highest bidder.
Most importantly, your $20 joins with thousands of others who refuse to let Trump loyalist Jason Miyares control Virginia's justice system.
Your $20 is powerful. | | | | Dear Peter, When Republicans don’t have a record to run on, they resort to fear—and cheap attacks. Just ask Rep. Ronnie Glynn. Because Ronnie’s been doing what they refuse to: fighting for working families, safer communities, and honest government. But here’s the truth: Ronnie Glynn isn’t backing down. He’s fighting back—with facts, with courage and with heart - just like he did for over 20 years in the U.S. Army. And now, he needs _you_ with him.

* Securing critical road projects for Montgomery County
* Calling out the GOP’s $1.6 BILLION corporate giveaway

* Standing up to MAGA extremism and attacks on public education with moral clarity

He’s not just speaking truth to power—he’s delivering for the people. But with Republicans launching personal attacks and drowning our campaigns in dark money, Ronnie can’t do this alone. Every dollar you give helps keep fighters like Ronnie in office—and puts us one step closer to breaking the GOP supermajority. **Will you rush a donation today and show Ronnie he’s not alone in this fight?**

Right now, Republicans hold veto-proof majorities in both chambers of the Iowa legislature, giving them unchecked power to pass extreme legislation no matter who wins the governorship.
To make matters worse, the GOP’s candidate in next month’s special election is a right-wing maniac. He’s vehemently anti-abortion, an election denier, and claims that climate change is “a lie.” We cannot let far-right extremists like this gain more power.
**Flipping a single seat in places like Iowa** can strengthen Democrats’ ability to halt extreme bills and nominees and block more MAGA Republicans from serving in our state legislatures.
**The DLCC has helped break GOP supermajorities in places like North Carolina despite some of the most gerrymandered maps in the country. With your support, we can do it again all over the country.**
[Can you join our team with a triple-matched donation of $7 as we fight to gain ground in red states like Iowa and build Democratic power everywhere? Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene **[fired back at Democrat Rep. Melanie Stansbury](https://substack.com/redirect/66cf4433-db39-4f2f-92f0-f0e739b17b9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for accusing Republicans of "bullying trans kids" for demanding biological males not be allowed in women's sports.
She decided to go off script and show a video to Democrats they didn't know was coming...
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/66cf4433-db39-4f2f-92f0-f0e739b17b9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/66cf4433-db39-4f2f-92f0-f0e739b17b9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Let's call this hearing what it actually is!" Stansbury said. "It's about bullying trans kids and members of the trans community to distract from the failed policies of the Trump administration!"
Greene calmly responded to Stansbury's rant, saying, "I'd like to start by playing a video..."
The clip presented several cases where biological males defeated young women or even injured them while engaging in unfair athletic competition.
"Female athletes should never be forced to compete against mentally ill biological men who parade around in women's clothes!" Greene said after the clip.
**[Watch the tense moment here:](https://substack.com/redirect/66cf4433-db39-4f2f-92f0-f0e739b17b9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Click to Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/66cf4433-db39-4f2f-92f0-f0e739b17b9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**Together with Mode Mobile**
# **[They're calling it the 'Freedom Dividend'](https://substack.com/redirect/dc77a2b0-f0b8-4cf0-b045-33405f430320?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/dc77a2b0-f0b8-4cf0-b045-33405f430320?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Tech titans like **Elon Musk** , **Sam Altman** , and **Mark Zuckerberg** are calling for Universal Basic Income as AI threatens to eliminate millions of jobs.
But there's a critical question few are asking: Who will pay for it?
Instead of relying on taxpayer funding, **[Mode Mobile](https://substack.com/redirect/dc77a2b0-f0b8-4cf0-b045-33405f430320?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** is using attention as currency, already paying out $325M to over 50M users. Deloitte crowned them **[North America's fastest-growing software company](https://substack.com/redirect/dc77a2b0-f0b8-4cf0-b045-33405f430320?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in 2023 after their revenue soared 32,481%.
And investors have a window to get in early before this becomes the template for post-AI income redistribution.
They've secured their Nasdaq ticker $MODE, and their $0.30/share pre-IPO offering may not be open much longer.
**[Earn up to 120% bonus shares by investing in Mode now.](https://substack.com/redirect/dc77a2b0-f0b8-4cf0-b045-33405f430320?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

# Illegal immigrant accused of shooting CBP officer was only vetted via zoom by Biden admin
Dominican national Miguel Francisco Mora Nunez **[was only vetted via Zoom before being released into the US](https://substack.com/redirect/005b1c73-28f0-4f17-a7be-a4b55b54f8e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in April 2023 during a migrant surge that saw over 183,000 border crossers that month, with overwhelmed Border Patrol agents using virtual interviews to speed up processing.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/005b1c73-28f0-4f17-a7be-a4b55b54f8e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Miguel Francisco Mora Nunez, obtained by the NY Post
* **Standard vetting procedures were skipped due to resource shortages** , including failure to take a DNA sample from Mora Nunez due to a lack of swabs, though his name was run through databases and showed no criminal history at the time of his border crossing.
* **Despite a 2023 deportation order for failing to appear in court, Mora Nunez remained in the US** and accumulated multiple arrests in New York City and Massachusetts but was released each time before allegedly shooting an off-duty CBP officer in the face during a botched robbery in Manhattan.
* **President Trump criticized the "catch and release" system** that allowed Mora Nunez to stay in the country, calling him an "Illegal Alien Monster freed into the Country under Joe Biden" while praising the wounded officer's courage in fighting back and hitting his attacker three times during the confrontation.

* * *
# Tulsi Gabbard calls out Obama after he denied involvement in Russia collusion hoax
DNI Tulsi Gabbard **[fired back at Barack Obama after he dismissed her claims](https://substack.com/redirect/3c8fcd5f-972f-41ed-bfab-59737a14419a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that his administration manipulated intelligence to sabotage Trump's first term, calling Obama's response "the art of deflection" that doesn't address the evidence in over 100 documents released last week.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3c8fcd5f-972f-41ed-bfab-59737a14419a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Obama spokesperson Patrick Rodenbush responded to Gabbard 's initial claims, **saying, "Out of respect for the office of the presidency, our office does not normally dignify the constant nonsense and misinformation flowing out of this White House with a response... But these claims are outrageous enough to merit one. These bizarre allegations are ridiculous and a weak attempt at distraction."

* **Gabbard responded to Obama** on Fox News, telling Laura Ingraham, "It's the art of deflection, coming from Obama, as well as his friends, who are still in Congress today...really all basically saying that exact same statement, which doesn't actually address the issue that was revealed in great detail in the over 100 documents that we released last week and the documents that we will be releasing later this week."

* **Intelligence documents show a dramatic reversal occurred after Trump's 2016 election victory** , with assessments stating Russia did not interfere in the election on December 7, 2016, but Obama convening the National Security Council and ordering a new contradictory assessment that was released January 6, 2017.
* **Gabbard alleges Obama directed a "180-degree shift" in intelligence assessments** using discredited sources like the Steele dossier that intelligence professionals had previously rejected, with Brennan, Clapper, and Comey claiming "high confidence" in the new document despite knowing the sources lacked credibility.
* **The DOJ has received a criminal referral from Gabbard** regarding what she calls a "years-long coup against President Trump," with intelligence community whistleblowers coming forward and all documents being referred to the Justice Department for potential prosecution and accountability.

* * *

They've secured their Nasdaq ticker $MODE, and their $0.30/share pre-IPO offering may not be open much longer. Illegal immigrant accused of shooting CBP officer was only vetted via zoom by Biden admin Dominican national Miguel Francisco Mora Nunez in April 2023 during a migrant surge that saw over 183,000 border crossers that month, with overwhelmed Border Patrol agents using virtual interviews to speed up processing. | | ---|---|--- Miguel Francisco Mora Nunez, obtained by the NY Post Standard vetting procedures were skipped due to resource shortages , including failure to take a DNA sample from Mora Nunez due to a lack of swabs, though his name was run through databases and showed no criminal history at the time of his border crossing. Despite a 2023 deportation order for failing to appear in court, Mora Nunez remained in the US and accumulated multiple arrests in New York City and Massachusetts but was released each time before allegedly shooting an off-duty CBP officer in the face during a botched robbery in Manhattan. President Trump criticized the "catch and release" system that allowed Mora Nunez to stay in the country, calling him an "Illegal Alien Monster freed into the Country under Joe Biden" while praising the wounded officer's courage in fighting back and hitting his attacker three times during the confrontation. Tulsi Gabbard calls out Obama after he denied involvement in Russia collusion hoax DNI Tulsi Gabbard that his administration manipulated intelligence to sabotage Trump's first term, calling Obama's response "the art of deflection" that doesn't address the evidence in over 100 documents released last week. | | ---|---|--- Obama spokesperson Patrick Rodenbush responded to Gabbard 's initial claims, saying, "Out of respect for the office of the presidency, our office does not normally dignify the constant nonsense and misinformation flowing out of this White House with a response... But these claims are outrageous enough to merit one. These bizarre allegations are ridiculous and a weak attempt at distraction." Gabbard responded to Obama on Fox News, telling Laura Ingraham, "It's the art of deflection, coming from Obama, as well as his friends, who are still in Congress today...really all basically saying that exact same statement, which doesn't actually address the issue that was revealed in great detail in the over 100 documents that we released last week and the documents that we will be releasing later this week." Intelligence documents show a dramatic reversal occurred after Trump's 2016 election victory , with assessments stating Russia did not interfere in the election on December 7, 2016, but Obama convening the National Security Council and ordering a new contradictory assessment that was released January 6, 2017. Gabbard alleges Obama directed a "180-degree shift" in intelligence assessments using discredited sources like the Steele dossier that intelligence professionals had previously rejected, with Brennan, Clapper, and Comey claiming "high confidence" in the new document despite knowing the sources lacked credibility. The DOJ has received a criminal referral from Gabbard regarding what she calls a "years-long coup against President Trump," with intelligence community whistleblowers coming forward and all documents being referred to the Justice Department for potential prosecution and accountability. Is there any way you could chip in to help? = We know you’re getting a lot of emails, but that’s because Democrats have a clear path to winning back the House – and Hakeem isn’t letting a single second go to waste. **[Which is why I’m giving away 500 of my new Dash Eagle cameras at below wholesale cost](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21666/6374453/21b574823a3902265f1298dd6a14f754d9eb6aee/ef40910aefc752b286d90dacffadd5d6e29ce181)** Every time you hit the road, you’ll have an HD dashboard camera to record everything that happens on the road, and inside your vehicle... So if you get in an accident, an altercation, or if you get pulled over by the police... You’ll be able to **record every second** with crystal clear video and audio... And you’ll never have to worry about not having any proof to back your case in court. It installs in just seconds and you can charge it in your car while simultaneously recording... But like I said... [We’re only giving away 500 Dash Eagles for 80% OFF...](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21666/6374453/21b574823a3902265f1298dd6a14f754d9eb6aee/ef40910aefc752b286d90dacffadd5d6e29ce181) And it’s first come, first served... And now House Republicans are rubber-stamping a **rescissions package that claws back more than $9 billion from essential programs,** including **zeroing out federal funding for public media for the first time in almost 60 years.**

name: Defend Our Courts
subject: New GOP map turns every blue seat in TX red
body:
They can get away with insane gerrymandering like this in Texas because they control the Texas Supreme Court - the body responsible for drawing up Congressional maps.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NXTjNms5GBWNrSK2d_Q7blzG9xoyRFj2kki7faPlh4EEfjfJ_esnIDkHQ4oMHV_6-uZE6btMInQUqXO9BUuOFhQeK8b9xmXOWfrcuRuRpeFP-vbVqMjDt-LZmrtTeDrX7KplNrcPii-t8n5pCx8TUkn9ETmRybbrX38c-BCvmD_0-_Ja2tqcVg4d4icP6uIgh8pZLBkKx9zNSiBercfbxw2UItmo7aCPdSdRHmfZ5Ls=&c=k6KIXwuZLoLYiOv6Cx3PC75nDyX44MzQs2sXCZ0zZJnZIFl18SxR9A==&ch=fiisYUVzmYUtNzAVndChBWHGhEvXXr6YHrWs9pmbZ39rD-sdpdeU8A==)
---
| Peter,
As Trump heads into his 16th day of wall to wall press coverage of his involvement with Jeffrey Epstein, he is beginning to panic over if he'll keep the House next fall.
This is in part why he has instructed the Texas legislature to get him new Congressional maps that will bolster the GOP's house majority and protect vulnerable seats that they are currently on track to lose.
Here's what they've come up with:

---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NXTjNms5GBWNrSK2d_Q7blzG9xoyRFj2kki7faPlh4EEfjfJ_esnIDkHQ4oMHV_6-uZE6btMInQUqXO9BUuOFhQeK8b9xmXOWfrcuRuRpeFP-vbVqMjDt-LZmrtTeDrX7KplNrcPii-t8n5pCx8TUkn9ETmRybbrX38c-BCvmD_0-_Ja2tqcVg4d4icP6uIgh8pZLBkKx9zNSiBercfbx-vMB9f7alrLWr-kVNzZilw=&c=k6KIXwuZLoLYiOv6Cx3PC75nDyX44MzQs2sXCZ0zZJnZIFl18SxR9A==&ch=fiisYUVzmYUtNzAVndChBWHGhEvXXr6YHrWs9pmbZ39rD-sdpdeU8A==)
---

They can get away with insane gerrymandering like this in Texas because they control the Texas Supreme Court \- the body responsible for drawing up Congressional maps.
In November 2025 MAGA is quietly preparing to move heaven and earth to take the majority on Pennsylvania's state Supreme Court in their upcoming judicial election. They want to do in Pennsylvania exactly what they're doing in Texas and controlling that state's highest court opens that door.
If they take majority control of the court they can draw new maps that shore up the five PA Republican districts that they are projected to lose in 2026 and make PA's seven safe blue seats untenable for Democrats.
We get it--a Judicial Retention election does not sound sexy. But losing this race could mean losing every blue congressional seat in PA. Defend Our Courts is one of the only organizations working to rapidly mobilize Democrats before we are outraised and outorganized by MAGA (what we are currently on track for).
[Can we count on you to rush whatever you can spare to help us catch up in the beyond critical 2025 election that no one is talking about? ](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NXTjNms5GBWNrSK2d_Q7blzG9xoyRFj2kki7faPlh4EEfjfJ_esnIDkHQ4oMHV_6-uZE6btMInQUqXO9BUuOFhQeK8b9xmXOWfrcuRuRpeFP-vbVqMjDt-LZmrtTeDrX7KplNrcPii-t8n5pCx8TUkn9ETmRybbrX38c-BCvmD_0-_Ja2tqcVg4d4icP6uIgh8pZLBkKx9zNSiBercfbx70Oz6_qMcaGp06MnbLPiVc=&c=k6KIXwuZLoLYiOv6Cx3PC75nDyX44MzQs2sXCZ0zZJnZIFl18SxR9A==&ch=fiisYUVzmYUtNzAVndChBWHGhEvXXr6YHrWs9pmbZ39rD-sdpdeU8A==)

THE NRCC OUTRAISED DEMOCRATS LAST QUARTER, AND THEY'RE ON TRACK TO DO THE SAME THIS QUARTER
The GOP raised $36.7 million last quarter, folks.
They are NOT playing around.
Republicans aren’t just hoping to hold the House. They’re planning to straight-up purchase it.
The NRCC is quietly flooding battleground districts with dark money, billionaire cash, and far-right talking points — all in an effort to lock in GOP control of Congress before most voters have even tuned in.
We must match their war chest dollar for dollar - and thanks to the strength of our grassroots movement, we can.
Because when everyday Democrats chip in $5, $20, or $50 at a time, we create something stronger than any billionaire super PAC: people-powered political muscle that can flip seats, win races, and fight back against MAGA extremism.
We need YOU in this fight with us. Will you chip in any amount you can BEFORE the crucial end of quarter fundraising deadline to help Democrats counter this GOP cash? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-weekly?refcode=071725_1]

name: Democracy on the Line
subject: 🚨Newsom’s warning: You have the power to stop Trump!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
Deadline: midnight tonight. Add your name now →

|
---
**🚨 IMPORTANT UPDATE 🚨**

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111980164/559026552/-1787004069?refcode=header&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYThjMjVlYjktZDI2Ny1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Z1SZi7SbqG2-M4S7gd1eK4tbNsScR8uCF6hW1_YYA8M=) | This month, I spent two days traveling through seven counties in southwest Minnesota. It was part of my ninth tour of all 87 Minnesota counties. I met with local election officials, voters, and community leaders. And I left those conversations feeling even more inspired, and even more committed to the work ahead. **The message I heard again and again: Minnesotans care deeply about protecting our freedom to vote. And they expect us to stand up when that freedom is threatened.** Right now, it is.
* From a dangerous federal court ruling that could gut the Voting Rights Act...
* To an executive order from the White House that could block millions of Americans from registering to vote...
* To bills like the SAVE Act that would deny eligible voters their rights...

**The fight for democracy is very real.** **[I’m doing everything I can to defend our values and safeguard our elections. But I need your help to keep this work going. Will you please chip in $10 or more today to help us stand up for every voter, no matter their ZIP code?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111980165/559026553/1738122805?amount=25&refcode=ss_em_fr_90DO_250723&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYThjMjVlYjktZDI2Ny1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Z1SZi7SbqG2-M4S7gd1eK4tbNsScR8uCF6hW1_YYA8M=)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed now.

clean_body: = | This month, I spent two days traveling through seven counties in southwest Minnesota. It was part of my ninth tour of all 87 Minnesota counties. I met with local election officials, voters, and community leaders. And I left those conversations feeling even more inspired, and even more committed to the work ahead. The message I heard again and again: Minnesotans care deeply about protecting our freedom to vote. And they expect us to stand up when that freedom is threatened. Right now, it is. From a dangerous federal court ruling that could gut the Voting Rights Act... To an executive order from the White House that could block millions of Americans from registering to vote... To bills like the SAVE Act that would deny eligible voters their rights... Fellow activist,
We wanted to share a recent op-ed published by _The Bucks County Beacon_ by Daniel J. Mallinson from Penn State with you today.

**Here’s a recap: **
---
[](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz7cnf2nT45L4TDLL79xclFmlYUKVz-2FZIWg-2FtTcyX6kz-2FspKUbQcvdcAD1dHfUqYevRgKez7r8xT-2BMQ5TBWJX7S1G50ssXWJtVmw7w7mH2bpm98CA42NdT78rn6IaD2ElXY-3DNvF3_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrY7Y8Bo2CgAqo3onsUfs8nwSoh1nJkk5xgBagzUmyi9UNKTVEO1dWhDIVeTQM-2FqyNHUN38tlTBiQffq2s-2BO3mTzWYjksn0alKNaBvXapvKegjwPk0FaZlQPXFQfwxMeM6DUNaguSlF9x44jkZTt0cosuC5EswRK5UBcKgPJg-2BRuLJsH-2BM7scG-2FmD4ObrrSqZjt)

As the piece states, this November, Pennsylvania voters will head to the polls for critical local, municipal, and judicial elections, including retention votes for three justices on the state Supreme Court.

For the PA Supreme Court, these are **non-partisan retention elections**. That means voters will decide whether to keep the current justices (all of whom were elected as Democrats) or to remove them. Should voters vote against a judge’s retention, Governor Shapiro will be able to make a temporary replacement to fill the seat until a special election can be held. However, the Republican-controlled state senate is unlikely to confirm his picks.

**Here’s the thing:** MAGA is working to politicize our state Supreme Court, and this is becoming more urgent as the Trump regime tries to punish judges and justices that it sees as working against their agenda. Our courts play a significant role in critical issues that impact our everyday lives, from reproductive rights to climate change, voting, redistricting, and many more. With PA being a battleground state, these elections are gaining more and more attention, and we need to be prepared.

Earlier this year, Wisconsin had the most expensive state judicial race in US history, with $100 million in spending, including $20 million spent by Elon Musk. **This was for one seat – the PA Supreme Court has three justices up for retention.**

Republicans are already eyeing this as their opportunity to reverse the progressive majority on the PA Supreme Court and regain power. This would have a drastic impact on the people of our state, and we need to be ready.
[**This election will be here before we know it – help us provide civic education to Pennsylvanians and ensure they are ready to vote in November’s critical local, municipal, and judicial election by rushing $25 or more today.**](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz7cnf2nT45L4TDLL79xclFmlYUKVz-2FZIWg-2FtTcyX6kz-2FspKUbQcvdcAD1dHfUqYevRgKez7r8xT-2BMQ5TBWJX7S1VwjleEbwc-2FN4KL-2Blb83aTjlP56ezCGNcw478LnhgEFc-3DJ7q0_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrY7Y8Bo2CgAqo3onsUfs8nwSoh1nJkk5xgBagzUmyi9UMaBPruATWC14ZhnrM3M7S3TTcVhzC0ch92q0-2FXphHesxiSOx0w9v9a2BV6zuO5X8uTSgBMR8Pb8nXQZ6B3yimogys7Tm0a3v7EyF25S-2BSjmHAaq0TIZlktmnu4qwVsYSf-2FT-2BL3wUDwePhM-2BJw6cnwY)

_Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round.
_
---
| | _The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth._

clean_body: | | | Fellow activist, We wanted to share a recent op-ed published by The Bucks County Beacon by Daniel J. Mallinson from Penn State with you today. Here’s a recap: As the piece states, this November, Pennsylvania voters will head to the polls for critical local, municipal, and judicial elections, including retention votes for three justices on the state Supreme Court. For the PA Supreme Court, these are non-partisan retention elections. That means voters will decide whether to keep the current justices (all of whom were elected as Democrats) or to remove them. Should voters vote against a judge’s retention, Governor Shapiro will be able to make a temporary replacement to fill the seat until a special election can be held. However, the Republican-controlled state senate is unlikely to confirm his picks. Here’s the thing: MAGA is working to politicize our state Supreme Court, and this is becoming more urgent as the Trump regime tries to punish judges and justices that it sees as working against their agenda. Our courts play a significant role in critical issues that impact our everyday lives, from reproductive rights to climate change, voting, redistricting, and many more. With PA being a battleground state, these elections are gaining more and more attention, and we need to be prepared. Earlier this year, Wisconsin had the most expensive state judicial race in US history, with $100 million in spending, including $20 million spent by Elon Musk. This was for one seat – the PA Supreme Court has three justices up for retention. Republicans are already eyeing this as their opportunity to reverse the progressive majority on the PA Supreme Court and regain power. This would have a drastic impact on the people of our state, and we need to be ready. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: In solidarity, Team NPP Source: Pennsylvania Voters Can’t Afford to Ignore This Year’s State Judicial Elections, Bucks County Beacon, July 16, 2025 () Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round. | | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. Will you support us with a monthly contribution today? || || || The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project Our Contact Information New Pennsylvania ProjectP.O. Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381412-699-6771 | | | |

name: Rand Paul
subject: Big Gov is on the chopping block

| | Peter, I've repeatedly said we must make DOGE's spending cuts permanent. _The good news is Congress finally voted and passed a rescission package._ That means we have a chance to claw back billions in wasteful spending and finally start dialing back the size of Big Government. But let me be clear: 🛑 The Washington Swamp hates this. 🛑 The big spenders are already mobilizing to tank this effort. 🛑 And if conservatives don't show up in force, this package could fall apart. That's why I need your help right now. **_[Will you rush a donation to help me fight to rein in Congress’ out-of-control spending?](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/as3rHbg0o7QJssMYmz4Af4XQ3_Vp4C9gO_3RIUnV0sQ5poEW230WjCYpzjyDszGWq5jao2Pdj71-o7DH_kuLYjq0ZtA0cqFEwGgIYNRqt4WwW_K2X66QOcu6lC09KcyaeQ6Nc4k1mQSAHMfIyrUkGAHZqQr_fGyBjvgH8_YTKQFkwn96-DNVkrarE-S6fxdqm9rxHCcyLT521SAlqh8OhgPp_qLP0pMS2o95U_fFkfzLQOKyBqNQ_GB3OUGQTe-qdj7VBVDOASOLnGXXsrXBmFiDmAt6f5UPaOxTIFmfqniFsxqZG1zczg1fwh979UC7WJkgta9k66XyrM0wjKFE5hP7tutSXTWk9Q8MAlv69YjINbDm8vslVEJ-tVPrYwEkqCzhTHX3c15miA1GcATcQzjL-O5JLf6Xn1Rlh4y5twnLQpssiDa_XcFRcHAnzkIv839r2QmscpKk9_C8G_24KrAgLb5F_YPX_sIGCBQY3BqXr0aqB0SxBbluLi0zpL_TyfHPAssiYw0ndu_Rk5bVyiksNo7kC_X5wmdm4DR0b9vQR0P4rj6ts1gfh_K79h7Yr4Giq9CqiqfTwNm4qHrF7PPYrRyoj3aT8PoZ5YZSMxdpjxonITRPLWqNBZTuF-vS2dTHl3fEHjXvsOm918PX9XhXVgkE1wKFHxz3QpZRitWNCb1sF5J-GeCvM3Vkrm_VByh7M57LD-2Ni4adIZBf/9yDUXd1zcdCk-7qo6TOHnR8A5BzcabUE/11)_**

Since the start of the Trump administration, I've been pushing for serious cuts to Washington's bloated budget. Now, with this rescission vote, we have a real shot at making those cuts stick. But I can't do it alone. **The special interests are lining up against us, and we need grassroots conservatives to stand up and help push this across the finish line.** Let's show the big spenders that we're serious. Let's shrink the government, slash the waste, and secure a freer future for our kids and grandkids. **_[Will you chip in now to stand with me in this fight?](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/SAFhLWrylbDXQqo8w3WJWKbS-mTfEzCQBnJxEZgnS6oXE6meUmJbAzn2XneWu7yuaTyuYQ_jHzXtzYWzu02BkkgFjmOa-_YrY3G_Oedgq5bkjXM8wNzjP2FMxpS-72Ei3C0mkB2V5ytZATtkYSzptH3nD1mdNi51E2Ni0InBYuNoZVDRoKDK0lulFb2qvVeamfHVqNnQST3MxvSJlSBW_LlKetGf-WDM6WxhBnSKagGUAfyexVFXv8fVJonh2n0hTnthhROWbTT0oGKE9BKEWt0wDLzh9Z-EuupPYFXlNMeFm5S7RTGTnSNDKFvB70yoWI0VAk396VSS1U84_mhwbWSKPo1MqCVvqWIyWBnOdMCJbRrlfDO9kIZCY-BM82nLghLhMtMUbvBNMqt4wRdSU0nVKNpQJ7w7g300WzfH9yHBssrSEcjKdYl_iEBj4JyRzhaSqKsz6yXoK2EOZQp5D79hFHGFA9_l7JwEITvDCDFo-TCBRRD3r49b9W9V4yKqBwQTo91HCpgt_ears7EhJmN1NGIu3fMszENDufxzp4ZudeM-8AiGiVD656krKhZh1ZvgZcNj5KKcOoYf9Vry7-mHvZOTATKlS6XUJRv_-mdUa4vI86YMem4qARQcGGH0HqU1S-eDDKUUzvhltxPLj8RS0aitGxQoOWomaIcg3D_XwbdHLS6vc_cYlW75fkxLnt9nVDsw5UpvS-ERTT-C/De8kFJtDCkl-uDejuI9PTVLUAMPmpVC6/11)_**

name: Mike, House GOP Membership Services
subject: Our missing chapter, Friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Re-join House GOP.

Imagine a book with a missing chapter. A chapter that held the key to the story's resolution, the hero's triumph, and the villain's defeat. Without it, the narrative is incomplete, the plot is unfinished, and the characters are left in limbo.
Your House Republicans' membership is that missing chapter! It's the crucial piece that completes our story and makes our America First movement whole. [- FINISH OUR CHAPTER-
RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP
](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zv97i8r1g0vked8qi3f3t3koar95gaj0v1ljq54g_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9ie6pj0c3h2bs)With your membership expired, we're left with a you shaped missing puzzle piece in our story. Together, we have been through both good times and bad. We've stood our ground, fought for what's right, and made a difference. [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z2c0959pkq1hrodf1v5hedflf533uf558ic3a750_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9ie6pj0c3h2bs)[REACTIVATE HOUSE GOP MEMBERSHIP
](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z8ksl4d7j77hba7ubqn5c6ofeuhlnoo9rmr558co_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9ie6pj0c3h2bs)But now, your membership has expired. The chapter that was yours to write has been left blank. The story that was ours to tell has been silenced.
[We're asking you to renew your membership and help finish this crucial chapter in our story. Don't let our story go unfinished - chip in now and renew your membership before midnight tonight! ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zsgpjat30c6s40n7vtu57d0msjpf3ib3q295ten8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9ie6pj0c3h2bs)[- FINISH OUR CHAPTER-

name: Andy Kim
subject: Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress are sabotaging the Affordable Care Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
Without action, people in New Jersey will pay more, get less, and many could lose their coverage altogether.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111981220/559029430/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2E1MTQwMi1kNDY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OClaQ9az-sxkSYdkAE4swQiB7-1zwmKtTmLYrcqn034=&emci=4882e366-3467-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=03a51402-d467-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=26261389)
---

| | Right now, millions of Americans – including hundreds of thousands in New Jersey – are at risk of losing their healthcare or facing massive cost increases. And let's be clear about why: **Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress are sabotaging the Affordable Care Act.** In 2021, Democrats passed the American Rescue Plan, which created subsidies that helped lower healthcare premiums and expanded access to coverage for working and middle-class families – and these subsidies were extended in the Inflation Reduction Act. **Instead of extending those life-changing benefits, Trump and the GOP passed their budget plan that lets these healthcare subsidies expire.** Now, insurers are proposing the biggest premium increases in seven years – with some plans spiking more than 20%. This isn't some accident. This is part of a deliberate strategy. _Republicans couldn't repeal the Affordable Care Act, so they're chipping away at it through the back door, one policy change at a time, hoping you won't notice._ **We need to fight back.** Without action, people in New Jersey and across the country will pay more, get less, and many could lose their coverage altogether. That's unacceptable. I've fought to protect healthcare access from day one, and I'll never stop. But I need you with me. This is going to take all of us speaking out, organizing, and demanding better. More soon, _Andy_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly:

| Good morning Friend, For too long, Mississippi has been seen as an economic underdog. But that narrative is changing—fast. Our latest report, _A Mississippi Miracle?_ , reveals how bold, pro-growth policy reforms are fueling record-setting economic gains across the state. From tax cuts and capital investment to job creation and deregulation, Mississippi is finally gaining momentum.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=8b1f03ce23&e=5703353baa)

| This growth didn’t happen by accident. It’s the result of smart decisions and the willingness to challenge the status quo. We’ll be sharing highlights over the next few weeks, so stay tuned—and thank you for standing with us as we advocate for a stronger, freer Mississippi.

Anika Page

clean_body: = Peter, I've seen a lot of tough races in my time, but let me tell you: This one is as important as it gets. The Virginia Governor's race is a bellwether for the entire country. This will be the first major election of Trump's second term, and it will set the stage for Democrats in 2026. If we don't win big here, we'll be facing a rough road ahead. = = = = = = = Here's what's got me terrified, and I won't mince my words: Republicans are going to flood the state with MILLIONS of dollars through their super PACs, trying to keep the Governor's seat red. This election is for all the marbles – and we need to match their energy, their money, and their commitment. Remember, we only have one opportunity to flip a Governor's office from red to blue in 2025 and it's in Virginia. And right now, we're seeing that Democratic Governors are our first line of defense against the reckless policies coming out of the Trump Administration. Abigail Spanberger is the leader Virginia needs at this moment. That's why I'm asking you to step up today. The money that's coming from the other side is going to be massive, and we need to be able to push back. = = = = = = = Thank you, James Carville By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. body:
You are invited to join me and Team Imer in Denver, CO for a special evening celebrating the Golden Age of America...
| | | | | [](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001P4LeG55Ns491uY4bfAwGiWNz-bJy19tiz8Hsg_m96PhegXSJI5Gek5GmpBWnQYwnFzMTt_3DoYxqXEgHvKuLpu5Gshg-SlbgoCkszUBFuCMqQblk7cBh8nlRwCvVvy5GuzM_5o4PtjNcGDFlPl9d1LruARHXQ-22VB8d5XXAIiaERzJCKkYcenwizYe9XoiTJbLV94mArb3pvSpudMclnMSqoUXUUFQBN66urRjMw5bhtZOztRQ79PzQZJKLR29t&c=ee2eFAbifB3gGz06hyrYVbvPFcwjl1mKRXAnOX5a49Kv65pjaaOkhQ==&ch=0nN7HYMgnbTEDb7xdf-CLBcvNIWNoioGhi9Qrl96ph1YNBvg3L0Olg==)

| Friend, I would like to invite you to join me and Team Imer on Saturday, August 9th, in Denver, CO, for a special evening benefiting the critically important work Team Imer is doing in Colorado to preserve the America we all know and love.
During President Trump's second Inauguration back in January, I met Laurel and Weston Imer and was thrilled to hear of the work being done through the Team Imer PAC.
You know what the opposition has been doing in Colorado, which makes this effort all the more vital and urgent. We simply cannot write off Colorado when voters are waking up.
Joining all those who are helping Team Imer on August 9th, especially at this crucial time as we approach 2026, is a real pleasure for me.
I look so very forward to meeting you there, discussing the past, present and future, all while furthering the mission to help Colorado and America.
It can be difficult at times being a conservative and suffering the slings and arrows from hostile haters, as I well know, but this should be a grand occasion to discuss our victories and the work ahead.
For a limited time, tickets can be purchased at 50% off on the website below, and opportunities to join the host committee are still available.
Enter code: GOLDENAGE to recieve 50% off your tickets for a limited time only!

name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: There's a hearing on this tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
The U.S. Senate Committee on Homeland Security & Governmental Affairs is holding a hearing on these USPS Board of Governors nominees tomorrow, with potential votes on Lomangino and LaValle as early as next week. We have to drive as many letters as possible before these cynical partisans push these pro-privatization nominees out of committee and make it clear that we oppose them and privatization of the Postal Service.
Sign on right now to tell your Senators how you feel about these nominees and Trump's efforts to privatize the USPS >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/reject-trumps-usps-board-nominees?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/reject-trumps-usps-board-nominees?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=HuNsu6RNBWZcVO9+lS12Pv2pyRix2MJkeShvvqqlmiSmu3mWRh4qeDzMYEL1jYPAPlssQXrW9padCq/6M4RxOgViXt4h5d4phghwyNmqdFM=]
Folks,
We've reached the next stage in our fight to protect the U.S. Postal Service from privatization. Donald Trump has nominated Anthony Lomangino and John LaValle to the USPS Board of Governors, two very wealthy Wall Street types with deep ties to Trump, zero experience with the Postal Service, and clear records of political loyalty.
Lomangino is a Mar-a-Lago insider and Trump megadonor with deep business ties to the new Postmaster General. Lomangino’s company donated nearly $9 million to a pro-Trump super PAC, and he once gave $150,000 to defend Trump associates under federal investigation. John LaValle is a longtime GOP operative, a former GOP party boss and MAGA surrogate whose loyalty to Trump goes all the way back to 2016.
These men aren’t public servants, and they don’t know the first thing about running the post office. But they are part of a deliberate scheme to dismantle public oversight from the inside in order to fast-track USPS privatization, which has been Trump’s goal all along.
It's simple: A vote to confirm these men is a vote to gut the post office .
Demand your senators reject Trump’s USPS Board nominees and protect the Post Office from privatization now! >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/reject-trumps-usps-board-nominees?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/reject-trumps-usps-board-nominees?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
The USPS has long been a lifeline for millions , especially those in rural, Indigenous, and under-served communities. The postal board must remain independent and focused on public service, not privatization.
Confirming these men would shift the balance of power on the USPS Board and put the future of the postal service in the hands of Trump’s political allies. If they join the board, the makeup would be: 1 Independent, 2 Democrats, 4 Republicans, and 2 open seats.
This is the next step in Trump’s larger plan to dismantle the USPS and hand it over to corporate profiteers. But with your help, we can stop it.
Add your name today to let your Senators know you oppose these nominees and Trump's efforts to privatize the USPS >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/reject-trumps-usps-board-nominees?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]

clean_body: The U.S. Senate Committee on Homeland Security & Governmental Affairs is holding a hearing on these USPS Board of Governors nominees tomorrow, with potential votes on Lomangino and LaValle as early as next week. We have to drive as many letters as possible before these cynical partisans push these pro-privatization nominees out of committee and make it clear that we oppose them and privatization of the Postal Service. Sign on right now to tell your Senators how you feel about these nominees and Trump's efforts to privatize the USPS >> [] SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [] Voter Action Project [=] Folks, We've reached the next stage in our fight to protect the U.S. Postal Service from privatization. Donald Trump has nominated Anthony Lomangino and John LaValle to the USPS Board of Governors, two very wealthy Wall Street types with deep ties to Trump, zero experience with the Postal Service, and clear records of political loyalty. Lomangino is a Mar-a-Lago insider and Trump megadonor with deep business ties to the new Postmaster General. Lomangino’s company donated nearly $9 million to a pro-Trump super PAC, and he once gave $150,000 to defend Trump associates under federal investigation. John LaValle is a longtime GOP operative, a former GOP party boss and MAGA surrogate whose loyalty to Trump goes all the way back to 2016. These men aren’t public servants, and they don’t know the first thing about running the post office. But they are part of a deliberate scheme to dismantle public oversight from the inside in order to fast-track USPS privatization, which has been Trump’s goal all along. It's simple: A vote to confirm these men is a vote to gut the post office . Demand your senators reject Trump’s USPS Board nominees and protect the Post Office from privatization now! >> [] SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [] The USPS has long been a lifeline for millions , especially those in rural, Indigenous, and under-served communities. The postal board must remain independent and focused on public service, not privatization. Confirming these men would shift the balance of power on the USPS Board and put the future of the postal service in the hands of Trump’s political allies. If they join the board, the makeup would be: 1 Independent, 2 Democrats, 4 Republicans, and 2 open seats. This is the next step in Trump’s larger plan to dismantle the USPS and hand it over to corporate profiteers. But with your help, we can stop it. Add your name today to let your Senators know you oppose these nominees and Trump's efforts to privatize the USPS >> [] SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [] = [=] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. name: Ileana Paules Bronet
subject: “unwed.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
Sorry, we actually forgot that was a term people used in 2025...? | | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111984340/559039462/2022509128?refcode=EM_F_250723Unwed_N_JZ_90DO_10_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJlOWI4N2M5LWQ3NjctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SdYI4DVcM_Uu8s3TFW4SYHVJ8WAmG1tHlbshwTnN_hk=)
---
Peter, discrimination is now legal in at least one American state.

A 35-year-old woman in Tennessee was **denied prenatal care** by her physician because she was “unwed.” According to the _Nashville Banner_ , a physician turned her away because they “didn't feel comfortable treating her” and cited “differing values.”

Although this type of discrimination is illegal across most of America, Tennessee recently passed the Medical Ethics Defense Act. This law grants medical professionals the right to deny healthcare to patients based on their religious, moral, or ethical beliefs. There are no protections for people in rural areas with limited options for healthcare, there are no requirements to refer patients elsewhere, and there’s no legal recourse.

**83% of the lawmakers in Tennessee are _male_.**

We are horrified by this story. We will not sit back as male politicians pass laws that limit women’s bodily autonomy, healthcare, and safety.

[**We cannot accept this reality for our fellow women. We’re working to elect PRO-WOMEN women – especially in red states like Tennessee. Help support our candidates by donating $25 today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111984341/559039463/2022509128?refcode=EM_F_250723Unwed_N_JZ_90DO_10_NG_N_L1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJlOWI4N2M5LWQ3NjctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SdYI4DVcM_Uu8s3TFW4SYHVJ8WAmG1tHlbshwTnN_hk=)

This is the first reported case of a woman being denied prenatal care for being unmarried in the state of Tennessee – but it will likely continue to happen more frequently.

The states with the _least amount of women_ in state government almost all have abortion bans and other laws that limit women’s access to healthcare. Tennessee is one of those states. While 3.5 million women live in Tennessee, _women make up only 17% of the state’s government._

The legislator who sponsored this bill, Representative Bryan Terry, said he believed the law would help Tennessee recruit and retain physicians (???!!). In reality, the state has actually seen a _decline_ in OB-GYNs across the state since Tennessee’s total abortion ban went into effect. Tennessee has the highest maternal mortality rate in the country and ranks among the worst for infant mortality.

[**At Her Bold Move, we believe this is a _solvable_ problem. We’re working to chip away at the male supermajorities in state governments across America by electing more women to the halls of power. We believe women lawmakers will be our best defense against dangerous and sexist policies. Rush $25 to support our work and help us elect more women ASAP. **](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111984342/559039464/2022509128?refcode=EM_F_250723Unwed_N_JZ_90DO_10_NG_N_L2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJlOWI4N2M5LWQ3NjctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SdYI4DVcM_Uu8s3TFW4SYHVJ8WAmG1tHlbshwTnN_hk=)

For ALL women,

Ileana Paules Bronet
Her Bold Move
---
| | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for political office in America. As dangerous laws about women get passed in states with the lowest numbers of women in government (11%, 12%....), we're BREAKING the male supermajorities across those states.

Because men shouldn't be making laws about women's bodies.

**Support this important work with a contribution today!** [DONATE!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111984343/559039465/2022509128?refcode=EM_F_250723Unwed_N_JZ_90DO_10_NG_N_biobox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJlOWI4N2M5LWQ3NjctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SdYI4DVcM_Uu8s3TFW4SYHVJ8WAmG1tHlbshwTnN_hk=)

name: Rhena Hicks
subject: We’re Going LIVE on Fridays!
body:
This summer, we’ve been working to connect to Virginians, and we’ve found a fun way to do it!
| | |
---
| |
---
| We're Going LIVE on Fridays!
---
| Friends-
This summer, we've been working to connect to Virginians, and we've found a fun way to do it! We've been going live on Tiktok on Fridays (this Friday at 10am!) and answering YOUR questions collected from Instagram and Tiktok. We're having the best time seeing your comments and questions and getting to know you all a little better. Want to get involved? Go to our socials or reply to this email and ask a question!
Not everyone likes social media, but there are other ways to contribute and get involved! [Sharing your story](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hvtEDEIaGDqClcQwYrJE4HFV1zwIdQDayLy0JNWebUnE98T0758X1t_iQ_0r_hXOkxu-k6SXDqObr6s4YVHDh7Z_37QQkFVgnejTlUfla1-bgm2hxl-rf0ZaeGt_FGeFPHxkNaCf33lTYhtz0fyO_ogNYAs-Gb0zwvnPJ-BE4BqFjtbDFm-LOY1ZdMcz0uJx3HvYyMyBqZjy7pu6OeQDC5c2KPFemoiGXJ5hq1rlmcQJ-UV5IR69IcN8FlYg7p1Jf5VZ5xF596HeAxs28IZE8fQbSQAs3x9fceciNMiYr80=&c=BWKDNM64ZJNgLwL9gTkj7WTNLBaLMvI6pxvJaTktLw0nBmJfW48p3w==&ch=SyOH7qlIA7URJDrRmBcSyKZJSVyBCgmqpHAL_MKP1PbBiBft5WZ1-Q==) allows us to spread the word about affordability, as we share these stories with legislators and the public, showing how Virginians are affected daily by affordability issues and the cost of living crisis. Or, you can contribute to our ActBlue; [chipping in $5 today will make a huge impact in the fight for an affordable Virginia](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hvtEDEIaGDqClcQwYrJE4HFV1zwIdQDayLy0JNWebUnE98T0758X1r2BFi4RPG9UHd8s1S8kjY-KuUkyV68X1-Ke8LNKAnw75ZaI4Gv3ReFE4suR6l-MMNg5Fi7_5Xg4Nvn2pkPKuGgz7_cGXihnfaZERm1GPNkfVYg-tISQFF39MdYlrxw1JkAJ1MP4LOD8V-vnxwbDK4clOPUBbr6cX3-jIr8QHlf1&c=BWKDNM64ZJNgLwL9gTkj7WTNLBaLMvI6pxvJaTktLw0nBmJfW48p3w==&ch=SyOH7qlIA7URJDrRmBcSyKZJSVyBCgmqpHAL_MKP1PbBiBft5WZ1-Q==).

Or, you can contribute to our ActBlue; ==. | | == | Whether you share your story, join us on socials, or contribute, your actions make a huge impact. Check out our social media and == to stay up to date on the work being done for affordability in our Commonwealth. | == == == | We'll see you Friday! Rhena Hicks Co-Executive Director | | | | Freedom Virginia | P.O. Box 10102 | Norfolk, VA 23513 US | | | | | | |

name: Haley Stevens
subject: Help me fight for public broadcasting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Sesame Street isn't a threat to America

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=408%2E49239%2EH7zxqk)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/3934?t=2&akid=408%2E49239%2EH7zxqk)
---
Hi, null, it’s Haley Stevens.
I wish this were a joke – but it’s not: **Republicans just voted to eliminate every dollar of federal funding for _PBS_ and _NPR_.**
This would affect programs like:
* _PBS NewsHour_
* _Morning Edition_
* _Sesame Street_

As well as the local emergency alerts that can be a lifeline for rural families.
Apparently, Trump’s definition of “radical woke propaganda” now includes Elmo. Cool.
Let’s be clear: **This isn’t about budgets or Big Bird. It’s about power.** It’s about silencing independent journalism. It’s about gutting public education. And it’s about pushing a right-wing agenda that hurts working families so the rich can get richer.
I’m standing up to Trump’s chaos agenda and fighting to protect _NPR_ , _PBS_ , and every station that brings reliable information to Michigan communities.
**[But I need you with me, null: I’m launching a grassroots petition in support of public broadcasting – and we need 20,000 signatures before Trump signs this bill. Will you add your name right now to help stop Trump’s assault on _NPR_ and _PBS_?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/3931?t=3&akid=408%2E49239%2EH7zxqk)**
| | [Add Your Name](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/3931?t=4&akid=408%2E49239%2EH7zxqk)
---
Thank you for standing up for a free press, public education, and working families.
With grit and gratitude,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/3980?t=5&akid=408%2E49239%2EH7zxqk) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/3934?t=6&akid=408%2E49239%2EH7zxqk)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

body:
I’m writing today because America is in deep trouble, and I wanted to see if you could help us fight back.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e312399/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvcHBLZGhQVERhbQ/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA3MjM/LbmNsbDRydVEzcA/qP2hpZHM9bmNQRXF1QjlrdVA0b1lscw/gaID-yw/s4s6d5b25cd)
| | | Hello, Patriot,**** this is Ann Coulter!
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.-yw/s3m98a4f6e9)
---
**[I’m writing today because America is in deep trouble, and I wanted to see if you could help us fight back.](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.-yw/scv19c8212a)**

Whatever your politics, you should be alarmed by the radical left’s assault on students across the country.

**Every ludicrous fad has bubbled up from the schools:** – Explicit pornography in school libraries, – The attack on pronouns (pronouns!), – Propagandizing anti-white and anti-Western hate – The preposterous term, “Latinx,” – Affirmative action in school discipline, and last but not least ... – The poisoning and mutilating of children.

And guess what? Test scores are plummeting nationwide, as school officials claim that MATH and MERIT are “racist systems.” Who could have seen that coming? Patriot, none of this is happening by accident. The left has waged a multigenerational war to infiltrate the schools and control what America’s children are taught.

But I’ve got great news! Now there’s a way for patriots like you and me to fight back. **Allow me to introduce you to the 1776 Project PAC:** This Political Action Committee was founded by my friend Ryan Girdusky to counteract what the left has been doing for decades by getting involved in local school board elections.

_**Take it from me: Ryan’s team at the 1776 Project PAC is the best there is.**_

**Since the 1776 PAC was founded over 3 years ago, they’ve:** ✅ Liberated MILLIONS of students from left wing leadership in their local school boards. ✅ WON over 270 VICTORIES across the country. ✅ Created a plan to more than triple their impact with HUNDREDS of new, conservative school board candidates in 2024 and 2025. No other organization is doing what Ryan Girdusky and the 1776 Project PAC are doing.

[**Will you join me in supporting the 1776 Project PAC today with a donation of $17.76 -- or more!**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.-yw/s7j3528e133)

Sincerely, Ann Coulter

name: New Dems Team
subject: The America we believe in is at stake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
Here’s why this moment matters so much

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111985384/559042822/-2140435400?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2FhNmIyNy1kYTY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=txwNoG_4nS3ZL2lfde58bJDI122jqBfZwtbpKQB27x8=)
---
We’re emailing to ask you for $1 to help New Dems flip the House in 2026. Let us explain why.

**Donald Trump and House Republicans are trying to destroy everything that is great about our nation, and the American people are paying the price:**

**Ensuring _everyone has a fair_ shot to succeed.** Trump fired more than 1,000 Education Department employees, a backdoor attempt to gut public education.

**Making sure _every_ voice is heard.** Their pushing to privatize the USPS, threatening the ability of seniors, rural voters, and our troops to cast their ballots.

**They’re eroding democratic norms.** Trump is attacking political opponents, bypassing Congress, and openly discussing a third term in defiance of the Constitution.

**This isn’t just politics,_it’s a question of who we are as a country._**

New Dems believe in a better path forward: one rooted in respect, opportunity, and results. We’re fighting for common-sense policies that lift working families and protect our democracy.

**[But flipping the House in 2026 will take a massive grassroots effort, and even $1 makes a real difference in these early stages. Donald Trump and House Republicans are trying to destroy everything that is great about our nation, and the American people are paying the price: Ensuring everyone has a fair shot to succeed. Their pushing to privatize the USPS, threatening the ability of seniors, rural voters, and our troops to cast their ballots. They’re eroding democratic norms. name: Mark Kelly
subject: My take on the Senate special elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi, DSCC Vice Chair Mark Kelly here. I want to talk to you about a _key_ opportunity in front of us as we fight for the Senate majority: **special elections.**

I know a thing or two about these kinds of races, because I got to the Senate by _winning_ a special election back in 2020 — even as Republicans spent over $70 million to stop me. **And my victory proved mission-critical, because without it, Democrats wouldn't have had a Senate majority.**

[**Now, history could repeat itself. Two special elections coming up in Ohio and Florida are among a small handful of races that could decide the majority — again. So I'm coming to ask you, will you donate $5 to win races like those and take back the Senate? >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21844?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250723-MarkKelly-KellySpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250723-MarkKelly-KellySpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&akid=20813%2E9716520%2ECRlKLm)

| | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/21844?amount=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250723-MarkKelly-KellySpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250723-MarkKelly-KellySpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&akid=20813%2E9716520%2ECRlKLm)
---

I want to be clear, team: **These special elections give us an opportunity we would have waited YEARS for without them, and they make a BIG difference.**

In fact, during Donald Trump's first term, Democrats flipped **_three_** Senate seats in special elections, including mine, my good friend Raphael Warnock's, and even a seat in dark-red Alabama. Each time, we defeated Trump-endorsed candidates who would have been guaranteed votes for his destructive agenda, and instead we elected Democrats who fought for hardworking Americans.

**Now, we're facing the same task again — but it won't be easy.** Trump is reportedly "obsessed" with the midterms, National Republicans will spend big-time to keep their majority, and just like when I first won, Democrats only need to flip a handful of seats to take back the Senate.

**Take it from someone who's been in this position before: We'll need your help to make the most of this opportunity — and that's why I'm reaching out.**

**[As a DSCC Vice Chair, I'm personally asking: Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can to help Democrats win in states like Ohio and Florida and take back the Senate? We have a real opportunity to topple Trump's majority, and we can't let it slip away >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21844?amount=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250723-MarkKelly-KellySpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250723-MarkKelly-KellySpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&akid=20813%2E9716520%2ECRlKLm)**

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

| [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/21844?amount=5&t=10&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250723-MarkKelly-KellySpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250723-MarkKelly-KellySpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&akid=20813%2E9716520%2ECRlKLm)

Mark Kelly
Vice Chair, DSCC

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/21844?amount=5&t=15&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250723-MarkKelly-KellySpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250723-MarkKelly-KellySpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&akid=20813%2E9716520%2ECRlKLm)

Former U.S. Navy combat pilot, engineer, and NASA astronaut Mark Kelly is a senator from Arizona and a Vice Chair of the DSCC. He's fighting to lower costs for Arizonans, hold Trump accountable, and create good-paying jobs.

**[Will you answer Mark Kelly's call to fight back against National Republicans by flipping the Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/21844?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250723-MarkKelly-KellySpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250723-MarkKelly-KellySpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&akid=20813%2E9716520%2ECRlKLm)**

body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.41.25%E2%80%AFAM.png]
The other night I was driving home through Orlando, and the sky just opened up . Rain so heavy I had to pull over. Friend, all I could think about was the families I’d just spoken with, folks who told me they’re too afraid to call 911.
ICE raids. Language barriers. Broken trust. What happens when the next big storm hits, and half our state is scared to even ask for help?
Meanwhile, MAGA debates getting rid of our main form of disaster relief altogether:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/365536353177394B4C6E6436496965554A4E76573255593564793954327649625978556B6B4938704D6459305049384E454C365443376F707243425862455A63/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-07-23%20at%2011.14.46%E2%80%AFAM.png]
This is the result of leaders who criminalize communities instead of supporting them. We need someone in Washington who prepares people, not punishes them. Who builds emergency systems based on trust.
I am running for U.S. Senate because I believe in putting lives over profit.
And if you believe in that too, I simply ask for your support today via a donation:
Pitch in here and power a campaign that puts people first, $15 is all it takes. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
Express Donate: $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
Express Donate: $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
Express Donate: $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]
We deserve leadership that shows up before the storm, not just after craving headlines and offering handshakes.
Thank you in advance,
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.05.04%E2%80%AFAM.png]

Jacksonville, FL 32207

body:
The poll also found that Ciattarelli’s false attacks are working
Peter, another poll just came out showing Mikie with a razor-thin lead over right-wing extremist Jack Ciattarelli heading into November’s election:
**🔵 Sherrill 47%**
**🔴 Ciattarelli 42%**
_Undecided/Other 11%_
—KA Consulting Survey of Registered New Jersey Voters
The same poll also found that when people hear the lies that Ciattarelli is spreading about Mikie’s record, undecided voters break _heavily_ in Ciattarelli’s direction — in fact, he pulls _ahead_ of Mikie in the contest.
**Peter, as we write this, Ciattarelli’s super PAC is spending over a million dollars to spread those lies across New Jersey in one attack ad after another — and this poll is a blaring warning sign that we can’t let these attacks go unanswered.**

Tim Scott, Tom Cotton, Ted Cruz, and Kellyanne Conway have already contacted you to sound the alarm--and they are wondering why you haven't checked in yet. This isn't just a formality. It's how we make sure our team is ready to show up, stand strong and win. Let's finish what we started -- and show the Left we mean business. -- Senate Republican Voter Verification Committee If you want to help Republicans KEEP THE SENATE MAJORITY, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. Text "STOP" to opt-out. | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
