name: John Padora
subject: Democrats aren’t fighting for us anymore
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
| | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/s/c/QNb_P0po-q37S1zlMHRV2rrnuIaot4JmbsTQkX8qipa3F1CcXardYqg7_xAJyRJnFWIOGv8JqpxNI6ab-ua69Xs8QojZq2WiYg6L8bA102sxQZ-TmVII3W_ox9JEFf3ADfx1xEsZNoWEJc4b1Lk3dKuhGYejemItGaqkqWlRvFxadNAjkSpvSSL5vj6aWQwxzaFFi94xhC2tp_WEnErN0MxsOfTF6Hl4oyEpfECwuI5azdwOfE3kvgnxd3xnO0nSXvs8_b66ebYWVvNwiyjVJwj01IhHXvbZm8qYzLUgVA-8a9YSuwDB015xeEetT4jLY05qKTCU4CpOUC4XT-_1WEdCAQLRX-QxqXxyUOwJ266xXHn06CAjlNH3i1z7s-StQwrpjHFLbNPHfUHRJ25PN5DEwEX9yyRvQvFNZKQdaypAe4pTd7NjW4uHHn3tpao8QX3VnhjnwBy9CrQlFkqh0wUezleMNl4K3WGffWKPjkdtnWoibp8FzJSmFpFBlT_oAXgb1HKaeb-s4h7vOKWsk4lvQqOpD_27JOj_2igual-9EaXtlQVj3GCeU8upiXpIZxuxrqugvBpDH4CdqsSi4hRJTAkejG76XSKwDK-ZOwgJiznXsu-4ZJLg0POh4FaUCkXyAVxJseOzaD7vQF9sK7lctNF_WpRxQoKaPhPh1ynntBMxOK37xLHO_DxFmyg9PDAI2jUOhlXm8AB53L-bQMv4V1Vm2AhtDNoqEpY11beXGayzQamaA75bHY45o6OEOxQPCQtDo4Rkf7N7e5TkWjnm6vKequcXXbhe2FHqf738uD5nRwY5wmM5WjPybaK_zX5qaZ-WPbbt0dzRafcTNbvUF8G8JFH3dR1xEOUnk-nuYPTVNu6wnAcQnGz24rEMyiG5YyalvlWEXbQz9g/1853K2qPFSFnM0JS5m3wv6i9Dk-jabgN/11) Friend, Everywhere I go — from Windsor to Loveland, Larkspur to Parker — I hear the same thing: **“The Democratic Party isn’t fighting for us anymore.”** Not from Republicans — but from lifelong Democrats. Working families. Veterans. Small business owners. People who want a better future, but are tired of waiting on a party that’s lost its backbone. And they’re right. Washington Democrats are stuck in the past. They say the right things, but they cave to Wall Street, fund endless wars, and let working people drown in medical debt, student loans, and rising costs. I didn’t jump into this race to “be a good Democrat.” I’m running because we deserve better. I’m not a polished insider or a party puppet. I’m a working dad. A manufacturing engineer. A guy who clawed his way out of opioid addiction and knows what it’s like to struggle. I’ve lived it — and I’m running to fight like hell for families like mine. **[But I can’t do this alone. I’m going up against D.C. money, military contractors, and party elites who don’t want someone like me in this race. If you’re ready to shake up this broken system, chip in now and let’s send a message:](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/s/c/baUvoszdrSmtsTCp1nQ7cHQnPP0ZT72RMFWNtHyZTCLPqFfqqQA8G2EgSsDuetZBDIHT59yGr3Ft0lhCfdC3A3ZeWidLPlftlxI9Dtg9MIbv7I1gCGsAEacU6AHtH1LbBtktkqE7h63grdXjklaZpqW389mo0HiKwf5G2-4a_DCE8hWEiThfI8atZyEXZcJDO46TLO3XeRREGnzYqPffney9LToebJJs9jwUeE8FrTo-FT83iUoFgHT7hMhuqRZplJlZ4o1tRrM1EsAqJfyfi9dCbF8Q68tSvWIm-Rv10fvG729MPH5-5QXRxmIGtMLEiu59O-_yQBL5Tzd520uqP0B4PNa0oPe-9-84yFcZRpsTALVbXxMbQe68Yq1ayEiKQxLfWC7-RbogutAAfjFPcHKZaFWHCNuQAxyD3C6vAuFoyr9iw9HI6EwZGI-N8aMA386Nl1__VFom4cn_MfWTX2mkfAXz5VVG-ZGpljFLelc2SVcbXm8MDt4lk35Gk73AeIj-VsJKytt2r61WBy0A_mDlGGZaZeLHqiQLM-LVupVLbdkGxe6R5xemq9jsVGxrY_RwwaJ6N2C0H9_2LkX55AWgQtfabGJ0-lejnIpVQptnshY_X7UctKrKb5NQ8ubhERCMZ00ncv9XeJ8ieomzqWoZWdgZugTUUfn7uUcxkYrX0WSU369cv_pNTyvkAb-putXc6l2a-OoUPBYfyKjH5zdUKHx9AqOwCoPYeAFN_jfh2-4TN4dkMHNFSJoYHW-QpqMj4WPd97Le3ToXgmBzfas3AGrIRIFtiOJM4fH4hKO4ppLEU6KAw95C1c9SYioczUMR73ou7TZHdpOmgrYdFc5G_6h63zPzrN5r2sGjdI5aF36fgKgidMThYx5pzuFDF7zT8iyRKS4s0AEMJQ/Pz-lIhLScg-y-8k7kLi_6NDOcCq9sUfK/11)** clean_body: | | | Friend, Everywhere I go — from Windsor to Loveland, Larkspur to Parker — I hear the same thing: “The Democratic Party isn’t fighting for us anymore.” Not from Republicans — but from lifelong Democrats. Working families. Veterans. Small business owners. People who want a better future, but are tired of waiting on a party that’s lost its backbone. And they’re right. Washington Democrats are stuck in the past. They say the right things, but they cave to Wall Street, fund endless wars, and let working people drown in medical debt, student loans, and rising costs. I didn’t jump into this race to “be a good Democrat.” I’m running because we deserve better. I’m not a polished insider or a party puppet. I’m a working dad. A manufacturing engineer. A guy who clawed his way out of opioid addiction and knows what it’s like to struggle. I’ve lived it — and I’m running to fight like hell for families like mine. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: I’m not here to play nice. I’m here to fight — and to win. In solidarity, John Padora Working Dad. Manufacturing Engineer. Democratic Candidate for Congress, CO-04 John Padora is a manufacturing engineer and candidate for Congress in Colorado’s 4th District. He’s running to bring commonsense leadership to Eastern Colorado—fighting for farmers, working families, and real solutions, not political theater. Paid for by Padora for Colorado

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Big talk from small men
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
“Denaturalize and Deport.” Those are the words of Florida Attorney General James Uthmeier.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1727%2E791427%2EN1rgLe)

**[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-july25.Ih7rVK&efcode=em250723-1-subs&t=2&akid=1727%2E791427%2EN1rgLe)
“Denaturalize and Deport.” — Republican Florida Attorney General James Uthmeier.
These guys are just pathetic.
MAGA has taken control of all three branches of government, and in six months we’ve seen violations of constitutional rights, the defunding of services that Americans rely on, and all kinds of human rights abuses by ICE.
But it’s not enough that they are forcefully carrying out their agenda — they’re willing to go full authoritarian to stop anyone from even criticizing them, too.
That’s why a fellow member of the House, a Senator, and now an Attorney General have all threatened me with deportation. They see that I’m leading the charge against their unpopular agenda, and they want to silence and intimidate me.
So, I have the same response for Mr. Uthmeier that I had for Rep. Gill:
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-july25.Ih7rVK&efcode=em250723-1-subs&t=3&akid=1727%2E791427%2EN1rgLe)
I dare them all to try and denaturalize and deport me. Because they’ll have to go through me and the millions of people in this movement who believe in the rule of law and are committed to protecting our democracy from fascists like Trump and his GOP allies.
Until then, it’s just big talk from small men.
**[Friend — Help me show that we will not back down in the face of the far-right and their extremist anti-immigrant, anti-democracy agenda. Make a contribution of $5 or whatever you can afford today.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-july25.Ih7rVK&efcode=em250723-1-subs&t=4&akid=1727%2E791427%2EN1rgLe)

body:
I'm asking you as a Christian, a Marine, and a mother

[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/3AjjprXru3uD1RyOW-lmWA~~/AARclBA~/piihOYv8ny-5t9uytxQmE1v-MwNYHXP1I8FyxzbFJDUQoSTU9j8H0Q_EBAwbKrHSVWW14e99TeTj5eojk2lt6xpqaOGVj4BFkiTeiFM89wyvuVUlI_mDha7wVC3pNRbYJxPEqGljUqIythfvNovdLADe33UfKYOiZSFfuLgPNMeYGb-N3Im-fGXG0z9Ff5qIoMJDqaBsTUOqdUNzyydhRAeiC-IT_pyMyIt9Rxym0XCeqRNaHJFT0C1zwKIemeNwMTlFRgT85qfZCpuHS2uP-1bbVJ0s3D8XOcPbaW-LPpyekzA6qyucjQD0_ezpJ0SkPz1h2tZJ6Yl1TlCT-5tMeTf0BMJuHCFGTCviz2lI1gEwIrIaZ3T0Oc_Wxs7Lk5nmHmlWuj6RAcfaEwLSNZHRpg~~) Friend -
This is my final message to you before time expires. Knowing that, will you please read every word carefully?
Thanks for opening this email! I wouldn't be reaching out like this if my situation weren't truly dire. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbt2jv40l7pi8m6nk7r0dqn19mbo71n1grtbeq00_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cpg60o74c5h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zr6g8vk5t6m7lfep4j7m7bie1e9im0bhap2vkcno_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cpg60o74c5h2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zc1ijq34bqpli8oct85v00fmautoasnsbri6g15o_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cpg60o74c5h2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z86aqe1n8t4lrrvg9hl1fko45vllqgjudqqngd1g_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cpg60o74c5h2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztdal3t6lr86nsiscti7qgan92ruacjqeeauruu8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cpg60o74c5h2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.

Sincerely,

clean_body: Please – for the sake of all our families | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue’s Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. Introducing: Iggy and Mr. Kirk.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at Brave Books.If you’ve seen me and Brave Books on Fox News , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television. > Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter. The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of Iggy and Mr. Kirk! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced the parents watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now Brave Books has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with. #1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left. You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. As our special “Thank You” for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD.This exclusive Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. subject: Disbar Attorney General Bondi
body:
| | | | |

| | |
# [Disbar Bondi and don't ever let her practice law again](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbf86744b-4c37-45da-ba77-290af9aa6cf3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta44ad77d-01e7-4362-86bf-c604978e40da/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | There are about a million reasons why Pam Bondi has proven herself to be possibly the worst attorney general in our nation's history. She has weaponized the department of justice to go after political opponents. She has pursued wildly inappropriate cases, blindly accepting absurd allegations Trump crapped out of his demented mind. And now it appears she may be pushing Trump's most absurd idea yet -- treason charges against former President Obama. **[Enough of this crap. It's time to fire her, disbar her, and make sure she never practices law again. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1a2d4d1f-703f-4c3c-a322-d6f2ac21a585/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** The job of the attorney general is to act as the nation's top legal official, to advise the president on legal matters, and when necessary, to push back on harebrained ideas that violate the law. But Bondi has not been defending the law, she has been aiding and abetting Trump's dismantling of it. And there is no way in hell she should continue to have any authorization whatsoever to practice it. **[Add your name: Disbar Bondi and don't ever let her practice law again.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T222e13b3-cb17-423c-91f2-bafd3e9a61f1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

subject: Republicans had two chances. They chose silence.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont**
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111990037/559056916/-785282667?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250723_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzEyZmJlMC1lMDY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7yr-Je2JATyyh7Gk3Fb8048m6UMF2D8Er5p25lKrT5s=)

Peter — Last week, Congress had two chances to release the Epstein files. Twice. And Republicans blocked it. Now, Speaker Mike Johnson is even adjourning the House for summer recess early — all to avoid voting on our amendments to release the files. **Let me say that again: the very same Republicans who built their careers fanning the flames of conspiracy theories, who screamed about Epstein, who whipped up their base with _“Where’s the list?!”_ — had the power to act.** And when the moment came to act? They looked at their shoes. They won’t make eye contact. _They know they’re wrong._ What’s worse? Their silence isn’t just cowardice — it’s contempt. For their voters, for the truth, and for the people who deserve answers. I ran for Congress because I believe deeply in transparency, in accountability, and in the power of public trust. That trust is eroding — not because people are asking too much, but because they’re being given too little. I’m not afraid to ask tough questions. I’m not afraid to demand answers. And I will _never_ treat the people I represent with anything less than respect. We deserve better.** [And if you agree, I hope you’ll chip in today to support this work:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111990038/559056917/-1695230582?amount=5&refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250723_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzEyZmJlMC1lMDY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7yr-Je2JATyyh7Gk3Fb8048m6UMF2D8Er5p25lKrT5s=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111990039/559056918/-1695230582?express_lane=true&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250723_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzEyZmJlMC1lMDY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7yr-Je2JATyyh7Gk3Fb8048m6UMF2D8Er5p25lKrT5s=)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta528ebcf-5ba0-4f75-bfb7-48f8104e7445/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

subject: My response to the recent news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc
body:
Dozens of Democrats voted to impeach me, and I can’t believe it happened again. Will you make a small sacrifice to help me and MAGA?
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11618998/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvdXlaNTZINERxMg/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MjM/LbmNsM0VYSVF5Vw/qP2hpZHM9bmNhb0JTZ2JQVHZSOTBscw/gaIEOBA/sclf88b5ab2)

**They don’t like you, and they HATE TRUMP.**

clean_body: The Deep State tried to destroy Trump, and we finally have proof. Peter , This isn 't a theory. This isn't a rumor. This is a verified DEEP STATE COUP -- Tulsi Gabbard just went public with what we've suspected all along: 🚨 The Russiagate Hoax was NEVER about national security. It was about one thing-- Let me walk you through it: 👉 U.S. intel agencies said Russia had NO impact on our 2016 election. 👉 But after Trump's historic win, 👉 They used the Clinton-funded Steele Dossier--a proven FRAUD. 👉 They leaked lies to the press. They buried intel reports. This was a direct assault on our democracy. Not from a foreign country, but from the very people who swore to protect it. Now, as a member of the House Oversight Committee, I need to know: 🔻 Should we open a full investigation into this treasonous abuse of power? 🔻 Should every Deep State official be subpoenaed--including Obama, Clapper, Comey, and Brennan? 🔻 Do you support exposing EVERY last detail? Take my 1-Minute Russiagate Justice Poll Patriot, the Left mocked us for years. They called us conspiracy theorists while they carried out an ACTUAL conspiracy behind closed doors. We can't let this stand. I'm doing everything I can to hold the line. If we lose even a few seats, the investigations stop, and the cover-ups begin again. name: Mesoscale News with Rebekah Jones
subject: UN: Failing to act on climate change is a violation of international law
body:
The long and much-anticipated International Court of Justice (ICJ) opinion on climate change today ruled that a "clean, healthy and sustainable environment" is a human right.

---

The long and much-anticipated International Court of Justice (ICJ) opinion on climate change [today ruled ](https://substack.com/redirect/eceab805-f101-4827-9c01-3ee0b9982d4c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)that a "clean, healthy and sustainable environment" is a human right.
That paves the way for other legal actions, including states returning to the ICJ to hold each other accountable for causing climate change, as well as domestic lawsuits, along with legal instruments like investment agreements.
The opinion was unanimous -- marking only the fifth time in the UN's 88-year history that a unanimous decision was made.
_[You can read the formal press release outlining the opinion here.](https://substack.com/redirect/e8640da2-1019-432d-8a48-6953a043ceaa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_
Island nations at critical risk of being washed away by the rising seas formally requested an advisory opinion on the issue more than two years ago...

name: Yadira Caraveo
subject: children are afraid
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ycfcemail [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ycfcemail]
Peter,
Immigration reform will only work when it is done with civility, humanity, and reason. Trump's raids don’t just target undocumented individuals, they are traumatizing entire communities. Children are afraid that their parents could be taken at any moment. People are hesitant to report crimes and seek medical help out of fear of our law enforcement.
Taxpayer dollars should go towards humane border solutions, not militarized raids that serve more as political theater than anything else.
I’m running for re-election because our communities deserve to feel safe. As the daughter of immigrants I can only imagine what children are feeling when they see this stuff on the news.
I’m ready to fight, but first I need to win. Can I count on your support? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ycfcemail]

Yadira

subject: Wes, personally, will read your response
body:
As Wes builds his priorities for 2026, he wants to hear from you.

Hey Peter,
We’ll keep this quick. Wes just has _one_ question for **you.**
Wes served our country in the U.S. Army. Now, he’s serving Maryland as Governor, making sure we Leave No One Behind.

**[Tell Wes: What do you want our team to accomplish for Marylanders?](https://act.wesmoore.com/survey/share-your-thoughts-wes/?source=em-20250723-1&akid=347%2E1086043%2E9qLwsU)**

| | Friend, I’m honored to share some big news! **Former Nevada State Senator Elizabeth Helgelien** has officially endorsed our campaign for Congress in Nevada’s 4th District Here is what she said: **“I’m proud to endorse David Flippo for Congress in Nevada’s 4th District
Dave is a battle-tested conservative and a proven leader who has served our country with honor
He is exactly the kind of America First fighter we need to help President Trump finish the job by securing the border, rebuilding the economy, and taking on the D.C. swamp
Nevada deserves his leadership.”**
---
|

| Elizabeth has seen what it takes to lead in Nevada. I am grateful for her trust and support. This is a clear sign that our campaign is gaining momentum with voters who want proven leadership and real results But we still have work to do. We need to reach more voters, expand our team, and keep the pressure on Together, we will take back Nevada’s 4th and deliver results for the people

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: The GOP wants us to zone out. Let’s show them what we’re made of.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111991959/559063707/896231865?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZThkMzI3My1lNTY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hBMmB4rzEg2caORD2J8xHnyVmCxhjsdOToRROxm1reA=)
Peter, I have to be honest, it's hard asking for your support at a time like this. For one thing, it’s the _middle of summer._ If you’re not locked in on the daily goings on Capitol Hill, or reading Politico, it’s very easy to want to check out for a bit altogether for a nice vacation. For another thing, the House is frozen in place: Mike Johnson is cancelling votes, recessing the House of Representatives for a month because he doesn’t want the GOP to vote on releasing the Epstein Files – because we all have a good idea what’s in there. But, Peter, it’s how we operate during the slower times that dictate what we can do when we have our best chance for major change. We can't just sit around and hope things eventually work out in our favor – not with the future of working folks in IL-17 at stake. **Trump and his allies want nothing more than catching us in a lull, and hoping we’ll forget this moment in time by next year – after they’ve kicked millions off of healthcare and food assistance programs, and while denying due process for a conspiracy _they_ heated up. ** That’s why just last week, national Republicans started attacks against me in their bid to hand my House seat to a Trump acolyte. I'm hoping to send a message of resilience by raising $20,000 before the end of July to show them we won’t be caught sleeping, and nullify their attacks. That’s where you come in: [**Please send in an urgent donation of $3 today. With everything going on, it’s not about how much you give. clean_body: | = Peter, I have to be honest, it's hard asking for your support at a time like this. For one thing, it’s the middle of summer. If you’re not locked in on the daily goings on Capitol Hill, or reading Politico, it’s very easy to want to check out for a bit altogether for a nice vacation. For another thing, the House is frozen in place: Mike Johnson is cancelling votes, recessing the House of Representatives for a month because he doesn’t want the GOP to vote on releasing the Epstein Files – because we all have a good idea what’s in there. But, Peter, it’s how we operate during the slower times that dictate what we can do when we have our best chance for major change. We can't just sit around and hope things eventually work out in our favor – not with the future of working folks in IL-17 at stake. Trump and his allies want nothing more than catching us in a lull, and hoping we’ll forget this moment in time by next year – after they’ve kicked millions off of healthcare and food assistance programs, and while denying due process for a conspiracy they heated up. That’s why just last week, national Republicans started attacks against me in their bid to hand my House seat to a Trump acolyte. I'm hoping to send a message of resilience by raising $20,000 before the end of July to show them we won’t be caught sleeping, and nullify their attacks. name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: UPDATE: Justice Department Supports Judicial Watch in Illinois Voter Roll Clean Up Lawsuit!
body:
Judicial Watch announced that the U.S. Department of Justice filed
a statement of interest in a Judicial Watch lawsuit that that
seeks to force the clean-up of Illinois’ election rolls as federal
law requires (Judicial Watch, Inc., et al. v. Illinois State Board of
Elections, et al. (No. 1:24-cv-01867)). U.S. District Court Judge
Sara L. Ellis set a hearing in the case for next week.

body:
Why we must criminally investigate Big Oil for knowingly causing climate change

* * *
# [When Corporations Kill, It's Not an Accident](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=169048302&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY5MDQ4MzAyLCJpYXQiOjE3NTMyOTAyMTQsImV4cCI6MTc1NTg4MjIxNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.uPTuyF_wttD875CksIunUr4_IynY4wmYzpapwYA2JIE)
### Why we must criminally investigate Big Oil for knowingly causing climate change
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Jul 23
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=169048302&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY5MDQ4MzAyLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1MzI5MDIxNCwiZXhwIjoxNzU1ODgyMjE0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.54aDn0OMZurG6Z4fQ0VVc6cfNBs8PjfOrewHXPI8c4c&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=169048302&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY5MDQ4MzAyLCJpYXQiOjE3NTMyOTAyMTQsImV4cCI6MTc1NTg4MjIxNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.uPTuyF_wttD875CksIunUr4_IynY4wmYzpapwYA2JIE&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=169048302&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY5MDQ4MzAyLCJpYXQiOjE3NTMyOTAyMTQsImV4cCI6MTc1NTg4MjIxNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.uPTuyF_wttD875CksIunUr4_IynY4wmYzpapwYA2JIE)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvcWFzaW1yYXNoaWQvcC93aGVuLWNvcnBvcmF0aW9ucy1raWxsLWl0cy1ub3QtYW4_.APy6ykrqm0NRbM7E_KiYERrdnTOo9gO119QCyOst-1c?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/when-corporations-kill-its-not-an?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=169048302&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY5MDQ4MzAyLCJpYXQiOjE3NTMyOTAyMTQsImV4cCI6MTc1NTg4MjIxNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.uPTuyF_wttD875CksIunUr4_IynY4wmYzpapwYA2JIE)
This summer, we have watched the horror of our children drowning in Texas floods. We saw our elderly neighbors trapped in sweltering apartments during NYC's record-breaking heat waves. Earlier I personally traveled to Los Angeles to provide pro bono legal services to fire victims after wildfires leveled entire communities.
Here's the truth: these are not random acts of nature--but the _foreseeable consequences_ of deliberate corporate greed. And they are killing us. When people knowingly cause harm that results in death or destruction, that's not a policy disagreement, it's a potential crime. So the question is, where is the accountability for these crimes? **Let 's Address This.**
**Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..f6Pm8rrCYY6D23jIkrl_gtiVZKCYGH-okbyo4bx1qso?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=169048302)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0e7d49e3-02bf-45e8-95f0-bb3cb3194754?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Extinction Rebellion stages a funeral precession at an ExxonMobil fuel terminal. (Matt Hrkac/Wikipedia)
## **Big Oil knew, and chose death anyway**
In the early 1980s, ExxonMobil's scientists [ran climate models so accurate](https://substack.com/redirect/d5e1f91e-d88f-4b6e-8846-30c243ff7f81?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that they rival today's observations in the 2020s. Internally, executives [called](https://substack.com/redirect/64d5e719-9123-435e-ae79-e2ca39039632?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the consequences of unchecked emissions from the burning of their fossil fuel products "_potentially catastrophic_ " and "_globally disastrous_." They [predicted](https://substack.com/redirect/74676990-976c-4cdd-8ab9-e21cafc02b7b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) "_more violent weather --more storms, more droughts, more deluges_"--the exact extreme weather disasters we are seeing today.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4de93a37-c9f0-4cc2-8fb5-befb7ec6a019?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
But did these fossil fuel mega giants sound the alarm? Or begin to transition to clean energy? Or, at the very least, allow others to take action to resolve this crisis?
No. Instead, [they did the exact opposite](https://substack.com/redirect/dd70112f-e2a2-4ac8-988d-4d1f5cbbb34e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), all for the sake of the almighty dollar.
They _funded disinformation campaigns_. They worked to, as one fossil fuel coalition put it, "_Reposition global warming as theory (not fact)_ ," to inject uncertainty into the public's understanding of climate change. They expanded drilling and burning fossil fuels despite knowing that doing so would kill people. And they worked to conceal these facts, all while preparing their own business operations for the rising seas and increasing storms they knew were coming.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e5973728-39f7-4445-9258-a5539267e77a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
As a human rights lawyer, let me put this plainly: when considering criminal culpability, the law looks for something called _mens rea_ , a latin term which literally translates to "guilty mind." When someone has a _mens rea,_ it means they had "_the intention or knowledge of wrongdoing that constitutes part of a crime_."
When we review what big oil has done the last half century, what else is it but a textbook definition of _mens rea?_ They knew their actions would cause harm, engaged in those actions anyway (while knowingly censoring the truth), and it has resulted in immeasurable loss of life and property. Thus, when the actions of Big Oil demonstrably lead to deadly floods and fatal heatwaves that their own scientists predicted with prophetic accuracy--what else do we call it but _deliberate homicide_?
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..f6Pm8rrCYY6D23jIkrl_gtiVZKCYGH-okbyo4bx1qso?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=169048302)
## **Civil suits are not enough. We need criminal investigations.**
To date, most accountability efforts against fossil fuel companies have been civil lawsuits--states and cities suing for damages, trying to recoup the massive costs of rebuilding from floods, fires, and heat. That's incredibly necessary, but it's also insufficient. Why? Because climate change isn't only causing monetary damages. It's also causing mass death. These are crimes.
That's why leading legal advocates are now calling for something unprecedented: criminal prosecutions. Investigations by Attorneys General. Grand juries convened by District Attorneys. Accountability that matches the scale of the criminal acts. Indeed, if corporations truly are people, when will one stand trial for killing human beings?
Moreover, we already prosecute corporate executives for insider trading. For tax fraud. For dumping toxic waste. So why not prosecute them for knowingly fueling a climate crisis that's killing Americans?
This isn't fantasy--it's sound legal theory. Public Citizen's[ David Arkush](https://substack.com/redirect/7217e95c-9ac0-475d-bd74-7d6fcdd9fabd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) has laid out the legal case in the _Harvard Environmental Law Review_. He testified before the Senate Judiciary Committee just last month and faced strong backlash from the GOP. But Arkush held his ground, and the facts speak for themselves. Watch his powerful testimony below or on [Twitter](https://substack.com/redirect/eafdc273-0a32-4634-bf85-fc338549ea58?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
[](https://substack.com/redirect/4f3f99d6-06ac-4fac-b317-84b64288a05e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
During Arkush's hearing, Ted Cruz (whose campaign is funded by those same destructive fossil fuel corporations) mocked the idea as "whacky moonbeam." And while obviously Cruz is wrong, let's be honest--when has ~~Cancun~~ Ted Cruz ever been on the side of truth anyway?
## How You Can Help Fight For Justice
For longtime subscribers to Let's Address This, you know I do not highlight injustices without also sharing meaningful calls to action to overcome those injustices. Here are three things you can do right now to put pressure on our elected officials to criminally prosecute those responsible for these mass deaths.
1. **Call your State Attorney General and your local District Attorney.** Ask them to open a criminal investigation into the fossil fuel industry's role in climate-related deaths and destruction.
1. Visit this website to find the name and contact of your State Attorney General: https://www.usa.gov/state-attorney-general
2. Here is a sample script to use when emailing or calling them:

_Hello, my name is [Your Name], and I 'm a resident of [Your City/County/State]._
_I 'm calling to ask that your office open a criminal investigation into the fossil fuel industry's role in causing climate-related death and destruction in our communities. For decades, fossil fuel corporations knowingly polluted our planet. Internal documents show they understood the catastrophic consequences of their emissions, yet they chose to lie to the public and lobby against climate action -- all to protect their profits._
_We are now paying the price: deadly heat waves, devastating floods, wildfires, hurricanes, food insecurity, and rising mortality. This is not just negligence -- it's premeditated harm on a mass scale. If any other industry caused this level of destruction with full knowledge of the consequences, they would face prosecution. Fossil fuel executives should not be above the law._
_I'm asking you -- as someone charged with protecting public safety -- to act. Please open a criminal investigation into fossil fuel companies for their role in climate-related deaths and damage. Thank you for your time, and I hope to see your office take bold action in defense of our future._
_[Optional: Leave your contact info for a response.]_

2. **Support the organizations doing this work.** Groups like Public Citizen are leading the legal strategy to combat these injustices. They deserve our support and attention because they are taking the fight to these corrupt corporations devastating our lives and our futures. You can [visit Public Citizen here](https://substack.com/redirect/b9bd7327-659a-48b5-81a9-991d20b01ea5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and sign up for regular updates, calls to action, and ways to donate.
3. **Share this post.** Spread the word: Climate denial wasn't just deception. It may have been criminal. Share this on your social media, in your email and text groups, and with your elected officials. We must fight back against the mass propaganda and disinformation we've been fed for decades. That starts one person at a time.

[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..f6Pm8rrCYY6D23jIkrl_gtiVZKCYGH-okbyo4bx1qso?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=169048302)
## Conclusion
Let's not allow another child to drown or another heat wave to kill low-income seniors before we act. Let's not let our planet burn while billionaires buy bunkers. When corporations knowingly cause harm, they must face consequences. Not just financial settlements that represent a tiny fraction of their ill gotten trillions, but meaningful justice and criminal accountability for the untold death and devastation they've enabled (and yet continue to enable).
Thanks for being part of this community and this movement. Thank you for subscribing to Let's Address This so I can continue to elevate these critical human rights issues. Let's keep speaking the truth, and let's demand accountability that matches the crime.

Why we must criminally investigate Big Oil for knowingly causing climate change | | | Jul 23 | | | | | | | | | | | | This summer, we have watched the horror of our children drowning in Texas floods. We saw our elderly neighbors trapped in sweltering apartments during NYC's record-breaking heat waves. Earlier I personally traveled to Los Angeles to provide pro bono legal services to fire victims after wildfires leveled entire communities. Here's the truth: these are not random acts of nature--but the foreseeable consequences of deliberate corporate greed. And they are killing us. When people knowingly cause harm that results in death or destruction, that's not a policy disagreement, it's a potential crime. So the question is, where is the accountability for these crimes? Let 's Address This. Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. | | ---|---|--- Extinction Rebellion stages a funeral precession at an ExxonMobil fuel terminal. Or begin to transition to clean energy? Or, at the very least, allow others to take action to resolve this crisis? No. Instead, , all for the sake of the almighty dollar. They funded disinformation campaigns. They worked to, as one fossil fuel coalition put it, "Reposition global warming as theory (not fact) ," to inject uncertainty into the public's understanding of climate change. They expanded drilling and burning fossil fuels despite knowing that doing so would kill people. And they worked to conceal these facts, all while preparing their own business operations for the rising seas and increasing storms they knew were coming. | | ---|---|--- As a human rights lawyer, let me put this plainly: when considering criminal culpability, the law looks for something called mens rea , a latin term which literally translates to "guilty mind." When someone has a mens rea, it means they had "the intention or knowledge of wrongdoing that constitutes part of a crime." When we review what big oil has done the last half century, what else is it but a textbook definition of mens rea? They knew their actions would cause harm, engaged in those actions anyway (while knowingly censoring the truth), and it has resulted in immeasurable loss of life and property. body:
Most freshman members of Congress don't do this.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111992662/559066150/2145945666?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.07.23_AZ06Kick_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2NmZDI3My1lNjY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t688XFErEOzwOSeZReMVRxynp_dvVLcrLq-qBXUhitc=&emci=368e319a-a066-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=1ccfd273-e667-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=23483442) | I know it’s not “normal” for a freshman member of Congress to “adopt” a district hundreds of miles away over a year before the election. But these aren’t normal times. I heard from thousands of you, online and offline, that Democrats need to do more. You said loud and clear: “Business as usual” isn’t enough. We need to try something new. That’s why we’re organizing both **INSIDE** Congress to fight the Trump agenda **AND OUTSIDE** to build a blue wave to flip the House. It’s a lot of work, but this team has never backed down from a challenge. [_**If you haven’t had a chance, please read the memo from my team (below) about our adopted swing district, Arizona’s 6th, and our incredible candidate JoAnna Mendoza. Then, split a donation of any amount between Jo's campaign and our grassroots organizing program →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111992664/559066153/1791191835?amount=6&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.07.23_AZ06Kick_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2NmZDI3My1lNjY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t688XFErEOzwOSeZReMVRxynp_dvVLcrLq-qBXUhitc=) [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111992667/559066157/1791191835?amount=6&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.07.23_AZ06Kick_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2NmZDI3My1lNjY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t688XFErEOzwOSeZReMVRxynp_dvVLcrLq-qBXUhitc=) Thank you so much 💙 – Emily
* * *
_**PREVIOUS EMAIL:**_ Peter, **Earlier this year, Emily “adopted” one of the most competitive districts in the country, Arizona’s 6th, also known as AZ-06. ** That means we’re directing our grassroots energy to flip this critical seat ahead of the 2026 elections. We wanted to give you an overview of why this race is so important – and how our combined efforts can turn this district from red to blue.
_**The District**_ AZ-06 encompasses the southeastern corner of Arizona, including all of Greenlee County, and parts of Cochise, Pima, Pinal, and Graham Counties. Most of the District’s population lives in Pima County in the rapidly growing suburbs of Tucson. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111992669/559066166/755184972?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.07.23_AZ06Kick_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2NmZDI3My1lNjY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t688XFErEOzwOSeZReMVRxynp_dvVLcrLq-qBXUhitc=&emci=368e319a-a066-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=1ccfd273-e667-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=23483442) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111992671/559066174/193919884?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.07.23_AZ06Kick_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2NmZDI3My1lNjY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t688XFErEOzwOSeZReMVRxynp_dvVLcrLq-qBXUhitc=&emci=368e319a-a066-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=1ccfd273-e667-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=23483442) AZ-06 is truly a PURPLE district. Voters here backed Trump by 5% in 2016, then Biden by 0.1% (!!) in 2020, then Trump by 2% in 2024. However, the 6th District has supported Democratic candidates for Senate in 2020, 2022, and 2024.
_**The Incumbent**_ Republican **Juan Ciscomani** won this seat in 2022 by 1.5% and in 2024 by 2.5%. Despite representing an extremely purple district, he has voted lockstep with the MAGA agenda. When the Big Bad Bill was moving through Congress, Ciscomani [spoke out](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111992672/559066176/-1460501170?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.07.23_AZ06Kick_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2NmZDI3My1lNjY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t688XFErEOzwOSeZReMVRxynp_dvVLcrLq-qBXUhitc=&emci=368e319a-a066-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=1ccfd273-e667-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=23483442) against the provisions in the bill that would hurt Arizona’s green energy businesses. [He also said](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111992674/559066177/-1111014941?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.07.23_AZ06Kick_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2NmZDI3My1lNjY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t688XFErEOzwOSeZReMVRxynp_dvVLcrLq-qBXUhitc=&emci=368e319a-a066-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=1ccfd273-e667-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=23483442) he "cannot, and will not, support any legislation that reduces Medicaid benefits for vulnerable populations the program intended to serve." However, once Trump and Republican leaders applied a little pressure, Ciscomani caved and voted for the destructive budget he knew would hurt his constituents. The final bill contained a tax provision that [benefits Ciscomani personally](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111992676/559066183/-998883073?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.07.23_AZ06Kick_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2NmZDI3My1lNjY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t688XFErEOzwOSeZReMVRxynp_dvVLcrLq-qBXUhitc=&emci=368e319a-a066-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=1ccfd273-e667-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=23483442), increasing the amount of “pass-through” income he can deduct from his taxes.
_**Our Candidate**_ While Ciscomani serves himself, our candidate **JoAnna Mendoza** has made a lifelong commitment to serving others. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111992678/559066190/-803653937?v=MWF6cmJ1OiI&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.07.23_AZ06Kick_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2NmZDI3My1lNjY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t688XFErEOzwOSeZReMVRxynp_dvVLcrLq-qBXUhitc=&emci=368e319a-a066-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=1ccfd273-e667-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=23483442) JoAnna — known to friends as “Jo” — grew up in a farmworker family and relied on programs like SNAP and WIC. She enlisted in the United States Marine Corps at age 17 and served for 20 years – becoming a drill sergeant, deploying to Iraq and Afghanistan, and leading the next generation of Marines. She returned to Arizona to raise her son, Aidan, and worked as a nonprofit leader, veterans advocate, and policy expert to benefit working people in her community. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111992680/559066191/-803653937?v=MWF6cmJ1OiI&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.07.23_AZ06Kick_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2NmZDI3My1lNjY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t688XFErEOzwOSeZReMVRxynp_dvVLcrLq-qBXUhitc=&emci=368e319a-a066-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=1ccfd273-e667-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=23483442) Saying that she would be an upgrade for Arizona’s 6th District is an understatement!
_**What’s Next?**_ There’s no handbook for “adopting” a swing district – but here are a few things we can do now: ➡️**Help with fundraising.** The earlier the Mendoza campaign brings in funds, the more effective they can be. ➡️ **Combat disinformation.** The GOP and their billionaire donors will target Jo. We can pitch in to counter any attacks that come her way. ➡️ **Grow our volunteer team.** Just like we pulled out all the stops to send Emily to Congress, we’ll do the same for Jo, with phonebanking and more. Now is the part where we ask for a donation. Most members of Congress don’t go all-in, over a year in advance, to help a campaign hundreds of miles away. But there aren’t normal times, so we’re trying something new. We need to flip three seats to take back the House, and AZ-06 could be one of them. clean_body: Most freshman members of Congress don't do this. | I know it’s not “normal” for a freshman member of Congress to “adopt” a district hundreds of miles away over a year before the election. But these aren’t normal times. I heard from thousands of you, online and offline, that Democrats need to do more. You said loud and clear: “Business as usual” isn’t enough. We need to try something new. That’s why we’re organizing both INSIDE Congress to fight the Trump agenda AND OUTSIDE to build a blue wave to flip the House. It’s a lot of work, but this team has never backed down from a challenge. = = Thank you so much 💙 – Emily PREVIOUS EMAIL: Peter, Earlier this year, Emily “adopted” one of the most competitive districts in the country, Arizona’s 6th, also known as AZ-06. That means we’re directing our grassroots energy to flip this critical seat ahead of the 2026 elections. We wanted to give you an overview of why this race is so important – and how our combined efforts can turn this district from red to blue. The District AZ-06 encompasses the southeastern corner of Arizona, including all of Greenlee County, and parts of Cochise, Pima, Pinal, and Graham Counties. Most of the District’s population lives in Pima County in the rapidly growing suburbs of Tucson. AZ-06 is truly a PURPLE district. Voters here backed Trump by 5% in 2016, then Biden by 0.1% (!!) in 2020, then Trump by 2% in 2024. However, the 6th District has supported Democratic candidates for Senate in 2020, 2022, and 2024. The Incumbent Republican Juan Ciscomani won this seat in 2022 by 1.5% and in 2024 by 2.5%. Despite representing an extremely purple district, he has voted lockstep with the MAGA agenda. When the Big Bad Bill was moving through Congress, Ciscomani against the provisions in the bill that would hurt Arizona’s green energy businesses. he "cannot, and will not, support any legislation that reduces Medicaid benefits for vulnerable populations the program intended to serve." However, once Trump and Republican leaders applied a little pressure, Ciscomani caved and voted for the destructive budget he knew would hurt his constituents. The final bill contained a tax provision that , increasing the amount of “pass-through” income he can deduct from his taxes. Our Candidate While Ciscomani serves himself, our candidate JoAnna Mendoza has made a lifelong commitment to serving others. JoAnna — known to friends as “Jo” — grew up in a farmworker family and relied on programs like SNAP and WIC. She enlisted in the United States Marine Corps at age 17 and served for 20 years – becoming a drill sergeant, deploying to Iraq and Afghanistan, and leading the next generation of Marines. She returned to Arizona to raise her son, Aidan, and worked as a nonprofit leader, veterans advocate, and policy expert to benefit working people in her community. Saying that she would be an upgrade for Arizona’s 6th District is an understatement! What’s Next? There’s no handbook for “adopting” a swing district – but here are a few things we can do now: ➡️Help with fundraising. The earlier the Mendoza campaign brings in funds, the more effective they can be. ➡️ Combat disinformation. The GOP and their billionaire donors will target Jo. We can pitch in to counter any attacks that come her way. ➡️ Grow our volunteer team.** Just like we pulled out all the stops to send Emily to Congress, we’ll do the same for Jo, with phonebanking and more. Now is the part where we ask for a donation. Most members of Congress don’t go all-in, over a year in advance, to help a campaign hundreds of miles away. But there aren’t normal times, so we’re trying something new. We need to flip three seats to take back the House, and AZ-06 could be one of them. = = Thank you for reading this longer-than-usual email and for being part of this team 💙 – The whole team at Emily Randall for Congress JoAnna Mendoza is a retired United States Marine. name: Assemblymember Mia Bonta
subject: REMINDER - when you are in the heat, get ready for the Bonta Chili Cook Off - JOIN US, September 27th
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mia Bonta for Assembly 2026, FPPC#1477774
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/89949/images/bonta%20logo%202.jpg]
Dear Peter,

I don't want to interrupt your summer but for a moment to remind you that on Saturday, September 27th our local Firefighters are once again hosting the Bonta Chili Cook Off and I am counting on you to participate!

Help us fill 15th Street (between Webster and Franklin) in front of Local 55's Union Hall - come taste the chili and/or enter and serve up your own chili! Climb on the firetruck, eat and speak with friends (old and new).

Next year I am up for re-election. I am proud to represent Assembly District 18, and I have a lot more work to do to lift up people and resist efforts to roll back progress made to expand access to healthcare, protect our civil rights, and make California affordable for all.

Please don't wait: Become an Event Sponsor, Attendee, or Donor now. Simply click through HERE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/25sepchilicookoff] to reply.

If you have questions and/or want to enter your team, please act now by reaching out to laurie@earpevents.com or 510-839-3100.

With much gratitude always,
Assemblymember Mia Bonta

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/25sepchilicookoff [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/25sepchilicookoff]

name: General John King
subject: Running on Empty
disclaimer_text: Paid For By John King For Senate Inc
body:
I’m crisscrossing Georgia, going from cities to rural communities, sharing my story and plan to defeat Jon Ossoff and bring real leadership to this Senate seat.

|
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmdi6ijndmc2nn1kp1ugt3prhgd2he6qac0vi3j0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cpg62ob4c1h2bs)

---
Fellow Conservative,

I’m crisscrossing Georgia, going from cities to rural communities, sharing my story and plan to defeat Jon Ossoff and bring real leadership to this Senate seat.

We’ve traveled hundreds of miles in the last week alone and we’re gearing up to travel thousands of miles before this is all over. _**Keeping fuel in the truck is going to become a major campaign expense.**_

This race will come down to just a handful of votes, so we can’t run low on fuel. Literally.

The average cost of gas in Georgia is just about $3. [**For just the small contribution of $3, you can keep our campaign on the road for another 25 miles.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zpa4dt351k882hj70p5bn69ej21s00o2oqop82h0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cpg62ob4c1h2bs)

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zi7tg5a3n6lv9nta7ec37fi41igen9g17rsb4vqo_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cpg62ob4c1h2bs)
[**DONATE $3**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcb7ff5go6jkfdhf67l6r02cj2rpjuj06ve5tg3g_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cpg62ob4c1h2bs) [**DONATE MORE**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z47ib6m8vt9j19mutmeasi5rldsttvo3h7oegnp0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cpg62ob4c1h2bs)
Logistics and planning are the keys to a successful mission and a winning campaign.

We’ll defeat Jon Ossoff by outworking him, so that means we must keep fuel in the truck and our team on the trail.

[**A $3 contribution or more is all it takes to push our campaign one step closer to victory.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z44mr6k1jg0kas837alkv3sah3ggg13qgslkct80_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cpg62ob4c1h2bs)

Thank you,
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z472dign7n4cvgh5t7ekhl2ie2d9jd0ekijiu4ug_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cpg62ob4c1h2bs)
John King

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9ubsv63ep39mp7t2v8ldmgg69jdgq97tui5cbfo_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cpg62ob4c1h2bs)

|
General John King is a soldier, lawman, and the first Hispanic elected statewide in Georgia history. He’s running for the Senate now because Georgians need a leader who will fight for them, fight for President Trump’s agenda, and put America First. [**Join the mission by pitching in $10 to help John defeat Jon Ossoff and win the #1 Senate race in the country.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znp8e5fiqtufvubetho2mtmrfrv7fl8lplad7lm8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cpg62ob4c1h2bs)

name: Rick Larsen
subject: A busy week for Transportation & Infrastructure
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
More than $31 million in funding for Northwest Washington Infrastructure.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111993304/559068350/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTkzYWIyYS1lNzY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YQRNVOh7t8qDDhdH1DxeyJOKKOJUG1JXNwnyP3xQA0Y=&emci=613df17e-2d64-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=a993ab2a-e767-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **Last week, the Transportation and Infrastructure Committee was busy.** **On Tuesday, we approved legislation to strengthen, support, and authorize funding for the U.S. Coast Guard.** This legislation ensures the Coast Guard will have resources to remain mission-ready, including for search and rescue, preventing and responding to oil spills in the Puget Sound, and ensuring the U.S. Coast Guard and the Academy are safe work environments. **On Wednesday, Secretary Sean Duffy testified before the Transportation and Infrastructure Committee.** As the top Democrat on the Transportation and Infrastructure Committee, I told him my priorities for air traffic control modernization. Modernizing air traffic control requires increasing the numbers in the aviation safety workforce, expediting the deployment of critical runway safety technology, and replacing air traffic control infrastructure. The Department of Transportation also made several positive announcements regarding funding for projects in Northwest Washington:
* **$2 million** is going to Snohomish County to help with the planning and design of an expansion of the rail yard.
* **$11 million** to the Swinomish Indian Tribal community for the Swinomish Port Authority.
* **$17.9 million** for the Port of Bellingham and its shipping terminal rail construction.
* **$2 million** to the City of Lynden for the Pepin Creek Flood, Agriculture, Salmon, and Safety Transportation design project, also known as the FASST project.

**Infrastructure means improved quality of life in Northwest Washington and job creation.** That is why I have been laser-focused on bringing home good news where I can and leading essential bipartisan efforts for transportation and infrastructure. More soon, _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly:

name: Jena
subject: re: MSNBC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
Peter –
I was on MSNBC to discuss the Colorado man who was recently arrested for allegedly firebombing a Colorado election office.
One thing is clear – the impacts of the Big Lie on our democracy continue. We must stand up strong against any act of violence and the conspiracy theories that inspire them.
Read the message from my team below, and watch my interview here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2507-q3-jg-video?refcode=250723-email]
Thanks for being with me in this fight.
Jena
----- Original Message -----
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2507-q3-jg-video?refcode=250723-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2507-q3-jg-video?refcode=250723-email]
Peter –
In June, a man with a history of election denialism was arrested for allegedly throwing a Molotov cocktail into a Colorado election office.
Let that sink in.
Acts of political violence have been inspired by the dangerous conspiracy theories pushed by Donald Trump and his extremist allies. Jena was on MSNBC to discuss this and the other attacks on democracy that have happened since 2020. Watch her interview here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2507-q3-jg-video?refcode=250723-email]
We cannot normalize this. We cannot look away. And we cannot allow those who incite violence against our democracy to go unchallenged.
Jena Griswold knows this fight better than anyone. As Secretary of State, she has faced death threats for standing up to Trump’s Big Lie. She took action to protect election workers, secure voting equipment, and make sure every voter — Democrat, Republican, and Unaffiliated —can cast their ballot in a safe and secure election.
Now, Jena is running for Attorney General to continue that work. She will hold those who attack our democracy accountable. But she needs your help to win.
Can you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can today to help elect Jena Griswold as Colorado’s next Attorney General? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2507-q3-jg-video?refcode=250723-email]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CONTRIBUTE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2507-q3-jg-video?refcode=250723-email&amount=10&express_lane=true] CONTRIBUTE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2507-q3-jg-video?refcode=250723-email&amount=25&express_lane=true]
CONTRIBUTE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2507-q3-jg-video?refcode=250723-email&amount=50&express_lane=true] CONTRIBUTE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2507-q3-jg-video?refcode=250723-email&amount=100&express_lane=true]
CONTRIBUTE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2507-q3-jg-video?refcode=250723-email&amount=250&express_lane=true] ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2507-q3-jg-video?refcode=250723-email]
There is too much at stake to sit this one out. Violent threats to our democracy are growing, and we need leaders like Jena who will stand for justice.
Thank you,
Team Jena
Follow Jena Online:
https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/ [https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/] https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold [https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold] https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold/ [https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold/] https://www.threads.net/@jenagriswold [https://www.threads.net/@jenagriswold] https://bsky.app/profile/jenagriswold.bsky.social [https://bsky.app/profile/jenagriswold.bsky.social]

name: VoteVets HQ
subject: This is Monopoly Man behavior
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Navy Federal Credit Union illegally charged servicemembers $80 million in overdraft fees and was ordered to refund them by the CFPB in 2024. Then Trump took office
#
Peter:
One of the first things we were afraid of when Trump and Elon Musk gutted the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau was the impact it would have on active duty and Veterans.
CFPB fought banks and corporations that tried to take advantage of us, and they won! They clawed back hundreds of billions of dollars for people who were defrauded or abused and gave that money back. They were the watchdog, and bad actors were afraid of them.
Now, the CFPB is a patsy for those same bad actors, and we’re already seeing the fallout.
Navy Federal Credit Union illegally charged servicemembers $80 million in overdraft fees and was ordered to refund them by the CFPB in 2024. Then Trump took office, and earlier this month, the CFPB dismissed the refund orders. None of those Soldiers, Sailors, Marines, Airmen, or Guardians are getting their refunds.
We knew what Trump thought of us before: “suckers” and “losers” who sacrificed their youth, their health, and their lives for this country. Now, they’re showing us what they think out in public, in the open — screwing us, day-in, day-out.
**If they think we’re going to let them get away with that, they’ve got another thing coming.**
Defeating Trump and his MAGA candidates means reaching the Veterans and Military Families they are so intent on screwing over. It’s a massive challenge, and VoteVets has a ton of work to do. Majorities in the House and Senate depend on it.
That’s why we’re emailing you, and it’s why we’re humbly asking:
[**Please, chip in to VoteVets and help us check Trump’s power by defeating his candidates up and down the ballot.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-july25.sScHXv&refcode=em250723-1-120&t=1&akid=34489%2E3013755%2ErIBnd6)
| [DONATE](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-july25.sScHXv&refcode=em250723-1-120&t=2&akid=34489%2E3013755%2ErIBnd6)
---
Thank you,
The team at VoteVets

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE
Use of military rank, job titles or photographs in uniform does not imply the endorsement of the Department of Defense, Departments of the Army, Navy, Air Force, or the Marines or Space Force.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.votevets.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=34489%2E3013755%2ErIBnd6).

name: State Democrats HQ
subject: we need to stay laser-focused
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
The GOP is hoping that their chaos in 2025 will divert Democrats’ attention from 2026. We can’t let that happen, Peter.
#
Peter — the GOP is hoping that their chaos in 2025 will divert Democrats’ attention from 2026. **We can’t let that happen.**

name: Democrats.org
subject: The Epstein files:
body:
---
Derek, House Republicans just elected to break for recess early, meaning there will be no more votes for six weeks... all to avoid releasing the full Epstein files to the public. Once again, Republicans are bowing to Trump. They’re literally failing to govern — all to cover up whatever is in these files and to protect Trump and his allies from the consequences of that information becoming public. The American people deserve to know what the Epstein files contain, and if Republicans won’t be transparent, we’ll replace them with Democrats who will be. We need to put the infrastructure in place and gather the resources NOW to ensure we elect a Democratic majority to the House and Senate in 2026 and put a stop to this. [**You can use these links to help us do that:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250723_4042_fr&refcode2=4042_22930333_tDuZxA&akid=4042%2E22930333%2EtDuZxA) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250723_4042_fr&refcode2=4042_22930333_tDuZxA&akid=4042%2E22930333%2EtDuZxA)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?refcode=em_20250723_4042_fr&refcode2=4042_22930333_tDuZxA&akid=4042%2E22930333%2EtDuZxA)**

****
We can’t let up, and we can’t let this go.
Right now, Democrats are organizing across the country. We’ve just launched Organizing Summer, a nationwide organizing effort to activate volunteers, register voters, and build Democratic power ahead of the midterms. We’re keeping pressure on Republicans to actually do their jobs by holding town halls in every single state, and we’re investing in every Democratic state party, laying the groundwork to take back Congress in 2026 to hold Trump and his cronies accountable.
Anything you’re able to contribute today will go towards funding this work. Thank you for staying engaged on this,
The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

body:
Hey Derek,
it’s Jon. This just in: A right-wing Super PAC just launched a massive $5
million ad buy attacking me.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs-em-ossoff.coN5Ny&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250723_PM1_V1_S1&t=1003&akid=8816%2E5257348%2ElO0JyX ]Axios - Scoop: GOP unveils $5 million in attack ads against Sen. Jon
Ossoff

If you already know the stakes of this race — and you’re ready to fight —
please use this link to split a contribution between my re-election
campaign and Adam Schiff today: [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs-em-ossoff.coN5Ny&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250723_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=8816%2E5257348%2ElO0JyX ]secure.actblue.com/donate/abs-em-ossoff

Otherwise, here’s why your support is so important to my campaign,
especially today.

This new wave of attack ads is only just the beginning,
Derek. In the months ahead,
Republicans are going to spare no expense and try every dirty trick in the
book to defeat me.

Because if they win here in Georgia, they don’t just expand their Senate
majority — they lock it in for the long-term.

With that power, Trump’s last constraints in the Senate vanish. What’s
left is total submission. No oversight. No brakes on extremist nominees.
No guardrails when he comes for the rule of law.

So all eyes are on our race here in Georgia — and the entire country is
counting on us, not only to hold the line, but also to send a clear
message:

Americans won’t stand by while this administration dismantles Medicaid and
defunds hospitals and nursing homes.

We won’t stand down while they violate fundamental human and civil rights.

And we won’t be silent as Trump launches a power grab unprecedented in our
history.

I will fight, and I will win. But I can’t do it alone.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs-em-ossoff.coN5Ny&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250723_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1005&akid=8816%2E5257348%2ElO0JyX ]So please, split a donation of
$10 — or
whatever you are in a place to give — between my re-election campaign and
Adam to help us fight back against these attacks and defend this seat.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split

Five years ago, here in Georgia, we lit a beacon of hope and possibility
