Jon Ossoff If you already know the stakes of this race — and you’re ready to fight — please use this link to split a contribution between my re-election campaign and Adam Schiff today: [ ]secure.actblue.com/donate/abs-em-ossoff Otherwise, here’s why your support is so important to my campaign, especially today. This new wave of attack ads is only just the beginning, Derek. In the months ahead, Republicans are going to spare no expense and try every dirty trick in the book to defeat me. Because if they win here in Georgia, they don’t just expand their Senate majority — they lock it in for the long-term. With that power, Trump’s last constraints in the Senate vanish. What’s left is total submission. No oversight. No brakes on extremist nominees. No guardrails when he comes for the rule of law. So all eyes are on our race here in Georgia — and the entire country is counting on us, not only to hold the line, but also to send a clear message: Americans won’t stand by while this administration dismantles Medicaid and defunds hospitals and nursing homes. We won’t stand down while they violate fundamental human and civil rights. And we won’t be silent as Trump launches a power grab unprecedented in our history. I will fight, and I will win. But I can’t do it alone. [ ]So please, split a donation of $10 — or whatever you are in a place to give — between my re-election campaign and Adam to help us fight back against these attacks and defend this seat. name: Jane Fonda

body:
This is a wake-up call.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111995279/559076180/1328794144?refcode=ea.c13c5620-ed67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.c13c5620-ed67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMxM2M1NjIwLWVkNjctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YSGqz_1HOD1Fanw6lLK8U5mSldgETkYaJfEOvJqKU_c=&emci=d4f416ca-dc67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=c13c5620-ed67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4823105)
---
Hey there, it's Jane. Last month, I put out a survey to hear directly from JanePAC supporters on a critical question: **_Do you believe Democrats in Washington are doing enough to combat the climate crisis?_** The response was overwhelming and crystal clear: NO. And that should be a wake-up call. A new Harvard poll just confirmed what so many of you have been feeling: **The Democratic Party’s approval now sits at a dismal 40%.** Think about that for a minute. Trump is systematically dismantling decades of environmental protections, stripping away our basic rights, and eroding the foundations of our democracy day after day. This should be the moment when Democratic Party leaders in Washington step up with clarity and conviction. But too often, the response has felt cautious or fragmented — not the bold, unified vision this moment demands. Still, I am filled with hope because of what I heard from supporters like you in our survey. Over and over, you pointed out that corporate lobbyists are the ones standing in the way of climate progress — and the only way forward is to elect bold climate candidates who won’t bow down to the fossil fuel industry. That’s what JanePAC is all about. Together, we’ve already helped elect **170 climate champions nationwide** — not just because they have a “D” next to their name, but because they’re bold, principled, and willing to fight for our planet and our democracy without taking a penny from fossil fuel interests. **[If you haven’t had a chance to take our survey yet, don’t worry — the conversation is still open. Your insights will help us steer the direction of JanePAC as we gear up for the critical fights ahead.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111995281/559076182/-548908541?refcode=ea.c13c5620-ed67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.c13c5620-ed67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMxM2M1NjIwLWVkNjctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YSGqz_1HOD1Fanw6lLK8U5mSldgETkYaJfEOvJqKU_c=&emci=d4f416ca-dc67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=c13c5620-ed67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4823105)** | [**TAKE THE SURVEY →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111995288/559076189/-548908541?refcode=ea.c13c5620-ed67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.c13c5620-ed67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMxM2M1NjIwLWVkNjctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YSGqz_1HOD1Fanw6lLK8U5mSldgETkYaJfEOvJqKU_c=&emci=d4f416ca-dc67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=c13c5620-ed67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4823105)

clean_body: This is a wake-up call. | Hey there, it's Jane. Last month, I put out a survey to hear directly from JanePAC supporters on a critical question: Do you believe Democrats in Washington are doing enough to combat the climate crisis? The response was overwhelming and crystal clear: NO. And that should be a wake-up call. A new Harvard poll just confirmed what so many of you have been feeling: The Democratic Party’s approval now sits at a dismal 40%. Think about that for a minute. Trump is systematically dismantling decades of environmental protections, stripping away our basic rights, and eroding the foundations of our democracy day after day. This should be the moment when Democratic Party leaders in Washington step up with clarity and conviction. But too often, the response has felt cautious or fragmented — not the bold, unified vision this moment demands. Still, I am filled with hope because of what I heard from supporters like you in our survey. Over and over, you pointed out that corporate lobbyists are the ones standing in the way of climate progress — and the only way forward is to elect bold climate candidates who won’t bow down to the fossil fuel industry. That’s what JanePAC is all about. Together, we’ve already helped elect 170 climate champions nationwide — not just because they have a “D” next to their name, but because they’re bold, principled, and willing to fight for our planet and our democracy without taking a penny from fossil fuel interests. | Let's fight like hell for our planet. xx Jane | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

I’ll get right to it, Peter: I’m asking you to **[chip in just $1](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111995808/559078206/-1384072709?refcode=em-7.23.25-all-b&amount=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTM5MDJkNy1lZTY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8iyMhKGLGO5hRsgpMH4EC7k1g2qtvNAY2VadN0aYuOE=)** toward my re-election campaign.

You might be wondering exactly how one dollar – just four quarters – will make enough of an impact to keep this seat blue. Let me explain:
* This was one of the most competitive and consequential races in the country last year. Political experts already rank CA-27 as one of a handful of races that could decide control of the House majority.

* A Republican challenger recently entered my race with a day-one endorsement from the GOP incumbent I defeated in November, Mike Garcia. Republicans spent over $15 million to protect Garcia and attack me – we expect more outside spending in my first race defending this seat.

* If the majority of supporters reading this email gave $1 to rebuild my war chest today, we’d send an unmistakable message of strength when all eyes are on our race.

**[Can I count on you to chip in $1, or any amount you feel compelled to give today, to keep me in Congress fighting for you? We can keep this seat blue AND win the House, but it starts now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111995810/559078208/-1384072709?refcode=em-7.23.25-all-b&amount=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTM5MDJkNy1lZTY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8iyMhKGLGO5hRsgpMH4EC7k1g2qtvNAY2VadN0aYuOE=)**

clean_body: | = = I’ll get right to it, Peter: I’m asking you to = toward my re-election campaign. You might be wondering exactly how one dollar – just four quarters – will make enough of an impact to keep this seat blue. Let me explain: This was one of the most competitive and consequential races in the country last year. Political experts already rank CA-27 as one of a handful of races that could decide control of the House majority. A Republican challenger recently entered my race with a day-one endorsement from the GOP incumbent I defeated in November, Mike Garcia. Republicans spent over $15 million to protect Garcia and attack me – we expect more outside spending in my first race defending this seat. If the majority of supporters reading this email gave $1 to rebuild my war chest today, we’d send an unmistakable message of strength when all eyes are on our race. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, GW | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. \----------Forwarded Message----------
Date: Tuesday, July 22, 2025
From: NDRC
Subject: Invitation: Emergency Texas Strategy Call tomorrow
A special legislative session began in Texas yesterday, and on the agenda is a congressional map redraw, thanks to President Trump’s demand to deliver “five seats” for Republicans.
**What’s happening in Texas is an existential threat to democracy — a brazen attempt to steal the midterm elections — and it requires all of our attention.**
That’s why tomorrow, A.G. Eric Holder will be joining House Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries, Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi, Congressman Greg Casar (TX-35), and Texas House Democratic Caucus Chair, Representative Gene Wu, for an emergency strategy call to discuss what they’re trying to do in Texas and how we’re fighting back.
Here are the details:
**WHAT:** Stop The Texas Takeover: A Live Event With AG Eric Holder and Special Guests
**WHEN:** Wednesday, July 23, at 7:00 p.m. EST
**WHERE:** Register on Mobilize
[RSVP](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111996218/559079436/421868197?utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=eng&utm_content=20250723-NDRC-Tier1-TxLivestreamLiftnote_&utm_campaign=TxLivestreamLiftnote&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRjNmU4ZmI5LWVlNjctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RClB2C9Yw_HXsZJR_iCb9nk4x9ZpaUUrOWFWpZTKij0=&emci=bbc5488b-d967-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=dc6e8fb9-ee67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8431045)
---
It’s no secret: Republicans know their policies are deeply unpopular and threaten their hold on power in the midterms. So they’ve resorted to using every tactic they’ve got to try to cheat instead.
**We’re fighting back to prevent another illegitimate power grab by Trump loyalists in Texas – but this doesn’t just affect Texas. This redraw could have national implications ahead of the 2026 midterms.** That’s why it’s so important that we are all aligned on our strategy, understand what’s at stake, and how to move forward knowing the potential impact this could have on our upcoming elections.
If we work together, we can fight to make sure that Texas maps are fair and its elections reflect the will of the people. **But we need to be prepared so that our grassroots movement has the information and tools needed to build a strong opposition to what we’re up against. **
[**Will you join the NDRC in collaboration with All On The Line tomorrow at 7:00 p.m. EST for this special livestream event on Zoom?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111996223/559079439/-1794448058?utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=eng&utm_content=20250723-NDRC-Tier1-TxLivestreamLiftnote_&utm_campaign=TxLivestreamLiftnote&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRjNmU4ZmI5LWVlNjctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RClB2C9Yw_HXsZJR_iCb9nk4x9ZpaUUrOWFWpZTKij0=&emci=bbc5488b-d967-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=dc6e8fb9-ee67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8431045)
Yes, I’ll be there. [**Sign me up!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111996225/559079481/-1794448058?utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=eng&utm_content=20250723-NDRC-Tier1-TxLivestreamLiftnote_&utm_campaign=TxLivestreamLiftnote&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRjNmU4ZmI5LWVlNjctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RClB2C9Yw_HXsZJR_iCb9nk4x9ZpaUUrOWFWpZTKij0=&emci=bbc5488b-d967-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=dc6e8fb9-ee67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8431045)

In collaboration with All On The Line, Attorney General Eric Holder will be joining Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries, Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi, Congressman Greg Casar (TX-35), and Texas House Democratic Caucus Chair, Representative Gene Wu, for an emergency strategy call about what’s going on in Texas right now. A mid-decade redraw of the state’s congressional map to give Republicans as many as five more seats is something that would have national implications. | No candidates appearing at this event are asking for any funds or donations. \----------Forwarded Message---------- Date: Tuesday, July 22, 2025 From: NDRC Subject: Invitation: Emergency Texas Strategy Call tomorrow A special legislative session began in Texas yesterday, and on the agenda is a congressional map redraw, thanks to President Trump’s demand to deliver “five seats” for Republicans. What’s happening in Texas is an existential threat to democracy — a brazen attempt to steal the midterm elections — and it requires all of our attention. That’s why tomorrow, A.G. Eric Holder will be joining House Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries, Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi, Congressman Greg Casar (TX-35), and Texas House Democratic Caucus Chair, Representative Gene Wu, for an emergency strategy call to discuss what they’re trying to do in Texas and how we’re fighting back. Here are the details: WHAT: Stop The Texas Takeover: A Live Event With AG Eric Holder and Special Guests WHEN: Wednesday, July 23, at 7:00 p.m. EST WHERE: Register on Mobilize It’s no secret: Republicans know their policies are deeply unpopular and threaten their hold on power in the midterms. So they’ve resorted to using every tactic they’ve got to try to cheat instead. We’re fighting back to prevent another illegitimate power grab by Trump loyalists in Texas – but this doesn’t just affect Texas. This redraw could have national implications ahead of the 2026 midterms. That’s why it’s so important that we are all aligned on our strategy, understand what’s at stake, and how to move forward knowing the potential impact this could have on our upcoming elections. If we work together, we can fight to make sure that Texas maps are fair and its elections reflect the will of the people. But we need to be prepared so that our grassroots movement has the information and tools needed to build a strong opposition to what we’re up against. Yes, I’ll be there. I can’t make it. But I’ll = Thank you, and we hope to see you tomorrow evening. Bondi appeared on TV multiple times, confidently bragging about having the Epstein client list right on her desk and promising swift justice with evidence like tens of thousands of videos.

She assured us that accountability was imminent, that the elite pedophiles and traffickers would finally be exposed.

But, here we are, over 100 days into the administration, and what do we have? Absolutely nothing substantial from Bondi - just a contradictory memo quietly released, stating there's no client list at all, and she didn't even bother to sign it.

This isn't just a slip-up; it's a deliberate pattern that echoes her time as Florida's AG, where Epstein operated freely, victimizing children without facing real consequences under her watch.

**We can't let this slide - [**chip in now**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/gJspyd5vjZc8921eyseD0igA/9qMP9GDdW10AAXMkedOk3A) to keep the pressure on and demand answers.**

My sources are telling me that key figures like Dan Bongino and Kash Patel are absolutely furious, with whispers that resignations could be on the horizon because of how badly this has been handled.

The internal clashes are real, and it's creating rifts in the MAGA movement at a time when we need unity the most.

This kind of mishandling is exactly what the Deep State wants - it discourages our base, makes people feel hopeless, and could suppress voter turnout in the crucial 2026 midterms.

Meanwhile, RINOs and Democrats are exploiting the chaos to further their anti-Trump agendas.

**Stand with me against this - [**donate today**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/gJspyd5vjZc8921eyseD0igA/9qMP9GDdW10AAXMkedOk3A) and help me uncover more truths you can share with friends.**

Laura Loomer

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Trump’s “lock him up” rhetoric has become real -
body:
Hi Peter — this is Adam Schiff. The Real Texas PAC said I could reach out with this urgent message:
Donald Trump just went on Truth Social and called for me to be prosecuted.
Why? Because I led his first impeachment. Because I’ve held him accountable. Because I haven’t stopped. And I never will. This is just Trump’s latest attempt at political retaliation against his perceived enemies.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?refcode=072325_2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?refcode=072325_2]
Over the years, Trump has called for me to be jailed for a variety of reasons, including accusing me of treason. And this latest baseless attempt at political retribution won’t stop me from holding him accountable — not by a long shot.
I’m not surprised that Trump is lashing out again. But even by his standards, this one’s weak. And as much as Trump may hope, this latest smear will not distract from his Epstein files problem.
Nevertheless, I need your help right now to respond: rush a split donation between me and The Real Texas PAC to help us fight back and keep holding Trump accountable. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?refcode=072325_2]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Adam Schiff and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?express_lane=true&refcode=072325_2&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?express_lane=true&refcode=072325_2&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?express_lane=true&refcode=072325_2&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?express_lane=true&refcode=072325_2&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?express_lane=true&refcode=072325_2&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-takebacknc?refcode=072325_2&amount=25]
Trump doesn’t want to talk about skyrocketing prices, his tariff failures, the big ugly bill or why his rabid supporters are demanding answers over his refusal to release the Epstein files. So he goes back to the same tired playbook: Attack, distract, repeat.
But I won’t be intimidated. And I won’t stop doing my job – not now, not ever.
Instead of working to help families hit by extreme weather, rising costs, or his own healthcare cuts, Trump is using his platform to lash out at those who tell the truth.
He wants to silence his critics. But I refuse to back down – and with you in my corner, I never will.
Please, rush a split donation to help me and The Real Texas PAC fight back today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?refcode=072325_2]
Trump can lie and threaten me all he wants. I will never be deterred from fulfilling my duties as a U.S. Senator.
Thank you for standing with me,
Adam
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?refcode=072325_2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?refcode=072325_2]
The Real Texas PAC
1150 N Loop 1604 W
Ste 108-230
San Antonio, TX 78248
United States

Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.

name: Troy Downing
subject: I just want to say I'm sorry, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
It’s weird to be on the other side of one of these messages.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)**I just want to say I'm sorry, Peter. You deserve better.**
You've probably already gotten 50 texts today from folks asking for your hard-earned dollar & the last thing you want to deal with is another politician looking for a handout.
I get it because I also get those on my phone and laptop. So being the sender this time feels a little awkward.
**This is Troy Downing. I'm a combat veteran, husband, father & conservative Congressman fighting to advance President Trump's agenda.**
Not in a million years did I ever expect to hold federal office.
But when I saw how things were being run in DC, I felt a responsibility to act.
_Now I'm bringing Montana values to the Beltway._
This midterm cycle isn't just another election. It's the key to who controls the House - continuing the MAGA agenda or succumbing to a radical liberal takeover.
Democrats have a war chest of over **_$68 MILLION_** in cash aimed at crushing MAGA Republicans like me.
**__They've already funneled massive amounts into House races to wipe out every conservative standing in their way.__**
They can't stand a candidate with my profile – someone who's served our country & isn't afraid to shake up the status quo.
But no matter how hard they come after me, I won't back down.
**_Here's the bottom line:_ **_a win for someone like me will bring us one step closer to protecting our conservative majority._
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-O4TX4w)[ I hate to ask, but the fate of America's future is in your hands... Can you take a leap of faith with a combat vet & chip in to my campaign today?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-iGBQ)[DONATE NOW
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-P-tuAAiFWRHFQ)If you can't contribute, I understand. Just know that your prayers mean the world to me.
Thank you and God bless,
Troy| |
---
Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
Troy Downing is a former member of the U.S. Air Force/Air National Guard. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air Force or the Department of Defense.

subject: These draft redistricting maps are unbelievable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=AEaSSfXYneyPhqV+O8pfTVvBtSkv9HNbegJcvGn50itq/KZq+Xmadp3rb4GQec2L1oz4nKyv9xfWaOPR80GaZd3LQAH7XDE2aWf99UlOYyk=]
Texas's new gerrymandered maps are out, Team , and boy are they bad.
You can see by the spiral around each city below -- Houston, Dallas, and San Antonio -- how vengeful partisans in Texas are trying to spread out voters and dilute groups who generally vote against them. Nothing about the way these are drawn includes fair representation.
Proposed Houston Area [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/HoustonRedistrict2025.jpg] Proposed Dallas Area [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/DallasRedistrict2025.jpg] Proposed San Antonio Area [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/SanAntonioRedistrict2025.jpg]
For background: The opponents of voting rights who run Texas have opened a special "emergency session" of the state legislature to tackle another round of partisan redistricting, after having recruited the top national conservative map-drawer and a leading Washington, D.C.-based anti-voting group to ram through a new gerrymander that aims to expand the U.S. House majority.
These new maps aim to dilute the voting power of the state’s Black and brown voters, looking to follow Trump's orders to create five new MAGA-aligned congressional seats in Texas.
Voter suppression anywhere changes the balance of Congress and hurts everyone, everywhere. Help us fight back for fair maps with $25 or whatever you can today and defend our fundamental right to vote >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=25.00&contactdata=AEaSSfXYneyPhqV+O8pfTVvBtSkv9HNbegJcvGn50itq/KZq+Xmadp3rb4GQec2L1oz4nKyv9xfWaOPR80GaZd3LQAH7XDE2aWf99UlOYyk=]

Did you know that state Democrats are facing TWO flip opportunities in Georgia and Iowa next month? **📍In Georgia,** Democratic candidate Debra Shigley is running a close race in a GOP stronghold. **📍In Iowa,** Democrats are facing a toss-up special election that would break the GOP’s supermajority in the state Senate. name: Jasmine Crockett
subject: “Vote for me and you’ll never have to vote again”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio House Democratic Campaign Committee, 545 E Town St
body:
|
---
Y’all, when Donald Trump was running for president, he said the following: _**“Vote for me and you’ll never have to vote again.”**_ We’re now just six months into his second term, and it’s starting to become clear what he meant by that. → He’s unleashed an unelected, sociopathic billionaire to take a wrecking ball to our democracy and our government.
→ He’s pushed our institutions and democratic norms to their breaking point.
→ He’s attacked our most vulnerable communities nationwide.
→He's illegally deported people to a foreign prison camp.
→He's sent the US military into blue state cities. The bottom line is that Trump 2.0 is worse than we could have imagined — and when Trump said he wanted to be a dictator, _**he meant it.**_ [**But as long as I walk this earth and serve in the United States Congress, I will fight to stop that from happening if it’s the last thing I do. And at such a defining moment for our country, I need you with me. So please, join me in this fight for our future by chipping in $5, $10, or more right now, split with Ohio House Dems. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111997264/559083614/273633830?refcode=250723_Jasmine_NeverVote&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDQwZjk3Zi1mMTY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WMyrtD33L2vweVuAMa4IfX4cD0CQBXsBy8zVw3ziqbc=) | **[CHIP IN TO FIGHT FOR OUR FUTURE>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111997265/559083615/273633830?refcode=250723_Jasmine_NeverVote&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDQwZjk3Zi1mMTY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WMyrtD33L2vweVuAMa4IfX4cD0CQBXsBy8zVw3ziqbc= "https://secure.actblue.com/")**

Hey folks,
This one is an absolute must-watch. Don Lemon and I went deep on the Epstein fallout, and it just keeps getting weirder. From the White House scrambling to control the narrative to Ghislaine Maxwell's hush-hush DOJ meeting, this thing is blowing wide open--and Democrats are finally seizing the moment.
**[00:02:10]** -- We dissect Trump's creepy doodle sent to Epstein and the deeper implications of his bizarre lies and auction antics
**[00:07:30]** -- Don shares wild man-on-the-street reactions that show how public opinion is shifting--even among conservatives
**[00:14:45]** -- Inside scoop on Democrats forcing House votes to release the Epstein files--and how GOP leaders are fleeing from accountability
**[00:16:20]** -- We break down the secretive Ghislaine Maxwell meeting with DOJ officials, what it signals, and why it could be a cover-up in plain sight
**[00:24:00]** -- We reflect on how both parties must move forward, why backward-looking politics are losing ground, and what a reset might look like in 2028
**If you found this conversation helpful, please support my work by becoming a paid subscriber today:**

The Indianapolis Star Jade Jackson July 22, 2025 [https://www.indystar.com/story/news/politics/2025/07/22/president-donald-trump-indiana-disaster-recovery-governor-mike-braun/85280152007/](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/cmaZf76IjZO7ro7-DsOHvRvtBZDBCJSm7wd883lRCImUwRANfo0qbd6c7QbZWgsiP5HhS7Rk0lFS9idw99KdHTrUI5SCkXEgsfsEbIwYNQ8PlT73YhmLsrC2QchzxCAjS8keLsCgE26mWhH8kZgaiT-OCYRlwss1lNM9lboNVP7gXzksP1Qb-Ae-9C2tMzH-ARMk9OExz1VaPEgbB_aZqo-eQ-7i1o1u0aS6fmLbPADOsvU_Tn13P_aaYMmsk_tnx1Xtt4RymjEhNxC32Ulfjx4MKloh2MA297WjFpvOEt5iWDjo1E9aduKpXSdKlDU7RjwWmlCoq0IZZVP3cw_UroOnn0oVJhLLJGfQilH4se_Jth7Z2_0Ff5CY3yV-I4f9u97fdJ5RQUfeQmDse0G1ISc8DL0oThhVKYtYenqxUM7Uq_cg5xTB0g1Rd1H2DTgoXPc79zqEUEcEO5nx6CAw_SGzETxdJX0inZWDUcTKNHWwVvpbEm9Mwew8wdmIbmjQ3TUgiN0czpy_MqZydYr64wBpGSA37nlLDs2Zyn5OkRTRcFIijnqFvgkHyG-dDiAEKBLLO2RQ_0zlMT4N_EMIZHwvhZCzVshzoqDUpNjEZRpG0YVM8jeWSfLsrO-cL3J36Pu705Qjc1ugRcMTITrG/iSOIBlWewp2UyeE6UoFRBlUucSATrCst/11) In a post on the social media platform True Social, President Donald Trump promised Indiana $15.1 million to go toward disaster relief from storms that hit the state earlier this year. The federal money comes after Trump said he talked to Indiana Gov. Mike Braun. "I just finished speaking with the Governor Mike Braun, of the Great State of Indiana, which I won BIG in 2016, 2020, and 2024. We are approving $15.1 million dollars for severe flooding and tornadoes, which took place in the early Spring. I know the State, under the leadership of Braun, will make a rapid recovery!" The post said. He also announced he granted funding to Michigan, Kentucky and West Virginia. Braun responded to the post on X, formerly Twitter, thanking the president for his leadership and approval of the critical funding. He said the money will enable Hoosier communities to recover and rebuild "stronger than ever." **Indiana had a state of emergency in 18 counties last Spring**

[](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/1mhKrhSuVWJcUVxutgSwEq4LTVbOqfx-4405WYcVEIUu_loYb7tMQwq8rlT1Ohzp3eOpLQVl2AiMqwJOCS0BR__XXxLyirNZTQPbX1bZTpDW_zmJ2C62PDEl3GBIRbZW9n0z9rKgyxzuuZz5f_4qXj4PqTlwFD7q2xkZ_SQ9IgeUX2xCdGk4VtvyyoDXOw1n9qZIGbaISFfTRqv5WBEyAA7_WSr8pB565P7xBA1lZTB_Eor35g5mqFtfcgRev5ycYumbef7IFuqO9UXKDRIBkp61Rrxm7yv7aIebsvfgGydjnJWOo4fDbx5UDWlUHC8glBxaO7Kk7lDUo6FgFPmiVx2twNJFEtiVUCutwIweMpwLUa227bZFLKHEyYdTK8C8Ku8M5QsU60bVTvxX0H7u6zCDTunAB3w3izTnMn2V2A/pxgcgirOeJyAZMw69yHcsMwc72jDU1Ni/11)

United States President Donald Trump listens as Republican senatorial candidate Mike Braun speaks during a rally at Southport Fieldhouse on Friday, Nov. 2, 2018. In April, Braun declared a state of emergency for 18 counties in the wake of storms that spawned tornadoes and heavy rain through the state and pushed rivers out of their banks. He had previously activated the Indiana National Guard to assist 41 counties with storm recovery. The order was for Bartholomew, Brown, Clark, Crawford, Dearborn, Delaware, Gibson, Hamilton, Harrison, Lake, Madison, Marshall, Martin, Owen, Perry, Posey, Spencer and Warrick counties. Declaring a state of emergency allows the Indiana Department of Homeland Security to offer financial assistance under the State Disaster Relief Fund to help cover expenses caused by the storm damage. Braun later asked for federal assistance. At least two people died during the storms. name: Tyler Kalogeros-Treschuk
subject: This fight is personal, share your why…
body:
Why do you fight for reproductive rights?
Peter,

I fight for reproductive rights because everyone should have the power to control their own body. That's not just a belief—it's a basic human right.

Across the United States, politicians and judges are working relentlessly to take that power away—ban by ban, ruling by ruling. People are suffering. Lives are on the line. But we’re fighting back.

[**Why do you fight for reproductive freedom?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111997831/559085691/781210114?sourceid=1150814&utm_campaign=26emcge-0702aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=story&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjQxYWYwOC1mMzY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ohkI2m5CKV_2VCA65DuCmt8N3V0b_5_KwyQrOrxru7Y=&emci=267ee717-5f66-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ab41af08-f367-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237)

At the Center, we're in this fight every day to advance abortion access, to challenge cruel laws, and to defend those most impacted. And your voice gives this work strength. [**Tell us why this fight matters to you.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111997832/559085692/781210114?sourceid=1150814&utm_campaign=26emcge-0702aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=story&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjQxYWYwOC1mMzY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ohkI2m5CKV_2VCA65DuCmt8N3V0b_5_KwyQrOrxru7Y=&emci=267ee717-5f66-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ab41af08-f367-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237) We're listening—and we'd be honored to hear your story.

Tyler Kalogeros-Treschuk
Senior Director, Individual Giving

---|---
| [**WHY DO YOU FIGHT FOR REPRODUCTIVE RIGHTS?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111997837/559085697/781210114?sourceid=1150814&utm_campaign=26emcge-0702aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=story&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjQxYWYwOC1mMzY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ohkI2m5CKV_2VCA65DuCmt8N3V0b_5_KwyQrOrxru7Y=&emci=267ee717-5f66-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ab41af08-f367-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237) Peter,

Everyone deserves control over their body, their future, and their life. That's why we'll never stop fighting for reproductive freedom.

[**But your energy powers this movement. So tell us: why do you fight?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111997839/559085699/781210114?sourceid=1150814&utm_campaign=26emcge-0702aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=story&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjQxYWYwOC1mMzY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ohkI2m5CKV_2VCA65DuCmt8N3V0b_5_KwyQrOrxru7Y=&emci=267ee717-5f66-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ab41af08-f367-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111997841/559085701/781210114?sourceid=1150814&utm_campaign=26emcge-0702aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=story&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjQxYWYwOC1mMzY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ohkI2m5CKV_2VCA65DuCmt8N3V0b_5_KwyQrOrxru7Y=&emci=267ee717-5f66-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ab41af08-f367-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237) | [**SHARE YOUR STORY**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111997842/559085703/781210114?sourceid=1150814&utm_campaign=26emcge-0702aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=story&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjQxYWYwOC1mMzY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ohkI2m5CKV_2VCA65DuCmt8N3V0b_5_KwyQrOrxru7Y=&emci=267ee717-5f66-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ab41af08-f367-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237 "SHARE YOUR STORY")

[**In dark times, your story can be someone's spark of hope.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111997844/559085704/781210114?sourceid=1150814&utm_campaign=26emcge-0702aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=story&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjQxYWYwOC1mMzY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ohkI2m5CKV_2VCA65DuCmt8N3V0b_5_KwyQrOrxru7Y=&emci=267ee717-5f66-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ab41af08-f367-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237)

clean_body: Why do you fight for reproductive rights? Peter, I fight for reproductive rights because everyone should have the power to control their own body. That's not just a belief—it's a basic human right. Across the United States, politicians and judges are working relentlessly to take that power away—ban by ban, ruling by ruling. People are suffering. Lives are on the line. But we’re fighting back. At the Center, we're in this fight every day to advance abortion access, to challenge cruel laws, and to defend those most impacted. And your voice gives this work strength. We're listening—and we'd be honored to hear your story. Tyler Kalogeros-Treschuk Senior Director, Individual Giving * From: Center for Reproductive Rights <info@reprorights.org> Sent: Monday, July 21, 2025 9:07 AM To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> Subject: 🎙️ TELL US: Why do you fight? | | ---|--- | Peter, Everyone deserves control over their body, their future, and their life. That's why we'll never stop fighting for reproductive freedom. | "SHARE YOUR STORY" Maybe it’s a personal experience. Maybe it’s what you believe in. Whatever it is, your voice matters. We know a better future is possible—where reproductive rights are rightfully recognized as basic human rights. Onward, Center for Reproductive Rights P.S. Anti-rights extremists think they can silence us. name: Team Ossoff
subject: Not a typo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

We are reaching out to ask you to pitch in $1 to Jon Ossoff’s re-election campaign today — and _no, that’s not a typo!_
Peter, we know $1 might not sound like much, especially when the Republican party is preparing to spend hundreds of millions of dollars to try to flip Jon’s seat red...
But when thousands of grassroots supporters are all chipping in $1 at time, _it all adds up!_
In 2021, this team was able to defy the odds and win a historic run off election alongside Rev. Warnock and secure the Senate majority — all because of $1, $10, and $25 donations from supporters just like you.
Now, we’re counting on your support once again to help Jon win what will likely be the most expensive and competitive race in the nation.
[**So please, make a $1 contribution — or more if you can afford it — to Jon Ossoff’s campaign today. Chip in now and we’ll put it directly to work building a campaign and a movement that will win an OVERWHELMING victory on Election Day.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-july25.vLE_dc&refcode=em250723-1-subs-b&t=1&akid=573%2E5691347%2E9BNHXJ)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[GIVE $1](https://act.electjon.com/go/2469?c0=ossoff-em-july25.f1QVUq&refcode=em250723-1-subs-b&t=2&akid=573%2E5691347%2E9BNHXJ)**

These cuts are morally indefensible and pose a serious risk to our national security and undermine America's global leadership. Foreign aid helps us stymie global diseases, prevent conflicts, and back our allies. Slashing aid lets authoritarian adversaries fill the gaps where the U.S. should lead. We cannot afford to lose ground in these crucial areas — not when our national security and global stability are at stake. name: Sarah Kline
subject: Peter, protect our public lands before it’s too late!
body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/JxkJ6ys7PUGmqohXVRrhKg2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=uEQ0armgbLZAjFvt442mo8UV00G76YHI3sQGc1Z/prQrtsj0GUvMQjVeyYgcdxof6CKgmcjFlhBmfxma8at6cbOUXQ1tZ4EaB+Gi8Pyf2zTjHNUjsVyT/IzgPVYjHFLZ [https://secure.everyaction.com/JxkJ6ys7PUGmqohXVRrhKg2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=uEQ0armgbLZAjFvt442mo8UV00G76YHI3sQGc1Z/prQrtsj0GUvMQjVeyYgcdxof6CKgmcjFlhBmfxma8at6cbOUXQ1tZ4EaB+Gi8Pyf2zTjHNUjsVyT/IzgPVYjHFLZ]
Dear Peter,
I’m sure you’ve seen our emails: with the recent attacks on our public lands, we’ve been all hands on deck to fight for their protection. In the past month, we saw a horrific proposal to put 250 million acres of public lands for sale in Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill,” that was then dropped from the bill that passed. Why? Because of the immense public pressure that Congress saw from organizations all across the country, including OLCV. So many of our members stepped up to answer our call and sent their member of Congress an email. The immense support we showed for our public lands is exactly why the proposal was removed. But we can’t stop now.
Although this proposal was removed, and we should be celebrating, we can’t stop fighting as our public lands are still facing unprecedented attacks. From funding cuts, public lands being opened up for extraction, to the lay-offs of park and forest rangers who take care of these lands, our public lands are not safe. Especially after Trump’s ruling that the president can undo already established national monuments [https://www.npr.org/2025/06/11/nx-s1-5430270/justice-department-says-trump-can-cancel-national-monuments-that-protect-landscapes] .
We’re doing all that we can to stop the attack on public lands, but we need your support. Will you make a donation now on behalf of this fight? [https://secure.everyaction.com/JxkJ6ys7PUGmqohXVRrhKg2]
Donate now [https://secure.everyaction.com/JxkJ6ys7PUGmqohXVRrhKg2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=uEQ0armgbLZAjFvt442mo8UV00G76YHI3sQGc1Z/prQrtsj0GUvMQjVeyYgcdxof6CKgmcjFlhBmfxma8at6cbOUXQ1tZ4EaB+Gi8Pyf2zTjHNUjsVyT/IzgPVYjHFLZ]
We’ve learned that public pressure is exactly what we need to win and protect our public lands from the unprecedented attacks we’ve recently seen on them. In our efforts, we asked our members to share stories about their connection to our treasured public lands and the support we received was vast. I’d like to share one of these member stories with you. This story was submitted by Leigh Blake from Trail, Oregon:
My first memory of an incredible National Park was 1947 when my parents took me at four years of age and my new born sister to Yosemite National Park... What a glorious trip!!! That valley with Mirror Lake and the wandering paths through the meadows was magical and the huge trees have always stayed in my memories... My mom went to feed a buck who was wandering through the camps and got kicked for her troubles!! She wasn't hurt but that was the first time in nature that I saw how wild creatures can have their own feelings... Mom was lucky she didn't get hurt. We've been in love with wildlife now forever!!
If Leigh’s story reminds you of your own connection to these incredible places, will you donate now and help us protect them for generations to come? [https://secure.everyaction.com/JxkJ6ys7PUGmqohXVRrhKg2]
Donate now [https://secure.everyaction.com/JxkJ6ys7PUGmqohXVRrhKg2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=uEQ0armgbLZAjFvt442mo8UV00G76YHI3sQGc1Z/prQrtsj0GUvMQjVeyYgcdxof6CKgmcjFlhBmfxma8at6cbOUXQ1tZ4EaB+Gi8Pyf2zTjHNUjsVyT/IzgPVYjHFLZ]
We’ve won this battle before, and we can do it again with your support. As an OLCV member, I don’t doubt that you know how invaluable our public lands are. We can’t lose them.
Give now so we can keep going in this fight to ensure our public lands are untouched for our environment and future generations! [https://secure.everyaction.com/JxkJ6ys7PUGmqohXVRrhKg2]
With gratitude,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Sarah%20Signature.png]
Sarah Kline (she/they)
OLCV Communications & Membership Coordinator
P.S.: If you’d no longer like to receive fundraising emails, please use this link here [https://secure.everyaction.com/p/24dczWT--Uqtcu_3MxYYog2] to log-in and update your email preferences.
https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv [https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv] https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org [https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org] https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F [https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F] https://x.com/OLCV [https://x.com/OLCV]

Oregon League of Conservation Voters
1110 SE Alder Suite 220
Portland, OR 97214
United States

name: Tired Floridian.
subject: $450 million could’ve fixed… a lot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Weil, Democrat for US Senate
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.41.25%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Friend, Let’s talk about choices. I am choosing to run for U.S. Senate in the face of this:
Florida just spent $450 million building a detention center in the middle of the Everglades.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/547753627A5666334D6F61722F58456A59763763504B42375A4E614F502B6D6B6E53684A354430322F7742547935505368553978684538765442345763653436/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-07-23%20at%2011.22.01%E2%80%AFAM.png]
The worst part?
Here’s what that money could have done instead:
✅ Funded 12,000+ affordable housing units
✅ Raised teacher pay across the state
✅ Covered community college for tens of thousands
✅ Provided free childcare for working families
That’s not security. It’s waste. And it tells us everything about their priorities.
But you can choose to support a campaign that is fighting against these very policies.
CLICK HERE to donate $10 today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl]

name: Royce White
subject: America is Under Siege

Peter, America is under siege.

And the worst part? So many of our leaders are still pretending it’s not happening.
**We are at war with Communist China — economically, digitally, spiritually, and strategically. And yet, we’re still tiptoeing like cowards.**

Right now, Chinese nationals — who have no loyalty to our Constitution — are buying up American farmland, infrastructure, and influence. We are watching our sovereignty get auctioned off to the highest bidder, all while huge parts of America smile and wave.

**Let me be clear: No foreign adversary should be allowed to buy land in America. Period.** Would we let Al-Qaeda buy property here? Of course not. But don’t forget — this government is actively supporting Al-Qaeda-aligned groups in Syria. That tells you everything you need to know.

It’s time to wake up and fight back. I’m running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota to confront this globalist madness head-on. But I can’t do it **[without your help.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=559af894b1ce473aa3f88d9a9f0000a3&_e=nEHxO-kyS4UT8gJqYoPXf3X0Gp9GulI7KOvZT6mvqaTbkjtfqQm4EwfhsNOFL_nijZ9cUa-boeQaf1tLn8YVdj_daqfGL59xW4YgiBwMSHnwqb5RfPhiAY2wvxEg2EYIbhkW8GPMdzKSgq4hNOpjKkqJEYmqJmXeEW0BQUs6A20cxjdXoTQ_LhskX93rcutPU5jewQGXF2T8bo4TQfkT7e6AcFDYZQskcH_BJsNXY38HeRHmywRjogAclGVvfhV_AtKhkYUb1JBrXW2NrAmQNeyFJl0D9JVSzm-tGQZU0F3NCa-eKBbT6ZH1dHvbcBKkZK2WSt4cXKY1WHddlSUFmYatXWtKeWmu_275yB-xZcm9D_0-_g4qHwBJD-mOcuWk60Y_EaJ1ETJOoalACo5195IEzX3S7FqpqSeI3Fvchv2IgS832E5-8LBi4gr6ZBL5R09h5MKc3l8oi_q_Fl192bhPeMgH6GDxewBW016yldAavuaDiC8oFba8uvPXQpkRJpaFCuyqvJoNQoLAZAwT6WXK_UUm7C_t6mkoItDHDtMV-u1-sCgf7jtA-jIbZ01T)**

Let’s draw a hard line. No more land sales to China. _**No more puppet politicians. No more silence while our nation is sold out from under us.**_

America First — Always.

Let’s go!
Royce White

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc._

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

clean_body: Michigan is ground zero. | = | We’re not sitting back and waiting for 2026 – we’re out there now , organizing, building coalitions, and laying the groundwork to flip the House. And Michigan is ground zero. We have FIVE competitive U.S. House seats across the state, including mine–two that we need to hold, and 3 flippable seats. We can deliver the majority right here at home. That’s why I’m not just running for reelection in MI-03. I’m hitting the road, working with local organizers, and supporting my fellow Democrats here at home and across the country. Because here in Michigan, we make things. And in 2026, we’re going to make the majority in the U.S. House of Representatives. But this work takes resources, and the GOP is already pledging millions into Michigan races. = | | | = | = | = | = | = So grateful to have you by my side, Hillary * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Hillary Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49516 United States | = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . name: Barbara Boxer
subject: Our chance to defeat Ken Calvert, for good
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Katherine Aleman is the Democrat who can flip CA-41
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92384?t=6&akid=20702%2E878179%2ECuaQxu) Hi friend — it's Barbara Boxer. We have a real opportunity to defeat Ken Calvert (one of the _worst_ and _most vulnerable_ MAGA Republicans in Congress) and flip CA-41 for Democrats.

**Calvert barely eked out a victory in 2024.** And since he just voted to pass Trump's Big Ugly Bill — taking away healthcare from thousands of our neighbors, slashing education funding and food nutrition for our kids, and eliminating jobs for veterans — he's more beatable than ever.

**Now, I’m proud to support Katherine Aleman, a public school teacher, small business owner, working mom of four, and former City Council Member who knows how to win in tough districts** — _even in her city, where Republicans outnumbered Democrats by 30%._

I want to make sure you have a clear and complete picture of the MAGA Congressman that Katherine is running against. This 👇is more of his record:

– Voted to defund the FBI.
– Defended Jan. 6 insurrectionists.
– Opposed an assault weapons ban.
– Voted against recognizing same-sex marriage.
– Voted against codifying Roe v. Wade and even against the Violence Against Women Act.

Katherine, on the other hand, is exactly the kind of bold, principled leader we need in Congress, **and she _can_ beat Calvert.**

– Fought locally for affordable housing for veterans.
– Cut utility costs for working families.
– Expanded access to small business loans.
– Championed government transparency.
– Invested in public safety.

[I know firsthand what it takes to win tough fights, and I'm telling you that early grassroots support from people like you, friend, is KEY to taking on Calvert’s MAGA mega-donors. So, I'm asking: Will you split a donation between the Voter Protection Project and Katherine to flip CA-41 and defeat Ken Calvert once-and-for-all? I'm hoping to help her raise $10,000 before the end of the night.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92384?t=7&akid=20702%2E878179%2ECuaQxu) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Katherine Aleman and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92385?t=8&akid=20702%2E878179%2ECuaQxu)

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 7/23/2025
body:
Trailblazers among us: Meet the RMV award winners changing Colorado from the ground up
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi folks,
🎙️ Check out today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Colorado faces a [$1 billion road funding gap](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), with a new ballot initiative aiming to reroute taxes back to infrastructure. Meanwhile, the state’s [$8 million wolf program](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) is drawing fire over bloated costs and questionable payouts. From [failed zipline projects](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to [poor school safety rankings](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), spending misfires abound—prompting some, like [one rural sheriff](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), to turn to community-driven solutions instead.
🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** President Trump ordered the [release of 230,000 MLK assassination files](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), exposing long-hidden FBI records. He also stepped in to [halt the deportation of Afghan allies](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), launching an emergency visa review to protect those abandoned by Biden’s 2021 withdrawal. Meanwhile, AFL targets [$30M in NIH grants](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), calling DEI-linked research "junk science" and pushing to cancel it.
**🗣️ Commentary Spotlight...** John DiGirolamo warns parents about the [growing normalization of teen sexting](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), driven by early porn exposure and peer pressure. Cory Gaines exposes how [unelected regulatory boards](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) in Colorado are making major policy decisions with little oversight—leaving rural communities behind.
This is the Mountain Minute for Wednesday, July 23, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Trailblazers among us: Meet the RMV award winners changing Colorado from the ground up](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
At the Mountain Majesty Gala last month, the room was on its feet. Eric Trump had just wrapped his keynote, a message aimed straight at the grassroots: Colorado is yearning to be red. But the loud applause that night wasn’t reserved only for the headliner.
It also came when everyday Coloradans—organizers, volunteers and first-time leaders—were called up for something new: the first Trailblazer Awards.
It was for the people doing the work when no one’s watching. It was a moment to take in, struck not just by who received the awards—but why. These weren’t political celebrities. They were parents, satirists, engineers and organizers.
Most had never sought attention. But they’d earned it. Here are the stories of Trailblazers from all corners of the state who remind us what it means to take action before the crowd shows up.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[DEI grants under fire: AFL targets NIH-funded “junk science” in $30M purge](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* America First Legal (AFL) released a report exposing 18 terminated NIH grants—worth up to $30 million—as discriminatory, race-based “junk science” tied to DEI initiatives launched under the Biden administration.
* Grants included programs prioritizing race, sex, and identity in biomedical admissions, hiring, and research, many of which violated recent Supreme Court decisions and Trump’s 2025 executive order banning DEI-based funding.
* Though a federal court partially ruled against the mass cancellations, AFL defends them as constitutionally necessary, with Colorado Sen. Mark Baisley calling DEI a betrayal of America’s founding principle: “Out of many, one.”

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[DiGirolamo: Teen sexting—What every parent needs to know](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Sexting is now alarmingly common among teens, driven by early exposure to pornography and peer pressure; over 90% of teens have sent or received explicit images by graduation.

* Many teens are unaware of the real dangers—including cyberbullying, depression, sextortion, and criminal consequences—especially when images are shared without consent.

* Parents are urged to have direct conversations about values, risks, and boundaries, as cultural messaging and tech tools make harmful behavior feel normal and safe.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[Hunter: The Prince of Darkness and the Light of the World](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY DRAKE HUNTER****| COMMENTARY | JULY 23** _They called him the Prince of Darkness, a man whose voice shook stadiums and whose image terrified a generation of churchgoers. Ozzy Osbourne was never the poster child for purity. He bit bats, howled at moons, and lived through headlines that left even the tabloids gasping. And yet, strangely enough, it was Ozzy—not a pastor or prophet—who helped spark a light in my soul._
__
**[Ganahl: Big wins, bigger fights—Colorado conservatives are gaining ground](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY HEIDI GANAHL | COMMENTARY | JULY 22** _We’ve been in the trenches for a long time here in Colorado. For years, it’s felt like one loss after another—on parental rights, on fiscal responsibility, on election integrity. But something has shifted. clean_body: Trailblazers among us: Meet the RMV award winners changing Colorado from the ground up | | | | PRESENTED BY | | Hi folks, 🎙️ Check out today's Mountain Minute podcast , or watch on or ! Here is a summary of today's top stories: 🏔️ Here in Colorado... Colorado faces a , with a new ballot initiative aiming to reroute taxes back to infrastructure. Meanwhile, the state’s is drawing fire over bloated costs and questionable payouts. From to , spending misfires abound—prompting some, like , to turn to community-driven solutions instead. 🇺🇸 On the National Stage... President Trump ordered the , exposing long-hidden FBI records. He also stepped in to , launching an emergency visa review to protect those abandoned by Biden’s 2021 withdrawal. Meanwhile, AFL targets , calling DEI-linked research "junk science" and pushing to cancel it. 🗣️ Commentary Spotlight... John DiGirolamo warns parents about the , driven by early porn exposure and peer pressure. Cory Gaines exposes how in Colorado are making major policy decisions with little oversight—leaving rural communities behind. This is the Mountain Minute for Wednesday, July 23, 2025. – Team RMV | TODAY'S TOP STORIES BY JEN SCHUMANN, At the Mountain Majesty Gala last month, the room was on its feet. Eric Trump had just wrapped his keynote, a message aimed straight at the grassroots: Colorado is yearning to be red. But the loud applause that night wasn’t reserved only for the headliner. It also came when everyday Coloradans—organizers, volunteers and first-time leaders—were called up for something new: the first Trailblazer Awards. It was for the people doing the work when no one’s watching. It was a moment to take in, struck not just by who received the awards—but why. These weren’t political celebrities. They were parents, satirists, engineers and organizers. Most had never sought attention. But they’d earned it. Here are the stories of Trailblazers from all corners of the state who remind us what it means to take action before the crowd shows up. | America First Legal (AFL) released a report exposing 18 terminated NIH grants—worth up to $30 million—as discriminatory, race-based “junk science” tied to DEI initiatives launched under the Biden administration. Grants included programs prioritizing race, sex, and identity in biomedical admissions, hiring, and research, many of which violated recent Supreme Court decisions and Trump’s 2025 executive order banning DEI-based funding. Though a federal court partially ruled against the mass cancellations, AFL defends them as constitutionally necessary, with Colorado Sen. Mark Baisley calling DEI a betrayal of America’s founding principle: “Out of many, one.” | The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support! | Sexting is now alarmingly common among teens, driven by early exposure to pornography and peer pressure; over 90% of teens have sent or received explicit images by graduation. Many teens are unaware of the real dangers—including cyberbullying, depression, sextortion, and criminal consequences—especially when images are shared without consent. Parents are urged to have direct conversations about values, risks, and boundaries, as cultural messaging and tech tools make harmful behavior feel normal and safe. | ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ DRAKE HUNTER| COMMENTARY | JULY 23 They called him the Prince of Darkness, a man whose voice shook stadiums and whose image terrified a generation of churchgoers. Ozzy Osbourne was never the poster child for purity. He bit bats, howled at moons, and lived through headlines that left even the tabloids gasping. Team, There’s something deeply troubling happening right now, and I’m not going to stay silent. Throughout my career, in Trenton and now in Washington, I have always led with transparency and accountability. | | | In a desperate attempt to shift the story from the Epstein files, Donald Trump, an idiot, is now [pushing DOJ officials](https://default.salsalabs.org/T04e50c51-a6cd-4688-a799-73195fb8c1bb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) to pursue treason charges against Barack Obama. We'd love to ignore this crap altogether, but such talk comes with consequences when you're the president. He has the power to push this forward, even if the charges are meritless. And his followers, also idiots, have shown that they will believe this drivel, and act accordingly -- even violently. **We need to push back hard, tell Trump what he can do with these charges, and end this dangerous stupidity.** [**Tell Trump where he can stick absurd "Obama treason" allegations, and to drop this sham "investigation".**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T395e1c9f-aaaf-4ca5-a088-18dbeb6f17a4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | In a desperate attempt to shift the story from the Epstein files, Donald Trump, an idiot, is now to pursue treason charges against Barack Obama. We'd love to ignore this crap altogether, but such talk comes with consequences when you're the president. He has the power to push this forward, even if the charges are meritless. And his followers, also idiots, have shown that they will believe this drivel, and act accordingly -- even violently. We need to push back hard, tell Trump what he can do with these charges, and end this dangerous stupidity. | | | | | | | Thank you, Left Action | | | | | | Other things you can do: Follow us on * Follow Us | | LeftAction Washington, District of Columbia info@leftaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | or

body:
The men and women of Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) risk their lives to protect this country... | | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/Y0766cV0rMPBO2l6Ug5hWH2GZeoG2Ka5xKd3qNOqtIDxnPdPyL5yx_4_fleqNe3SDAMfnK0YKgCDRH378rnZhhPWH591W4lEVjsuz5Ot7bcOEH2k35o01chzhOK7LhHNbTpJjLaxviR408eq1sWRgSRP8CIotwOnzdCGkrdIDD9f-5oOTHDOtowPtavVt-extn7IxSe5WR6-9yeaGQmgreicd4Ls1WgG7OzCY3J9HbUi8kpuzARluAOCjeZziIVV9rDhuH63KpeufNPCPgkE28uRnJmTFH6rsi0NunXwoYbdSbwfQk1y0fT-RC1gDYduo4J2qVNEevwKSk3wgYHApl0cTqfFzBr5PDmmBIOHVaO4kTWsYSyOeYBKcJIz9UkZJAO-Zh1S0dO5naN9oRU5rcL63y3jQuAY_e6x0XZoD3o-gW9z5GzNCW1p8oYygT1nxvUDL4mQ6N81VhMFmfsAWjU4-MuBfHxiQRbKTVAVnnTfPiZhnoHhRmxeou8uWU_rWrHEPgsUasyosXUhIUqPwc2k7-ky676tqM_2VvQ59fDARVVcNSydbbU0lwd91NBFgs5MyYUGwBLCWk3I3G2vUuOuFCB3mIX29ig6-b8PyhihEg135gKCq_pEqwMLdmEZFxpvIqpLIAtaZ_2OiCYin1u8Ku95cFcS863jTxUujwRB7PET6Ol0B2qVCV9JQ8u_7x120vcL1g/QaapxQG6qlr1fPcOdPbKSzaUxhP7X814/11)
---
Peter,

The men and women of Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) risk their lives to protect this country -- **stopping** criminals, **deporting** illegal aliens, and **enforcing** our immigration laws.

But instead of support, they're being smeared by radical activists, open-border politicians, and the liberal media. **T****hey 're being called racist. Oppressive. Even heartless.**

**We won 't stand for that.** Heritage Action is launching our **National ICE Survey** to show that the American people stand with our defenders -- not the lawbreakers.

name: In This Together PAC
subject: Pro-union, pro-jobs, pro-environment, pro-business
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
Peter,

Gov. Andy Beshear just traveled to South Carolina to deliver the keynote address to the state AFL-CIO’s annual convention, where he discussed the critical role unions play in our economy and our communities — _and why workers’ power must be protected._

Union labor isn't just part of our history; it’s the foundation of our future. It was union members who fought tooth and nail for the 40-hour work week, fair wages, safe working conditions, and the rights millions of Americans enjoy today.

These victories didn’t come easy. They came through solidarity, courage and leadership that respected the dignity of workers. But today, these hard-won protections are at serious risk. Politicians in Washington, DC and elsewhere work to undermine unions, weaken collective bargaining and roll back protections that have been given to workers who helped build this country from the ground up.

We need leaders who understand that unions are essential partners in building an equitable society where every American gets a fair shot and is treated with respect.

**[That’s why In This Together PAC stands firmly and proudly behind pro-union leaders like Andy. We’re working to support and uplift candidates across the country who are ready to not just protect union rights, but defend union protections from Republican attacks. Will you chip in to join our efforts today to elect the next generation of leaders who will stand up for America’s workers?>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112001183/559096215/841405539?ms=em25_250721_unions_fndd_gq_act___ittpac_ettx&&&&refcode=em25_250721_unions_fndd_gq_act___ittpac_ettx&&&&source=em25_250721_unions_fndd_gq_act___ittpac_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em25_250721_unions_fndd_gq_act___ittpac_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&contactdata=LhDsiXXake0xyYHPTdctbuuUjhJ/eqRtl+/cAvn3qTgrrfQ0py+Zo4eI+22lrl76EPaShVozJDPajpdvGNVV5HfjBaRN59dHw3TrfrMK166I7ofHekGzh5xgodlmDbS9QP+O3sbUhp82Oyqsa8jte8qjQXC7tuzLn96YXozciF3ZyZoqD+Bg0ComrKsOB6Az&&&&refcode2=ac2f2c51-f967-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&refcode2=ac2f2c51-f967-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWMyZjJjNTEtZjk2Ny1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Xh_LJHzQtzqaVLeztSMkuJXpfcHqrBrRHmfvO-Iz2MM=)** clean_body: | | Peter, You don’t need us to tell you what’s at stake. The bullshit is piling up fast, Republicans are already gunning for the courts, and Mastriano and Garrity are plotting their next move here in Pennsylvania. But you’ve got options. And we’ve got work that needs doing. Whether you’ve got time, ability to donate, or just the fire to do something, there’s a way for anyone to get involved today: We need people in every county, on every block. Following my graduation from Northern Arizona University, I was elected to the Navajo Nation Council to represent my community, and I’ve been in public service ever since. I subsequently served as a county official and as Vice President of the Navajo Nation before being elected President of the Navajo Nation in 2019.
I’m running to deliver generational change, because we owe it to our children and grandchildren to leave them a future better than the one we inherited. Unfortunately, our current representative isn’t interested in improving the lives of his constituents. His votes to cut healthcare and food assistance from our most vulnerable populations might go over well in the fancy suburb where Eli Crane lives, but out here in rural Arizona, that dog won’t hunt.
[_**I’m ready to show up in Congress as a champion for rural Arizona, but I need your support. Can you please split a contribution between my campaign and Sharice Davids today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112001518/559097167/45496428?refcode=email_072325_nez-split&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWVmMzEwMy1mYTY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9k3C4j8zcfJIQNi4puFnqkwW_s1_prxVfETb6L9iBzg=)

Our district faces real challenges: from the rising costs of gas, food, childcare, and housing to a lack of accountability in Washington. We need a representative in Congress who’s focused on the issues here in Arizona — not the partisan squabbles of DC. Someone who will put working Arizonans first, create good jobs, lower everyday costs, support our veterans, secure Arizona’s water future, and protect the right to choose.
As the former President of Navajo Nation, I’m ready to deliver on the issues that matter most to our communities, but I can’t get there without your help. [_**Please pitch in any amount today, split between my campaign and Sharice Davids.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112001520/559097169/45496428?refcode=email_072325_nez-split&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWVmMzEwMy1mYTY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9k3C4j8zcfJIQNi4puFnqkwW_s1_prxVfETb6L9iBzg=)

clean_body: In a historic and unprecedented move Speaker Mike Johnson has given the order to shutter the House of Representatives for a month in a last ditch effort to block a bipartisan effort to release the Epstein files. | | Friend, In a historic and unprecedented move Speaker Mike Johnson has given the order to shutter the House of Representatives for a month in a last ditch effort to block a bipartisan effort to release the Epstein files. This is really bad for MAGA. | As the saying goes, y ou know you are over the target when you are taking the most flack, the fact that Speaker Johnson is having to close down the House to block a vote on the release of these files means that whatever's in them must be thermonuclear level damaging for Trump. It is extremely likely that when the House reconvenes this fall, Speaker Johnson won't be able to hold back the release of these files. Given how damaging this could be for Trump and the MAGA movement we need to be ready to capitalize on them when they come out this fall so we can multiply the damage the release of these files will have. Thank you in advance for your support. Team No Dem Left Behind | | Mail checks to: No Dem Left Behind P.O. name: Jazz Lewis
subject: July 2025 Newsletter
body:
https://www.jazzlewis.com/ [https://www.jazzlewis.com/]
July 2025 Newsletter
Delivering Environmental Justice for All Marylanders
I was proud to stand with Governor Wes Moore in Baltimore last week as he signed a powerful executive order advancing environmental justice across our state. The Valuing Opportunity, Inclusion, and Community Equity (VOICE) Order is a bold step toward righting the wrongs faced by communities, like ours in Prince George’s County, that have long borne the brunt of pollution and environmental neglect. This order ensures state agencies will work together, with real accountability, to cut exposure to harmful pollutants, expand clean public transit, and build healthier, more resilient neighborhoods.
For me, this work is personal. I’ve seen the impact of environmental injustice in Bowie, Capitol Heights, and across District 24. That’s why I’ve pushed for policies that champion the voices of the people most affected. This executive order requires every agency to appoint environmental justice officers, create public-facing strategic plans, and use tools like MDEnviroScreen to target solutions based on real data. It’s a new era, one where state government must engage directly with communities and act with urgency and transparency.
Environmental justice isn’t just a policy issue; it’s a promise to our children that their health and future matter, no matter their ZIP code. I’m grateful to Governor Moore for his leadership and honored to continue this fight for equity, clean air, safe water, and the dignity all Marylanders deserve.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/Delivering%20Environmental%20Justice.jpg]
Empowering Our Workforce
As someone deeply committed to uplifting our community and creating real opportunities for working families, I’m proud to support efforts to help former federal employees transition into rewarding new careers, especially in education, where we urgently need them . After thousands of public servants lost their jobs due to federal funding cuts, we here in Maryland stepped up to protect our workers. Under Governor Moore’s leadership, we’ve directed state agencies to help these workers get retrained and licensed to become teachers, while also addressing our state’s growing educator shortage.
I’m especially excited about programs like Montgomery College’s Alternative Certification for Effective Teachers , which received state grant funding to support former federal workers. These professionals, many with advanced degrees and deep expertise, are now preparing to teach in critical shortage areas like STEM and foreign languages. Some are already set to begin teaching this fall.
This is how we build a stronger Maryland: by investing in people, valuing public service, and turning challenges into opportunities for growth. I’ll continue fighting to make sure every Marylander has a pathway to succeed and that every student has a great teacher in the classroom.
Chesapeake Baysox Stadium Visit
This month, I had the pleasure of touring the Chesapeake Baysox stadium—an institution here in Prince George’s County. Whether I’m bringing my family to enjoy a game or, like this time, getting a behind-the-scenes look at the exciting improvements underway, it’s always a joy to visit. These enhancements will ensure an even better experience for fans. I’m committed to doing everything I can at the state level to make sure this team has the support it needs to keep uniting our community through the love of baseball.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/Chesapeake%20Baysox.jpg]
https://www.jazzlewis.com/ [https://www.jazzlewis.com/]
Delegate Jazz Lewis
Democrat, District 24, Prince George's County
Taylor House Office Building, Room 151
6 Bladen St., Annapolis, MD 21401
800-492-7122, ext. 3691; jazz.lewis@house.state.md.us
www.jazzlewis.com
By Authority: Friends of Jazz Lewis, Chris Taitt, Treasurer
Friends of Jazz Lewis - State Account
P.O. Box 341854
Bethesda, MD 20827
United States
