name: JD VANCE
subject: Folks in D.C. never say “thank you.”
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj205gerek165ap3tqiarhyx2m49z4tlwilxv4ckgvatpdcs8phxokmxbcghpmcasjtgei2v7npwrpjjfsfbr&__stmp=szvc3c&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szvc3c&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol03dxacsd5ey024zcjq2e4qym93xjspn5ia4yi38m068l17frit95ywy36ygz9mgofoiq93kb3mrpdy4r9f8t59u0h85lg9vnaykxu0pmk1yq82epvj1ypagt5hu2c9tdcq2464haf4&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szvc3c&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szvc3c&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szvc3c&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szvc3c&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol03dxacsd5ey024zcjq2e4qym93xjspn5ia4yi38m068l17frit95ywy36ygz9mgofoiq93kb3mrpdy4r9f8t59u0h85lg9vnaykxu0pmk1yq82epvj1ypagt5hu2c9tdcq2464haf4&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szvc3c&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szvc3c&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I didn’t plan on this
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
All I wanted to do was keep serving my country, the same way I have since I was sworn in to the U.S. Navy.
#

Team, when Gabby and I first agreed that I would run for Senate back in 2019, we knew things would change. We know more than most how public service can change your life.
But I’ve got to tell you, I never intended for things to end up like this. All I wanted to do was keep serving my country, the same way I have since I was sworn in to the U.S. Navy.
I know that service comes with risk, sure. But I didn’t set out to be called a traitor by the richest guy in the world, or to have one of Trump’s advisors calling for my execution.
Now, I don’t want you to worry about me. And after everything I’ve been through, things like this don’t intimidate me all that much.
I do worry that they will intimidate others, though — people just beginning to get involved. People thinking about joining a peaceful demonstration, or speaking out at a local town hall. I worry that Trump and his cronies are trying to scare people out of resisting him, and that it might be working.
But then I look back at this team. You’ve been with me a long time, and you haven’t backed down. Your support means the world to me, but it also gives me a lot of hope that enough people will stand up, push back, and make sure these guys don’t stay in power.
I’m ready to fight like hell to save our democracy. If you’re with me, please:
[**Make a donation so we'll have the resources we need to defeat MAGA Republicans up and down the ballot next year.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-july25.pQQVdM&refcode=em250723-1-f&t=1&akid=6129%2E6688874%2EE82IRG)

****
Thanks so much,
Mark

name: Team Bohannan
subject: Iowa already has a reproductive care crisis
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112003619/559104889/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTUwYmQxYy0wMjY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aVsgofzc94Vd-_52nRCO6rvmnzWB_qI2UCFEbpoq_QE=)
Peter,

Just last week, a major anti-abortion group held a victory party to celebrate the budget passing — and in effect, the defunding of Planned Parenthood on a nationwide scale through a provision preventing patients on Medicaid from using their insurance at the clinic.

And guess who showed up to celebrate? **Mariannette Miller-Meeks.**

**_Peter, with its six-week abortion ban, Iowa is already a state with some of the strictest anti-abortion laws in the country, while also having the fewest OB-GYN specialists per capita in the United States._ This bill will exacerbate an already mounting crisis in reproductive health care in our state.**

Four out of six established Planned Parenthood clinics in Iowa are expected to close. Along with abortions, defunding Planned Parenthood puts other critical services out of reach for hundreds of thousands of Iowans, including cancer screenings, STI treatments, pap smears, HPV vaccines, and so much more.

**While women across Iowa are trying to figure out what this bill means for their access to reproductive care, Mariannette Miller-Meeks is sipping champagne and calling it a win.** _But this really shouldn't surprise us._

Over and over again, Mariannette Miller-Meeks has voted against reproductive freedom. She paved the way for Iowa's abortion ban and even co-sponsored a nationwide ban with no exceptions in 2021.

Iowans deserve leaders who will defend their rights instead of partying with millionaires when they are taken away.

**[Christina Bohannan is in this race to be that leader. But to do that, we need you with us. clean_body: | = Peter, Just last week, a major anti-abortion group held a victory party to celebrate the budget passing — and in effect, the defunding of Planned Parenthood on a nationwide scale through a provision preventing patients on Medicaid from using their insurance at the clinic. And guess who showed up to celebrate? Mariannette Miller-Meeks. Peter, with its six-week abortion ban, Iowa is already a state with some of the strictest anti-abortion laws in the country, while also having the fewest OB-GYN specialists per capita in the United States. This bill will exacerbate an already mounting crisis in reproductive health care in our state. Four out of six established Planned Parenthood clinics in Iowa are expected to close. Along with abortions, defunding Planned Parenthood puts other critical services out of reach for hundreds of thousands of Iowans, including cancer screenings, STI treatments, pap smears, HPV vaccines, and so much more. While women across Iowa are trying to figure out what this bill means for their access to reproductive care, Mariannette Miller-Meeks is sipping champagne and calling it a win. But this really shouldn't surprise us. Over and over again, Mariannette Miller-Meeks has voted against reproductive freedom. She paved the way for Iowa's abortion ban and even co-sponsored a nationwide ban with no exceptions in 2021. Iowans deserve leaders who will defend their rights instead of partying with millionaires when they are taken away. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will # [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39918%2E3422442%2ECic3ra)
Peter,
Republican candidate Steve Hilton just released a poll showing himself ahead in the race to be California’s next Governor. 🚨
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250723_1_ak?refcode=em20250723-39918&refcode2=39918_3422442_Cic3ra&akid=39918%2E3422442%2ECic3ra)
Let’s be real, Katie feels people's frustration. Costs keep going up and buying a home or affording child care feels out of reach for so many people.
That’s why as Governor, Katie will be laser focused on bringing down our biggest costs and tackling our housing affordability crisis. She’s a consumer protection attorney who will hold bad guys accountable and fight for families like yours.
We need Democrat Katie Porter as California’s next Governor—she’ll stand up to Trump’s bullying, protect our civil rights, and lead the fight against climate change. **Steve Hilton will only lead the Trump takeover of California.**
But to get that message out to voters, we need your help. There are more than 22 million registered voters in California, so reaching the number of folks we need to win is expensive.
**[Can we count on you to rush $5, $15, or whatever you can afford right now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250723_1_ak?refcode=em20250723-39918&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39918_3422442_Cic3ra&akid=39918%2E3422442%2ECic3ra)**

Thank you,
Team Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250723-39918&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39918_3422442_Cic3ra&akid=39918%2E3422442%2ECic3ra)**

clean_body: Peter, Republican candidate Steve Hilton just released a poll showing himself ahead in the race to be California’s next Governor. 🚨 Let’s be real, Katie feels people's frustration. Costs keep going up and buying a home or affording child care feels out of reach for so many people. That’s why as Governor, Katie will be laser focused on bringing down our biggest costs and tackling our housing affordability crisis. She’s a consumer protection attorney who will hold bad guys accountable and fight for families like yours. We need Democrat Katie Porter as California’s next Governor—she’ll stand up to Trump’s bullying, protect our civil rights, and lead the fight against climate change. Steve Hilton will only lead the Trump takeover of California. But to get that message out to voters, we need your help. There are more than 22 million registered voters in California, so reaching the number of folks we need to win is expensive. Thank you, Team Katie Porter Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change.

subject: An attack on our right to vote

Peter –

There is a dangerous attack on our democracy happening in Texas right now.

Republicans in Washington, DC have ordered Texas officials to push for the redistricting of their current Congressional lines. Without planning, without notice, or without thought, Republicans ordered a special session in the Texas Legislature to do just that. Here’s why this is so dangerous:

Redistricting in states is supposed to happen after our ten-year census is counted. Lines are meant to reflect population changes, to ensure every district in every state is fair and voters have an equal chance to have their voice heard. **But Donald Trump is directing Republicans to redraw lines out of turn to ensure they can pad their numbers in the House.**

This is a gross misuse of power. Republicans know how critical ruby red Texas is to holding on to their majority. And with only 3 seats needed for Democrats to flip the House, Republicans will stop at nothing to keep the power in their hands – even if it means silencing Democratic voters in one of the largest states in the country.

States themselves are in charge of redistricting. For Donald Trump to use his federal authority to demand Texas enter the redistricting process would mean our democracy itself is being threatened.

We’ve heard from so many of this grassroots team that voting rights and our democracy are a top priority. Protecting our sacred right to vote and our Founding Fathers’ intentions for equal representation is now more crucial than ever.

**[Will you chip in today to help Kim flip the House and stop this Republican breach of power? subject: Beto’s back on the road
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Beto’s been back on the road, hosting town halls across Texas and the
country.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250723-1.s97F2J&refcode=ema20250723-240237&t=1002&akid=240237%2E444211%2EouVNlX ]A screenshot of Beto O'Rourke's Instagram story. It shows a road in a
town with an orange sunset behind it.

Why? Because when Democrats show up and listen to what people have to
say—especially in places that are too often overlooked—we build trust,
uncover shared values, and figure out the path forward together.

It doesn’t matter how red or blue your hometown is. The only way to
overcome the extremism of this administration and build something better
is by coming together and organizing community by community.

But staying on the road takes serious resources. If we’re going to keep up
the fight, we need help putting gas in the tanks so we can make sure these
town halls are a success.

name: Stasha Rhodes, United for Democracy
subject: The hits just keep coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
After a brutal summer of attacking democracy, the Supreme Court is coming back for more. | |
---
Peter, Justice Sotomayor summed up the Supreme Court’s brutal summer of attacking our democracy best: “The [Trump] administration has the Supreme Court on speed dial.” **The Supreme Court just got done stripping rights away from trans people, gutting the powers of the judiciary branch, greenlighting Trump’s illegal activity, and elevating him to king status.** They’re already coming back for more. The MAGA justices on the Supreme Court have spent the last few weeks abusing the power of the “shadow docket.” And they just announced cases they’ll hear in October. **They’ve already used shadow dockets to let Trump dismantle the Department of Education, deport immigrants to countries they’ve never set foot in, and fire federal employees en masse.** And because they used the shadow docket, they heard no oral arguments and offered virtually zero explanation. **The cases they announced for their October term are chilling, too.** The first case folds to right-wing culture warriors who want to ban trans kids from competing in sports—despite the fact that you can count the number of trans youth athletes in America on one hand. The second case sets up an erosion of what’s left of our campaign finance laws—and could open the floodgates even further to billionaires and dark money corrupting our elections. **United for Democracy’s team of experts believes birthright citizenship and the ability of Trump to revoke American citizenship is likely to come before the Court soon as well.** We have a huge fight on our hands. The MAGA Supreme Court has already issued several decisions that attack our very democracy, and there are more to come. [**United for Democracy is leading the fight to keep the spotlight squarely on the Supreme Court, mobilize our allies and activists, and make it clear that our democracy belongs to us—not Donald Trump, right-wing extremists, and their billionaire backers. Donate today to power our efforts!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtlVcukP5KSfp4Jk2pf6a9V-HY_9_eYseBE5ZIcIvbbPdtb3qNsIHHWIKkpDkzPCX9xx4yaUO5EgBIlqszOsTEGXuOhkWOwelNyJR48Ms7TCwgcF8qH6oGUchbppiTnazmC8AvT43EPfMh3dwv8l49sDCVu94vDAoOxb26RrHX-Jmly2Df4faum3DpXWByhJusZcGr5lDEXC2_vXgDjL0zIzjWg1HlsdVfPbOAmarDw2cByJ2zK7t4kdSJpqTAE4jCq2T-PmMvyvzP3umJ-zovMpTEoVBQ4uNxmhwJxfWHZ8OZlBXG-IeSn11HNabDzXIQ/4if/S645njfGRqayp9E3npZyMw/h0/h001.dKUHxvtyzew3Cl41dG4-mcAIxV4AJj5tUvYlGzdmClA) Thank you for holding the MAGA Supreme Court accountable, Stasha Rhodes

name: Team Kaptur
subject: What "grassroots" really means:
body:
No corporate PACs. No dark money. Just pure grassroots people power.

| |
---
Friend, Election after election, we find ourselves up against MAGA opponents with millions of dollars in special interest cash. **Last year, national Republicans and corporate special interest groups spent a shocking $25 million on our race.** We know they're going to try to buy this seat again, friend. **But Ohio isn't up for sale.** That's why we're fighting back with real, grassroots, people power. Our campaign is powered by teachers, nurses, firefighters, and auto workers — regular people chipping in a few dollars at a time to help build a better future. **[That's what a grassroots campaign really looks like. name: Dr. Maxine Dexter, M.D.
subject: We are facing a deadly brain drain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maxine for Congress
body:
https://maxinefororegon.com/ [https://maxinefororegon.com/]
Dear Peter,
This news took my breath away:
azcentral.com/story/news/local/arizona-education/2025/07/06/university-of-arizona-cancer-lab-crowdfunding/84439427007/ [azcentral.com/story/news/local/arizona-education/2025/07/06/university-of-arizona-cancer-lab-crowdfunding/84439427007/]
You read that correctly, a university cancer lab, which researches metastatic breast cancer, is asking the community for help keeping the lights on after Trump and the Republicans yanked their funding away.
The University of Arizona alone expects to lose more than $40.5 million in annual National Institute of Health research funding. That means fewer medical breakthroughs, fewer technological advances, and more families left without hope—all because of cruelty disguised as policy.
These scientists have dedicated their lives to saving ours, and now their work and our futures are on the chopping block.
These are lifesaving treatments that could save hundreds of thousands of lives.
Instead, Trump and the GOP are prioritizing tax cuts for their wealthy donors.
But we are not powerless. We can build a coalition of doctors, scientists, and truth-tellers who actually care about people—and push back hard against this inhumanity. If you're with me, chip in whatever you can today to build a movement to fight back. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=X_250723_AZLab_actrs]
CHIP IN TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=X_250723_AZLab_actrs]
Enraged,
Dr. Maxine Dexter, M.D.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=X_250723_AZLab_actrs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=X_250723_AZLab_actrs] Maxine Dexter is a critical care physician with decades of experience using facts and following science to help her patients.
Now she's using those skills in Congress to ensure healthy communities by standing up to Big Pharma, fighting climate change, and expanding reproductive rights, as well as rebuilding a fair economy for all by protecting Social Security and Medicare.
To learn more about Maxine, visit MaxineForOregon.com [https://maxinefororegon.com/] .

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112004655/559108808/631141807?refcode=em-7.23.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDE2YTFiOS0wNjY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o882rf2NwMJu-ATaAqr-gKDlEOgFlzjqZY_TFiSA88o=&emci=ae78eb80-0168-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=3416a1b9-0668-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=13891387)
Late last week, House Republicans once again bowed to the MAGA agenda and surrendered Congress’ Constitutional right of the power of the purse:

**Over a billion dollars in already-approved spending for public broadcasting including PBS and NPR was unceremoniously cut.**

This will disproportionately affect rural communities across Central and Southern Illinois. Local radio and TV stations will be on the chopping block – and thousands are in danger of losing access to news and other educational programming.

This is reckless and wrong. Even some Republicans stood against this decision that not only jeopardizes public broadcasting, but signals that Trump can override Congress whenever he feels like.

**[If you’re with me, please sign my petition to stand up for public broadcasting and against the irresponsible decisions of House Republicans and the White House that weaken our rural communities.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112004656/559108809/631141807?refcode=em-7.23.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDE2YTFiOS0wNjY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o882rf2NwMJu-ATaAqr-gKDlEOgFlzjqZY_TFiSA88o=&emci=ae78eb80-0168-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=3416a1b9-0668-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=13891387)**

clean_body: | = I need to make sure you didn’t miss this, friend. Late last week, House Republicans once again bowed to the MAGA agenda and surrendered Congress’ Constitutional right of the power of the purse: Over a billion dollars in already-approved spending for public broadcasting including PBS and NPR was unceremoniously cut. This will disproportionately affect rural communities across Central and Southern Illinois. Local radio and TV stations will be on the chopping block – and thousands are in danger of losing access to news and other educational programming. This is reckless and wrong. Even some Republicans stood against this decision that not only jeopardizes public broadcasting, but signals that Trump can override Congress whenever he feels like. | Thank you, Nikki = | = = = Nikki is a champion for working families – from leading the fight to pass a $15 minimum wage in Illinois, to bringing manufacturing back to America. name: All On The Line
subject: ❗Tonight’s emergency Texas briefing
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
There’s still time left to register!
|
---

Peter, we just wanted to make sure you didn’t miss the chance to register for tonight’s emergency briefing co-hosted by our affiliate, the NDRC, on Texas redistricting.
The event will take place live on Facebook and YouTube at 7:00 pm ET. A.G. Holder will be joined by special guests, including Democratic House Leader Hakeem Jeffries, Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi, Congressman Greg Casar (TX-35), and Texas House Democratic Caucus Chair, Representative Gene Wu to lay out the stakes in this fight and our strategy to push back. [**Use this link to watch the livestream on the NDRC’s YouTube!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112005520/559111809/-1794448058?refcode=sign_aotl_tier1_email_TXBriefing2_email_20250723-AOTL-Tier1-TXBriefing2_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=sign&utm_content=20250723-AOTL-Tier1-TXBriefing2_&utm_campaign=TXBriefing2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhkNDY5YmFlLTA4NjgtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6reI6kiP40Zgy-5QEoeN5zxVx1j1zGwasKNCOEh6hoU=&emci=af4c8ff6-ed67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=8d469bae-0868-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8431045)
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: All On The Line
Date: Tues, July 22, 2025
Subject: You’re Invited: Emergency Texas Briefing tomorrow
**Join us virtually tomorrow at 7:00pm ET for an emergency Texas redistricting briefing!**
Folks,
Right now, a special legislative session is underway in Texas, where conservatives — at the direction of Donald Trump — are aiming to draw an even more egregiously gerrymandered congressional map.
The reality is, what happens in Texas will have broad implications for the rest of the country. All On The Line has been mobilizing supporters to fight back against this brazen power grab.
[**We invite you to join us and our affiliate, the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, for a special Texas emergency briefing tomorrow at 7:00 pm ET.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112005521/559111810/-1794448058?refcode=sign_aotl_tier1_email_TXBriefing2_email_20250723-AOTL-Tier1-TXBriefing2_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=sign&utm_content=20250723-AOTL-Tier1-TXBriefing2_&utm_campaign=TXBriefing2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhkNDY5YmFlLTA4NjgtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6reI6kiP40Zgy-5QEoeN5zxVx1j1zGwasKNCOEh6hoU=&emci=af4c8ff6-ed67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=8d469bae-0868-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8431045)** **_A.G. Eric Holder will be joined by House Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries, Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi, Congressman Greg Casar (TX-35), and Texas House Democratic Caucus Chair, Representative Gene Wu to discuss what’s at stake in Texas and our plan to fight back for fair maps and fair representation — together._
**What:** Stop The Texas Takeover: A Live Event With AG Eric Holder and Special Guests

clean_body: There’s still time left to register! | Peter, we just wanted to make sure you didn’t miss the chance to register for tonight’s emergency briefing co-hosted by our affiliate, the NDRC, on Texas redistricting. The event will take place live on Facebook and YouTube at 7:00 pm ET. A.G. Holder will be joined by special guests, including Democratic House Leader Hakeem Jeffries, Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi, Congressman Greg Casar (TX-35), and Texas House Democratic Caucus Chair, Representative Gene Wu to lay out the stakes in this fight and our strategy to push back. \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: All On The Line Date: Tues, July 22, 2025 Subject: You’re Invited: Emergency Texas Briefing tomorrow Join us virtually tomorrow at 7:00pm ET for an emergency Texas redistricting briefing! Folks, Right now, a special legislative session is underway in Texas, where conservatives — at the direction of Donald Trump — are aiming to draw an even more egregiously gerrymandered congressional map. The reality is, what happens in Texas will have broad implications for the rest of the country. All On The Line has been mobilizing supporters to fight back against this brazen power grab. A.G. Eric Holder will be joined by House Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries, Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi, Congressman Greg Casar (TX-35), and Texas House Democratic Caucus Chair, Representative Gene Wu to discuss what’s at stake in Texas and our plan to fight back for fair maps and fair representation — together. What: Stop The Texas Takeover: A Live Event With AG Eric Holder and Special Guests When: Wednesday, July 23 | 7:00 pm ET Where: Register on Mobilize We are building a strong coalition to safeguard our democracy, protect fair maps, and combat ongoing gerrymandering in Texas and nationwide. We hope to see you there! name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: A quick update on your Membership
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj205gesnfaa8lfpfocbalq783fjf1yq5kgwyx3m8wy2xfqqn6guqjalr9lnl4renlv6p0o1l0j88twythrjw&__stmp=szvep7&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szvep7&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol03dylaxheej4fshv97kafkzpya18am7lguf1cfwino2hsglcfzyow1ugk1uc1bznoyhw1gcas1htdxsy1lqj3a76yxou1d55ht7fv8ldgxuqugl1pm8749exhmj6punb680pjxwpbs&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szvep7&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szvep7&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szvep7&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szvep7&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol03dylaxheej4fshv97kafkzpya18am7lguf1cfwino2hsglcfzyow1ugk1uc1bznoyhw1gcas1htdxsy1lqj3a76yxou1d55ht7fv8ldgxuqugl1pm8749exhmj6punb680pjxwpbs&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szvep7&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szvep7&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: A right-wing Super PAC just launched a massive $5 million ad buy attacking me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO
body:
Republicans are going to spare no expense and try every dirty trick in the book to defeat me.

Hey folks, it’s Jon. _This just in:_ A right-wing Super PAC just launched a massive __**$5 million**__ ad buy attacking me. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112005712/559112436/1759209281?refcode=email_072325_ossoff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDM1Yjk4NS0wOTY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j6Tn6AajH8iFt8FdAhk5tZZPAw-XJSopdN7ZtwtYQjw=) If you already know the stakes of this race — and you’re ready to fight — please use this link to split a contribution between my re-election campaign and John Hickenlooper today: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ossoff-hickenlooper](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112005714/559112438/1759209281?refcode=email_072325_ossoff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDM1Yjk4NS0wOTY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j6Tn6AajH8iFt8FdAhk5tZZPAw-XJSopdN7ZtwtYQjw=)** Otherwise, here’s why your support is so important to my campaign, especially today. This new wave of attack ads is only just the beginning. In the months ahead, Republicans are going to spare no expense and try every dirty trick in the book to defeat me. Because if they win here in Georgia, they don’t just expand their Senate majority — _they lock it in for the long-term._ With that power, Trump’s last constraints in the Senate vanish. What’s left is total submission. No oversight. No brakes on extremist nominees. No guardrails when he comes for the rule of law. So all eyes are on our race here in Georgia — and the entire country is counting on us, not only to hold the line, but also to send a clear message: Americans won’t stand by while this administration dismantles Medicaid, and defunds hospitals and nursing homes. We won’t stand down while they violate fundamental human and civil rights. And we won’t be silent as Trump launches a power grab unprecedented in our history. I will fight, and I _will_ win. But I can’t do it alone. **[So please, split a donation of $10 — or whatever you are in a place to give — between my re-election campaign and John Hickenlooper to help me fight back against these attacks and defend this seat.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112005716/559112440/1759209281?refcode=email_072325_ossoff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDM1Yjk4NS0wOTY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j6Tn6AajH8iFt8FdAhk5tZZPAw-XJSopdN7ZtwtYQjw=)** | | [SPLIT A DONATION →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112005717/559112442/1759209281?refcode=email_072325_ossoff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDM1Yjk4NS0wOTY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j6Tn6AajH8iFt8FdAhk5tZZPAw-XJSopdN7ZtwtYQjw=)

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: Investing in the next generation of Democratic organizers and leaders
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250723-1440-foote&t=1001&akid=1440%2E342411%2EaewO7L ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

While this may be an off-year, the Squad isn’t slowing down. In fact, our
progressive champions are doing the work right now to build something
bigger than any one campaign — they’re investing in the next generation of
Democratic organizers and leaders.

Across the country, their Democracy Summer Fellows programs are training
young people to organize, lead, and win. These fellowships aren’t just
internships; they’re launchpads for lifelong careers in movement politics.

🧠 These programs are about bench-building.

📋 They’re about on-the-ground organizing, community building, and
educating the public to fight back against the far right’s attacks on
our democracy.

💪 They’re about growing power that lasts beyond one cycle.

And the results? Incredibly inspiring. Fellows are already helping
organize communities, combat online propaganda and disinformation, and
bring new voters into the process. They’re getting hands-on experience —
and learning from some of the most effective progressive teams in the
country.

But here’s the thing: These programs only work with grassroots support,
which is why we’re asking for your help today.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250723-movement.NNURZJ&refcode=em20250723-1440&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1440%2E342411%2EaewO7L ]Can you pitch in $3 to the Squad Victory Fund today to
keep programs like this strong? We’re building grassroots power not just
for 2025 and 2026, but for the next decade.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250723-movement.NNURZJ&refcode=em20250723-1440&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1440%2E342411%2EaewO7L ]Contribute ››

Let’s keep going,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1440%2E342411%2EaewO7L

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Punk Rocker
subject: Apparently, hope isn’t “edgy” enough anymore
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Weil, Democrat for US Senate
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.41.25%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Friend,
I’ve been thinking a lot about the new Superman movie (not just because my kids won’t stop trying to “activate” their laser eyes.)
It’s because of the response. Some critics are already scoffing at it. Saying it’s too earnest. Too clean. That hope and kindness just aren’t “cool” anymore.
I’ve heard that same tone before, just not about superheroes. About campaigns like mine.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/70416F6135426E6F744D64713677552B5551754856314A366759364C467A30412B6A7955745161334C76553734487957574F2B48305152796E376C3843656367/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-07-23%20at%2012.20.35%E2%80%AFPM.png]
I’ve been told that running on solutions isn’t flashy enough.
That fighting for working families is too “boring.”
That caring about students and veterans doesn’t “move the needle.”
But here’s the truth: I’m not running to impress the loudest voices in the room. I’m running to fight for the people who’ve been ignored.
To make life better for the folks who can’t afford to play political games.
And I believe, like Superman, that hope is powerful .
That truth matters .
That showing up for people is what real strength looks like.
So if you’re ready to prove the cynics wrong...
Chip in here and power a campaign built on hope and action » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?refcode=NTLJUL23]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
Express Donate: $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
Express Donate: $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
Express Donate: $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]
You’ll be hearing more from me soon, because our work is just beginning. Let’s make it count.
Gratefully,
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.05.04%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Paid for by Josh Weil, Democrat for US Senate
Josh Weil for US Senate
5800 Beach Blvd. STE 203-337
Jacksonville, FL 32207
United States

name: Team Benson
subject: From every region of Michigan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=536%2E181023%2Ep4wpWS)
Hi team,
Jocelyn Benson is building a campaign rooted in solutions and the shared belief that Michigan should be the best place to be a kid, raise a family, and call home.
**Her message is resonating with people across Michigan, and that’s why we’re proud to share that local leaders across the state are endorsing Jocelyn’s campaign for Governor.**
Mayors. City Council Presidents. City Commissioners. State legislators. These are the people who know what it takes to lead. Day in and day out, they roll up their sleeves in city halls and county chambers across our state, solving problems and serving their communities. They represent our largest cities and smallest towns, delivering every day for the hard-working Michiganders who love this state.
**These leaders believe in Jocelyn and her message because she shares their approach: listen first, lead with purpose, and never stop fighting for the people you serve.**
This growing slate of endorsements is a powerful sign of our momentum, but it’s also a reminder that this campaign isn’t just about one person — it’s about all of us, working together to build a better future for Michigan.
[**Will you chip in today to help us keep moving forward? Jocelyn’s campaign depends on the contributions of grassroots supporters like you.**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q32025.OcO0Lx&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250723_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=536%2E181023%2Ep4wpWS)

name: Team Lizzie
subject: In Case You Missed It: Texas Redistricting Targets
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Lizzie Is On the List |
---

| | | | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112005967/559113332/532079548?refcode=lpfe250723&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjVhODcwMy0wYjY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gLgxAPiV2wVuhcI9vDrGe75ORhaTI0ws7pcqqMJ3QZ8=)
---
As you have seen, the Texas Legislature’s special session began this week and redrawing congressional districts is on the agenda in the House and the Senate.
What do those districts look like? We don’t know yet. ** But the Houston Chronicle, among others, has identified Texas’ Seventh Congressional District as a likely target for Republican mapmakers**.
Here’s what the Chronicle had to say about Lizzie and Texas 7:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112005968/559113333/532079548?refcode=lpfe250723&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjVhODcwMy0wYjY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gLgxAPiV2wVuhcI9vDrGe75ORhaTI0ws7pcqqMJ3QZ8=)
---
The goal of President Trump, enabled by Texas Republicans—is simple: redraw the lines to create as many Republican seats as possible.
We don’t know yet what the maps will look like, but we know for sure that we are in nothing less than an existential fight to protect Texans, Americans, and democracy itself.
If Republicans succeed in Texas, they will take this playbook across the country, as they have with other efforts. Team Lizzie will be here for the fight—to protect the people of Texas 7, the State of Texas, and the United States of America.
[_**Help us. Contribute today to help us fight back against these attacks on our district and our democracy.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112005969/559113334/532079548?refcode=lpfe250723&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjVhODcwMy0wYjY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gLgxAPiV2wVuhcI9vDrGe75ORhaTI0ws7pcqqMJ3QZ8=)
Thanks,
Team Lizzie

| | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112005970/559113335/532079548?refcode=lpfe250723&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjVhODcwMy0wYjY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gLgxAPiV2wVuhcI9vDrGe75ORhaTI0ws7pcqqMJ3QZ8=)**
---
| | **[VOLUNTEER](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112005971/559113336/-1283459233?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjVhODcwMy0wYjY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gLgxAPiV2wVuhcI9vDrGe75ORhaTI0ws7pcqqMJ3QZ8=&emci=027f7c0d-d767-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=765a8703-0b68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=30230943)**

**Team, the alarm bells have _never rung louder:_**

**FIRST:** Donald Trump called the free press the "enemy of the people."

**THEN:** He declared that networks with opposing viewpoints should be _shut down_ \-- even saying MSNBC "shouldn't even have a right to broadcast."

** AND NOW: Trump's _never_ been closer to getting his wish. With the stroke of a pen, he's about to cut over a BILLION DOLLARS in funding that supports NPR and PBS!**

_Your local station_ could be on the chopping block without this crucial support -- so it's up to ALL of us to fight back against the Republican senators who did this. We need YOU to sign on before our petition closes at midnight, so **please, this is _absolutely essential:_ **

**12,624 signatures still needed:****[Sign our petition to back independent journalism and tell us you stand with NPR and PBS against Trump's censorship>>](http://go.dscc.org/go/21920?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250723-NewsAlert-TrumpGutsMediaOutletsPetitionRF-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250723-NewsAlert-TrumpGutsMediaOutletsPetitionRF-ETG-sl1&akid=20822%2E9716520%2EnKBjz5)**

name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: This is what real leadership looks like
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Oscar’s story isn’t over — and neither is this fight.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250723-1&t=1&akid=2400%2E587540%2EkwOVIs)
Hi Peter,
You might remember Oscar De Los Santos — we endorsed him last cycle, and if you followed his race, you know why.
The son of immigrants, and a Rhodes scholar, now Oscar is fighting for working families in the Arizona legislature. That’s not just a powerful story — it’s exactly the kind of leadership we believe in.
We need **_more lawmakers_** who have **_actually lived the struggles_** so many of their constituents have experienced.
We endorsed Oscar because he represents something too rare in our politics: a young, bold leader who hasn’t forgotten who and what he’s fighting for.
Since his election, Oscar has rolled up his sleeves and made significant progress to:
🏥 Protect Medicaid
👪 Deliver Arizona’s largest investment in a decade to make child care more affordable
🏠 Create Homes for Heroes, a groundbreaking new initiative to end veteran homelessness
🍽️ Guarantee free school meals to public school students to ensure no child goes hungry
And much more!
We’re proud to have supported Oscar last cycle — and we’re just as proud to support the next candidate like him.
But the truth is candidates like Oscar face huge obstacles. They’re often outraised, underestimated, and written off.
Your support gives them a real path to victory, Peter.
**[Join us today and pitch in a $5 split donation between Oscar's campaign and Leaders We Deserve so we can continue to keep electing the next generation of leaders.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250723_1_oscar?refcode=em20250723-2400&amount=5&refcode2=2400_587540_kwOVIs&akid=2400%2E587540%2EkwOVIs)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250723_1_oscar?amount=5&refcode=em20250723-2400&refcode2=2400_587540_kwOVIs&akid=2400%2E587540%2EkwOVIs)**
Thanks for being in this fight,
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250723-1&t=2&refcode2=2400_587540_kwOVIs&akid=2400%2E587540%2EkwOVIs)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2400%2E587540%2EkwOVIs)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2400%2E587540%2EkwOVIs)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)

Team Jeffries

name: The DC Bugle
subject: Greg Gutfeld Stunned Viewers by Announcing This Death
body:

name: Dr. Ami Bera
subject: Join me in opposing this nonsense proposal to reopen Alcatraz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bera for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112006503/559115231/1773772131?source=EM_NBI_AB_20250723_PT_Alcatraz_0_3MO_AmiBera_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGU3YTE0Yy0wZDY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qATjSY40RfI2h0bqMTJmcZAufRKuJ9CtQYPOMi5LtYk=&emci=fbe6a14c-0d68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=04e7a14c-0d68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=32394541) Peter,

Attorney General Pam Bondi and Interior Secretary Doug Burgum toured Alcatraz and praised President Trump’s unhinged plan to reopen it. The prison closed more than 60 years ago for good reason — it proved to be extraordinarily expensive to operate due to its isolation and exposure to the marine environment. Today, Alcatraz is one of the Bay Area’s most well-known tourist destinations, drawing over 1.4 million annual visitors and generating over $60 million in revenue each year.

The National Park Service has done an incredible job in maintaining the island as a sightseeing destination, but it’s nowhere near the condition required to operate as a federal penitentiary. The entire structure would have to be demolished and rebuilt in service of the President’s whims — a plan that is as expensive as it is unrealistic.

[**Peter, can you please join me in opposing this nonsense proposal to reopen Alcatraz by signing onto my petition today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112006504/559115232/1773772131?source=EM_NBI_AB_20250723_PT_Alcatraz_0_3MO_AmiBera_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGU3YTE0Yy0wZDY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qATjSY40RfI2h0bqMTJmcZAufRKuJ9CtQYPOMi5LtYk=&emci=fbe6a14c-0d68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=04e7a14c-0d68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=32394541)
| | [SIGN ON »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112006505/559115233/-941450236?source=EM_NBI_AB_20250723_PT_Alcatraz_0_3MO_AmiBera_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGU3YTE0Yy0wZDY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qATjSY40RfI2h0bqMTJmcZAufRKuJ9CtQYPOMi5LtYk=&emci=fbe6a14c-0d68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=04e7a14c-0d68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=32394541)
---

The Trump administration has shown nothing but hostility and contempt for California, our nation’s most populous and prosperous state. Our tax dollars subsidize the rest of the country, and we deserve partners in Washington who work together in good faith on shared priorities. This latest stunt is unproductive and indicative of the President’s entire approach to California — **to Trump, our state represents nothing more than a photo op.**

[**Thank you for taking a moment to sign my petition opposing this ridiculous scheme.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112006506/559115234/1773772131?source=EM_NBI_AB_20250723_PT_Alcatraz_0_3MO_AmiBera_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGU3YTE0Yy0wZDY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qATjSY40RfI2h0bqMTJmcZAufRKuJ9CtQYPOMi5LtYk=&emci=fbe6a14c-0d68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=04e7a14c-0d68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=32394541)

Dr. Ami Bera

clean_body: | Peter, Attorney General Pam Bondi and Interior Secretary Doug Burgum toured Alcatraz and praised President Trump’s unhinged plan to reopen it. The prison closed more than 60 years ago for good reason — it proved to be extraordinarily expensive to operate due to its isolation and exposure to the marine environment. Today, Alcatraz is one of the Bay Area’s most well-known tourist destinations, drawing over 1.4 million annual visitors and generating over $60 million in revenue each year. The National Park Service has done an incredible job in maintaining the island as a sightseeing destination, but it’s nowhere near the condition required to operate as a federal penitentiary. The entire structure would have to be demolished and rebuilt in service of the President’s whims — a plan that is as expensive as it is unrealistic. | | The Trump administration has shown nothing but hostility and contempt for California, our nation’s most populous and prosperous state. Our tax dollars subsidize the rest of the country, and we deserve partners in Washington who work together in good faith on shared priorities. This latest stunt is unproductive and indicative of the President’s entire approach to California — to Trump, our state represents nothing more than a photo op. Be well, Dr. Ami Bera If you’d like to receive less email from our team If you'd like to stop receiving our emails, Paid for by Bera for Congress Bera for Congress PO Box 582496 Elk Grove, CA 95758 United States **

name: Team Jayapal
subject: Alligator Alcatraz is subjecting immigrants to some of the worst conditions imaginable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The recently opened “Alligator Alcatraz” facility that Trump has championed is subjecting immigrants to some of the worst conditions imaginable.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250723-5269-footer&t=1&akid=5269%2E420207%2ECS-MKe)
Peter,
**Right now our democracy is being put to the test.** The recently opened “Alligator Alcatraz” facility that Trump has championed is subjecting immigrants to some of the worst conditions imaginable, and our government is doing nothing to stop it.
According to news reports and first-hand accounts, detainees have dealt with:
* Worms in their food
* Flooding and mosquito swarms in the facility
* Toilets that don’t flush, with raw sewage pooling near the bunk beds
* Air conditioners that randomly shut off
* Having their phone calls to lawyers and loved ones recorded

**Many of those inside the facility have no criminal record, and some are minors. It’s cruelty for the sake of cruelty, violating the basic human rights of those detained there.**
Pramila hasn’t been shy about speaking out against the Trump administration’s cruel treatment of immigrants, and she’s not stopping now.
She recently introduced legislation to end ICE’s illegal targeting of US citizens, and **she’s going to continue speaking out** to defend dignity and human rights for _everyone._
But Pramila can’t do it alone. Since she doesn’t take corporate PAC money, she’s counting on grassroots supporters like you to keep her in Congress fighting for us.
[**Will you pitch in $3 or anything you can to help Pramila keep standing up to ICE and fighting for the rights and dignity of _all_ people in this country?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250723-1?refcode=em20250723-5269&amount=3&refcode2=5269_420207_CS-MKe&akid=5269%2E420207%2ECS-MKe)

In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

name: Deb Haaland
subject: I want to share this with you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
I’m running to make life easier for our families and the future brighter for our kids.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=3354%2E400544%2EZWamD8)
In a moment, I’m going to ask if you can [**make a contribution**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250723_1_running?refcode=em20250723-3354&refcode2=3354_400544_ZWamD8&akid=3354%2E400544%2EZWamD8) to our campaign.
First, I want to share why I’m running for Governor of New Mexico.
As a 35th-generation New Mexican, I know firsthand the struggles that New Mexicans face. I understand what it's like to be a single mother, having to decide between rent and groceries, struggling to keep a roof over your head.
I’m running to make life easier for our families and the future brighter for our kids.
My campaign is about lowering costs, making rent and housing affordable, strengthening our schools, and preventing crimes so that you feel safe raising a family here. This is the future we all want and deserve for our beautiful state.
The solutions are there if we are bold enough to choose them.
But we know we’ll have to build a strong campaign to get the future we deserve, and I can’t do it without supporters like you. **Unfortunately, we’ve hit a summer slump and our grassroots fundraising has fallen off track.**
**[That’s why I’m asking: Will you make a donation today to help us beat this slump, continue growing our campaign, and win this open seat? I’m hoping to see your name on the list of people who pitch in!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250723_1_running?refcode=em20250723-3354&refcode2=3354_400544_ZWamD8&akid=3354%2E400544%2EZWamD8)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250723_1_running?amount=5&refcode=em20250723-3354&refcode2=3354_400544_ZWamD8&akid=3354%2E400544%2EZWamD8)**
With your donation, we can continue to reach voters across New Mexico with our message.
Thank you for your generosity and support.
Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250723-1&t=2&refcode2=3354_400544_ZWamD8&akid=3354%2E400544%2EZWamD8)**

body:
https://www.politivistaction.com [https://www.politivistaction.com]
Peter,
Movement for Freedom is officially activated, and we’re not wasting any time.
There’s too much work to do to make up for lost time when too many of our communities have been left behind.
Movement for Freedom is here to change that. We break down the systems. We expose the lies. And we give our people the tools to organize and fight back.
So, Peter, join us next Tuesday, July 29th, for the official Movement for Freedom launch webinar. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/8UNzC5NzbEizdzOzGYA7FA2] The webinar will begin at 7 pm CST/8 pm EST, and because of limited space the Zoom link will be sent closer to the event!
RSVP TODAY [https://secure.ngpvan.com/8UNzC5NzbEizdzOzGYA7FA2]
This isn’t just a conversation, it’s a blueprint for collective liberation. For transforming systems that were never built for us into ones that center justice, healing, and truth.
I’ll be joined by some of my favorite movement leaders, Congresswoman Cori Bush, Congressman Jamaal Bowman, and youth organizer Vincent Vertuccio , to talk about how we’re eliciting change through organization, outreach, and community.

_Sykes HQ_

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **

name: Stand with Gov. Newsom! (via VPP)
subject: Newsom fights BACK! >>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
... But MAGA Republicans are FURIOUS!
| Folks, Gavin Newsom continues to fight back against MAGA extremism: [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92390?t=6&akid=20704%2E878179%2Ev8qexr) We’re THRILLED he’s so bravely standing up to Trump — but MAGA Republicans are FURIOUS, _and attacking him relentlessly._

[**We’re rounding up urgent signatures to stand with Gavin Newsom in the face of MAGA attacks — Please: Add your name to stand with Governor Gavin Newsom! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92390?t=7&akid=20704%2E878179%2Ev8qexr) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92390?t=8&akid=20704%2E878179%2Ev8qexr)
---
TO: Governor Gavin Newsom
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. Dear Governor Newsom,

_Thank you so much for standing up for what’s right — even when it’s unpopular and makes you a target for MAGA extremists!_

**MAGA Republicans are already furious with you, but you are showing them you won’t back down. We need more heroes like you!**

Republicans are plotting to END Social Security and Medicaid, DESTROY the federal government, and make Trump an untouchable KING — but you’re working tirelessly to stop them, and we’re so grateful.

**I know that Trump has put a MASSIVE target on your back — so it means the world that you refuse to step down and let them get away with this.**

I’m doing everything in my power to protect Democrats like you who are brave enough to face Trump head-on and risk MAGA revenge.

[**I know you’re facing relentless attacks from Trump and his MAGA minions, so I’m signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to help Democrats keep fighting for justice »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92390?t=9&akid=20704%2E878179%2Ev8qexr) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92390?t=10&akid=20704%2E878179%2Ev8qexr)
---
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92390?t=11&akid=20704%2E878179%2Ev8qexr)
**_X A proud Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20704%2E878179%2Ev8qexr). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20704%2E878179%2Ev8qexr).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20704%2E878179%2Ev8qexr) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=20704%2E878179%2Ev8qexr). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20704%2E878179%2Ev8qexr)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=20704%2E878179%2Ev8qexr)

_Peter, this is Mazie. Below is a message from my colleague Sen. Jon Ossoff, who is running for re-election in Georgia. Please read his message below._
* * *
Hey Peter, it’s Jon. This just in: A right-wing Super PAC just launched a massive __**$5 million**__ ad buy attacking me. This new wave of attack ads is only just the beginning, Peter. In the months ahead, Republicans are going to spare no expense and try every dirty trick in the book to defeat me. Because if they win here in Georgia, they don’t just expand their Senate majority — _they lock it in for the long-term._ With that power, Trump’s last constraints in the Senate vanish. What’s left is total submission. No oversight. No brakes on extremist nominees. No guardrails when he comes for the rule of law. So all eyes are on our race here in Georgia — and the entire country is counting on us, not only to hold the line, but also to send a clear message: Americans won’t stand by while this administration dismantles Medicaid and defunds hospitals and nursing homes. We won’t stand down while they violate fundamental human and civil rights. And we won’t be silent as Trump launches a power grab unprecedented in our history. I will fight, and I _will_ win. Check out the great sponsors of today's show:
**Firecracker Farms**
Everything's better with HOT SALT. Firecracker Farms hot salt is hand crafted on their family farm with Carolina Reaper, Ghost and Trinidad Scorpion peppers. This is a balanced, deep flavor pairs perfect with your favorite foods. Whether it's eggs, steaks veggies or even your favorite beverage, Firecracker Farms hot salt is what you've been missing. Just head to https://firecracker.farm/ use code word: SEAN for a discount. Unlock the flavor in your food now!
**Masa Chips**
You're probably watching the Sean Spicer Show right now and thinking "hmm, I wish I had something healthy and satisfying to snack on..." Well Masa Chips are exactly what you are looking for. Big corporations use cheap nasty seed oils that can cause inflammation and health issues. Masa cut out all the bad stuff and created a tortilla chip with just 3 ingredients: organic nixtamalized corn, sea salt, and 100 percent grass-fed beef tallow. Snacking on MASA chips feels different--you feel satisfied, light, and energetic, with no crash, bloat, or sluggishness. So head to https://MASAChips.com/SEAN to get 25% off your first order.
President Trump announced a historic trade deal with Japan, followed by deals with both Indonesia and the Philippines. The deal with Japan will bring in $500 billion into the United States, in which the U.S. will keep 90% of the profits. This also opens up the country to trading cars, trucks, rice and agricultural products. The U.S. Olympics Committee banned transgender athletes from competing in women's sports. The ruling directly cited President Trump's executive order 14201 which is intended to "protect opportunities for women and girls to compete in safe and fair sports." Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard released a report of the most egregious weaponization and politicization of intelligence in American history, all directed by Barack Obama. The new evidence in relation to the Russia hoax points a damning finger at the former president of the United States. It shows that the real intel revealed that Russia lacked the intent and ability to hack a U.S. election. The Obama administration ignored this truth and instead held a secret meeting to created the Russia hoax at the direction of President Obama. John Solomon from Just The News walks us through the entire timeline of events. Now that this evidence is at the department of justice, will a strikeforce be created by Pam Bondi and Kash Patel. Will President Obama be indicted?
Featuring:
**John Solomon**
Founder | Just The News

name: Fight back! [DOTL]
subject: 3 seats. One chance to flip the House. Have you joined yet?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
Peter — We need you in this fight to stop Trump’s House takeover

|
---

[Hey Peter, this is the last time you’ll hear from me today, so I hope you’ll read this whole email and consider chipping in $1 or $3 when you get to the end.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112007223/559118139/-721819307?amount=1&amounts=1,3,7,12&refcode=RTFC_20250723_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODIzMTU1ZS0xMDY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sY7VHbvmFGyBBh6pe01J0HXTrSo3S-x6J3gMFJ-uy7w=)

I’m not sure you know how far a donation to this movement goes, Peter.

Unlike most of my colleagues, I don’t do a second of ‘call time’ — i.e. _spending hours on the phone begging donors for big checks_ — so your donations of any amount keep the wheels turning on this people-powered movement.

**If we keep building this grassroots coalition, even just $1 or $3 at a time, we can see the bold changes you sent me to Congress to fight for. But I need your help, Peter.**

With less than 6 hours left until midnight, we’re $2,122 short of our $7,500 goal.

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.
