name: Chrissy Houlahan
subject: July Update for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
My updates from the last few weeks.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112007260/559118318/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDIzMTU1ZS0xMDY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uqXGGDF-sHU35OyJNzZxSzqM_Bn_losRM4JQj7JYe8Y=&emci=b0655ed6-de67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=2023155e-1068-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=21278485)
---
| | **A NOTE FROM CHRISSY**
---
| | **I voted "No" on the Republican budget bill**
---
Joe Biden was fond of saying “Don’t tell me what you value, show me your budget and I’ll tell _you_ what you value.” Republicans in Washington, D.C., just showed us – through their budget bill – that they don’t value those people who need healthcare but can’t afford it, anyone who lives in a rural area who needs healthcare, anyone on SNAP (food stamps), people with graduate school loans, or anyone hoping for lower energy costs and more green energy options.

But that’s not all. The Republican bill rewards the very rich while exploding our national debt. This bill is a betrayal of our American values and a betrayal of pre–Trump Republicans (remember them??) who valued limited government and fiscal responsibility. It’s no wonder that two Republicans joined every single Democrat in voting against this bill.
---
| | **Voting “Yes” for Servicemen and Women**
---
Every year, I successfully push dozens of my priorities across the finish line to become law – like more paid family leave, improving child care for military families, and better cyber training for our servicemembers. Despite this hyperpolarized political environment, I think I’ll be able to do the same again this year. The first step in this process happened on July 15 when the House Armed Services Committee began debating and amending the annual defense bill (aka the NDAA).

As the most senior Democrat on the Military Personnel Subcommittee, I was able to get 31 of my initiatives into the bill covering many issues, including improvements to biosecurity, schools on military bases, and women’s healthcare.
---
| | **Leading on Biotech and Biosecurity**
---
A few years ago, I passed legislation that created the National Security Commission on Emerging Biotechnology. The world had shut down due to the rapid global spread of a virus, and we understood how vulnerable our health, our economy, and our national security could be to that kind of threat. We needed – and still do – to be able to say never again. The Commission released its comprehensive assessment to Congress in April – the short version is there is work to be done – so I started the BIOTech Caucus to raise awareness of the strength of other countries (like China) and to promote solutions that foster domestic innovation and improve our national security.
---
| | **Strengthening Transatlantic Ties**
---
Our national security is strengthened by good relationships around the world, and European countries are some of our oldest and strongest allies. That’s why I was honored to be selected recently as co-chair of the Congressional Study Group on Europe. The Congressional Study Groups are long–standing nonpartisan initiatives that strengthen international ties and cooperation through dialogue and exchange programs.
---
| | **democrats are FIGHTING BACK**
---
Democrats are fighting back every way we know how, and despite what the President and his Republican enablers want us to think, we're winning in some places and laying the groundwork for winning this November and next. I hope you had a chance to read the emails from my friends, **Rep. Mikie Sherrill** , who just won her primary for New Jersey Governor, and **Janelle Stelson** , who currently holds a slight lead against her Republican opponent – election denier Scott Perry – for a U.S. House seat.
---
We're also beating President Trump in the courts: Over 320 lawsuits have been filed challenging this administration’s actions, and federal courts have issued over 200 orders blocking the administration’s illegal and unconstitutional actions. As long as President Trump, his Republican enablers, and his MAGA allies continue to undermine our values, make us less safe, and roll back our freedoms while enriching themselves, we’ll keep fighting.
---
| | **In Case You Missed It: NO KINGS RALLY in West Chester**
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112007265/559118321/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1144-ot-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDIzMTU1ZS0xMDY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uqXGGDF-sHU35OyJNzZxSzqM_Bn_losRM4JQj7JYe8Y=)
---
In June, over 1 million Americans took to the streets to peacefully protest the reckless, dangerous, and autocratic behavior of President Trump. I was proud to join concerned citizens across SEPA to raise our voices. Turns out there were a lot of us – the rally in West Chester was the third largest in Pennsylvania!
---
Thank you for your support, Derek.

There's work to be done,

Chrissy

clean_body: My updates from the last few weeks. | | | | | A NOTE FROM CHRISSY | | I voted "No" on the Republican budget bill Joe Biden was fond of saying “Don’t tell me what you value, show me your budget and I’ll tell you what you value.” Republicans in Washington, D.C., just showed us – through their budget bill – that they don’t value those people who need healthcare but can’t afford it, anyone who lives in a rural area who needs healthcare, anyone on SNAP (food stamps), people with graduate school loans, or anyone hoping for lower energy costs and more green energy options. But that’s not all. The Republican bill rewards the very rich while exploding our national debt. This bill is a betrayal of our American values and a betrayal of pre–Trump Republicans (remember them??) who valued limited government and fiscal responsibility. It’s no wonder that two Republicans joined every single Democrat in voting against this bill. | | Voting “Yes” for Servicemen and Women Every year, I successfully push dozens of my priorities across the finish line to become law – like more paid family leave, improving child care for military families, and better cyber training for our servicemembers. Despite this hyperpolarized political environment, I think I’ll be able to do the same again this year. The first step in this process happened on July 15 when the House Armed Services Committee began debating and amending the annual defense bill (aka the NDAA). As the most senior Democrat on the Military Personnel Subcommittee, I was able to get 31 of my initiatives into the bill covering many issues, including improvements to biosecurity, schools on military bases, and women’s healthcare. | | Leading on Biotech and Biosecurity A few years ago, I passed legislation that created the National Security Commission on Emerging Biotechnology. The world had shut down due to the rapid global spread of a virus, and we understood how vulnerable our health, our economy, and our national security could be to that kind of threat. body:
Republicans are adjourning the House early to avoid answering our questions.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112007304/559118373/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250723Epstein_N_TB_90DO_5_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzIzMTU1ZS0xMDY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IaSAqOyIDnTxRgSEMb3VZ7m7UwwaJLriy3DfxGs26L4=) Someone has something to hide, Peter.

Republican House Speaker Mike Johnson is sending the House home early for summer recess to avoid a vote on releasing files related to Jeffrey Epstein, the sex offender and former Trump BFF.

Republicans are actively working to prevent Democrats from forcing the Justice Department to release information related to Epstein. As Johnson stated in a press conference, “we’re done being lectured on transparency.” It raises the question, **why are they going to such lengths to cover up these files?**

This is just another example of how House Republicans are willing to do anything to appease Trump and protect the mega-wealthy and well-connected. The American people deserve answers.

[**Peter, Democrats are determined to get to the bottom of this and to bring criminals to justice. Clearly, Republicans want to keep some things hidden, and it’s time for action. name: Stacey Abrams
subject: 🚨Purge alert 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight
body:
Georgia’s about to make history — but not in a good way. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112007327/559118427/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250723_T1_VoterPurge2SYA_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzY0ZTE5Ny0xMDY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H-BNdqUgIULBT1fnzGrQRMJUFIu75qz6_fGY8B_bitI=&emci=e59242ff-0468-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=f364e197-1068-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1037277)

| | Today, I want to talk to you about what’s happening in my home state. Georgia Republicans are preparing to cancel the voter registrations of nearly half a million people across the state —**that will be the second-largest purge that Georgia has ever seen.** It is also expected to be one of **the largest mass voter removals in U.S. history.** Voter purges silence thousands of eligible voters — from military service members to college students, to those who did not vote in previous elections. They also disproportionately impact historically disenfranchised communities. In 2017, thousands of eligible Black, Latino, and low-income voters were removed from the statewide rolls. Make no mistake — voter purges are a tool of suppression and voter intimidation that have a long history in Georgia dating back to Reconstruction and carrying even beyond the shameful era of Jim Crow. **This is a warning to all Georgia voters: You have to fight to stay registered to vote. Our leaders should be protecting your freedom to vote, not quietly taking it away.** [**The time has never been more critical to power our pro-voter movement and prepare for more attacks on voting from Georgia Republicans and their MAGA cronies. When I founded Fair Fight, it was with a basic goal to defend a basic principle: our freedom to vote.
So, when our elected officials try to restrict that freedom, **Fair Fight is on the frontlines fighting tirelessly to protect it.**
The architecture of voter suppression has three components: **1.** Can you register and stay on the voter rolls? **2.** Can you cast your ballot? **And 3.** Can your ballot be counted?
In Georgia, we’ve seen obstacles around all three — which underscores the state’s long history of disenfranchising voters.
But there is a reason why these Republicans want to restrict access to the ballot: **It’s because they’re afraid of what will happen when we tap into our voting power and move our state, and our nation, toward a truly inclusive and representative democracy. **
[**The right to vote shouldn’t come with an expiration date. If you believe that real patriotism in action is expanding the freedom to vote — not restricting it —make a donation to Fair Fight today to power their work to combat voter suppression during this critical time for voters in Georgia.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112007357/559118513/-1427917443?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250723_T1_VoterPurge2SYA_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzY0ZTE5Ny0xMDY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H-BNdqUgIULBT1fnzGrQRMJUFIu75qz6_fGY8B_bitI=)

clean_body: Georgia’s about to make history — but not in a good way. | | | Today, I want to talk to you about what’s happening in my home state. Georgia Republicans are preparing to cancel the voter registrations of nearly half a million people across the state —that will be the second-largest purge that Georgia has ever seen. It is also expected to be one of the largest mass voter removals in U.S. history. Voter purges silence thousands of eligible voters — from military service members to college students, to those who did not vote in previous elections. They also disproportionately impact historically disenfranchised communities. In 2017, thousands of eligible Black, Latino, and low-income voters were removed from the statewide rolls. Make no mistake — voter purges are a tool of suppression and voter intimidation that have a long history in Georgia dating back to Reconstruction and carrying even beyond the shameful era of Jim Crow. This is a warning to all Georgia voters: You have to fight to stay registered to vote. Our leaders should be protecting your freedom to vote, not quietly taking it away. = If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- When I founded Fair Fight, it was with a basic goal to defend a basic principle: our freedom to vote. **➤➤ BREAKING: North Carolina Republicans want to ban election officials from encouraging turnout** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112007514/559118774/1071238056?refcode=em-7.23.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTIzMTU1ZS0xMDY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Ak-m-WLOQUrfIlhlwMihPBV9o6LhsfNbk9M8vtmS4Q=)
* * *
This isn’t subtle, friend. North Carolina GOP lawmakers are pushing a new bill that would criminalize nonpartisan voter outreach by election officials — _including efforts like reminder calls, polling place assistance, and educational materials._ Let’s call it what it is: **state-sanctioned voter suppression.** Why? Because when officials can’t encourage participation, fewer people vote — and turnout drops especially in marginalized communities. This move isn’t happening in a vacuum. It’s part of a nationwide trend, emboldened by Trump’s executive order targeting election offices. Now Republicans are turning it into law — one state at a time. **The good news: Democrats are fighting hard to stop it.** Democratic allies like the NAACP and League of Women Voters are organizing, training, and preparing to battle this bill at every turn. This is why DASS exists. We build the infrastructure to protect election officials, push back against voter suppression laws, and support the Secretaries of State who defend democracy on the front lines. [**Will you chip in $3 or whatever you can today to support DASS’s legal and organizing teams working to uphold voting rights in North Carolina and beyond?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112007515/559118775/1071238056?refcode=em-7.23.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTIzMTU1ZS0xMDY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Ak-m-WLOQUrfIlhlwMihPBV9o6LhsfNbk9M8vtmS4Q=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $5 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112007516/559118776/1071238056?refcode=em-7.23.25-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTIzMTU1ZS0xMDY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Ak-m-WLOQUrfIlhlwMihPBV9o6LhsfNbk9M8vtmS4Q=)**

clean_body: | = ➤➤ BREAKING: North Carolina Republicans want to ban election officials from encouraging turnout = This isn’t subtle, friend. North Carolina GOP lawmakers are pushing a new bill that would criminalize nonpartisan voter outreach by election officials — including efforts like reminder calls, polling place assistance, and educational materials. Let’s call it what it is: state-sanctioned voter suppression. Why? Because when officials can’t encourage participation, fewer people vote — and turnout drops especially in marginalized communities. This move isn’t happening in a vacuum. It’s part of a nationwide trend, emboldened by Trump’s executive order targeting election offices. Now Republicans are turning it into law — one state at a time. The good news: Democrats are fighting hard to stop it. Democratic allies like the NAACP and League of Women Voters are organizing, training, and preparing to battle this bill at every turn. This is why DASS exists. We build the infrastructure to protect election officials, push back against voter suppression laws, and support the Secretaries of State who defend democracy on the front lines. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Thank you, Team DASS | Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States. Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=JNvcAk5rTb3x279NR9ns3iLjAVfBcPcTNxXPrTVLR35dLV2sTy1L0I18saHKt%2Bkceh2Wn3EMJ153J0Q2rFikm7H%2FuBrNafh6Hdpm2iLm6epetGHzHNlylLOwR9k34sjlEVg0I22q%2BuF%2B77xHFx0I1p%2BqLLeNxIrRcZrDOxalFYocq%2Bw8RE8fcIKsB82XyAw579jsT5qknJDe9kjYhwjsp2jStAZ2A6eZuTZOkQsgPrQqLaLNeyDLTXzP%2FtT7kZq5VFYaEAXLcUrLzjkBYjVpPXaS3wtljZLmCYVHvZ8wGm%2FHTJTAHPU7MAIyf2CkX4yqLgsebzNa2grQu626gUs7CyYCTgwp2jsQ2hd37bn%2F4TjFpla9mnW5%2FSEDXRFp127BORuPANsxQcXyH0KKLKwEW5KBtrEYUk5LgU9Px1As9L4kFnq91YmwtmTNINN1AB10)

Peter,

I want you to hear this from me.

Last week House Republicans voted to strip more than **$1 billion** in federal funding for the Corporation for Public Broadcasting (CPB). _They are gutting public media, plain and simple._

This was a rescission bill. _What does that mean?_ It was Trump asking Congress to **reclaim money that had already been approved for federal spending by Congress.** Republicans in Congress rubber-stamped Trump’s unnecessary cuts once again to put working Americans last.

Now, millions of Americans will see their public news sources cut back: PBS, NPR, local news stations, children’s programs, and more. Public broadcasting is how **_73% of Americans_** get emergency alerts, weather updates, and public safety information.

With this funding cut, rural and local public news stations will struggle to operate. Republicans are leaving whole communities of Americans behind without timely news and alerts — updates that could be life-saving in emergency situations.

The vote in the House was so close: **216-213**. **_Flipping the House in 2026 means we have to protect every seat we have, including this one._**

**_[The fight for the midterms has already begun, Peter, and I want you on board with me. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112008088/559120645/-1095572902?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250723_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTdiNTFjNi0xMTY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GJ-y54Tf6ny8mR7mYqvJ1UpOspzwSLGKl50yyOU2WoI=) Hi Peter, My name is Jonathan Nez, and today I’m officially launching my campaign to become the next Congressman for Arizona’s 2nd Congressional District – one of the most critical districts to win to take back the House. As a man driven by faith, family, and love, my campaign is about bringing people from all walks of life together to create meaningful change for our district. In 2024, our campaign delivered one of the strongest overperformances in the nation. We had over 78,000 grassroots online donors, and put AZ-2 on the map to the point that this is now one of the DCCC’s “Districts in Play” – meaning that winning this seat is critical to taking back the House. **[Before I say more, I want you to know: the early days of a campaign can make or break it. Following my graduation from Northern Arizona University, I was elected to the Navajo Nation Council to represent my community, and I’ve been in public service ever since. I subsequently served as a county official and as Vice President of the Navajo Nation before being elected President of the Navajo Nation in 2019.
I’m running to deliver generational change because we owe it to our children and grandchildren to leave them a future better than the one we inherited. Unfortunately, our current representative isn’t interested in improving the lives of his constituents. His votes to cut healthcare and food assistance from our most vulnerable populations might go over well in the fancy suburb where Eli Crane lives, but out here in rural Arizona, that dog won’t hunt.
**[I’m ready to show up in Congress as a champion for rural Arizona, but I need your support. Can you please split a contribution between my campaign and Becca Balint’s today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112008096/559120653/-1095572902?amount=&refcode=AU_RAB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250723_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTdiNTFjNi0xMTY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GJ-y54Tf6ny8mR7mYqvJ1UpOspzwSLGKl50yyOU2WoI=)**

---
Our district faces real challenges: from the rising costs of gas, food, childcare, and housing to a lack of accountability in Washington. We need a representative in Congress who’s focused on the issues here in Arizona — not the partisan squabbles of DC. Someone who will put working Arizonans first, create good jobs, lower everyday costs, support our veterans, secure Arizona’s water future, and protect the right to choose.
As the former President of Navajo Nation, I’m ready to deliver on the issues that matter most to our communities, but I can’t get there without your help. **[Please pitch in any amount today, split between my campaign and Becca Balint’s.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112008098/559120655/-1095572902?amount=&refcode=AU_RAB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250723_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTdiNTFjNi0xMTY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GJ-y54Tf6ny8mR7mYqvJ1UpOspzwSLGKl50yyOU2WoI=)**

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112008159/559120861/-861560833?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_TrumpEpstein_250723_T1_1_b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjliYmVkYy0xMTY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QU8cU63SLhL4AvQHpyVjkeNPjBL_wedKLealkiX96ms=) Donald Trump and his administration have reached a new low, Derek.

In an effort to distract Americans from the Epstein files, Trump and his administration have been peddling truly insane conspiracy theories – including accusing Barack Obama of committing treason with Russia in the 2016 presidential election (without evidence, of course).

Trump's Director of National Intelligence, Tulsi Gabbard, even went so far as to declassify a partisan intelligence report (and damaged our intelligence sources and methods in the process).

Then House Speaker Mike Johnson dismissed the entire House because he’s scared of an Epstein vote...

It’s desperate and irresponsible, to say the least.

**My point is, Trump and his administration will do or say ANYTHING not to release the Epstein files.** I wonder what he’s so afraid of in those files...

Donald Trump was supposed to be “Mr. Transparent.” Instead, we’re seeing an all-out effort to distract Americans from the truth.

**He knows the truth will hurt him, but the American people deserve better – and I won’t stop fighting to hold Trump accountable.**

[_**But the only way we can do that is by flipping the Senate blue, and that starts with protecting my seat. So I’m asking: will you pitch in anything you can today to help me win reelection, take back the Senate for Democrats, and put an end to Trump’s dangerous deception and # Trump proposes AI-bill ahead of major speech Wednesday evening
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bcc0b72b-508d-4d23-8a9a-12db61cee5f3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Hours before President Donald Trump's scheduled speech on artificial intelligence, the White House on Wednesday unveiled **[a sweeping action plan focused on jobs, deregulation and national security.](https://substack.com/redirect/bcc0b72b-508d-4d23-8a9a-12db61cee5f3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Officials outlined the strategy in a background call with reporters, positioning it as a key driver of what the administration calls the next "industrial revolution."
* **The White House's artificial intelligence strategy is built on three core pillars:** prioritizing American workers, defending free speech and preventing foreign misuse of U.S.-built technologies. "We want to center America's workers, and make sure they benefit from AI," David Sacks, the White House AI and crypto czar, said.
* **The administration 's plan calls for deregulation to promote AI innovation** and avoid what officials described as Europe's "innovation-killing" rules. "Federal agencies will now review their rules on the books and repeal those that hinder AI development and deployment across industries," said Michael Kratsios, director of the White House Office of Science and Technology Policy.
* **Officials highlighted a $500 billion investment led by OpenAI, Oracle, SoftBank and MGX** for AI development through the Stargate project, which is expected to create more than 100,000 jobs in construction, operations and manufacturing. The administration views the buildout as crucial to maintaining AI leadership over foreign adversaries at a crucial moment.
* **President Trump is expected to sign an executive order Wednesday evening** to implement the plan, which outlines more than 90 federal policy actions and emphasizes international diplomacy, infrastructure and workforce development. "Winning the AI race is non-negotiable," Kratsios said.

* * *
# Louisville DROPS 'sanctuary city' title, Trump's pressure wins out
Under mounting pressure from the Trump administration, the city of **[Louisville announced Tuesday it will begin honoring federal immigration detainer requests](https://substack.com/redirect/019f5424-2c9e-4455-9705-6dc1426f9cdf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and drop its sanctuary city designation.
* **Democrat Mayor Craig Greenberg said the city will comply** with 48-hour detainers issued by Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) after being notified by the Department of Justice that Louisville was violating federal law. "Metro Corrections will begin honoring 48-hour federal detainers as soon as practical because the stakes are too high," Greenberg said in a statement.
* **The 48-hour detainer policy, standard practice in Kentucky 's Department of Corrections**, allows ICE agents time to take custody of migrants held on criminal charges before they are released from local jails. Louisville had not enforced the policy since 2017, but will now reinstate it in order to be removed from the federal sanctuary city list.
* **Greenberg cited ongoing ICE raids and the potential loss of "hundreds of millions of dollars in federal grants"** as reasons for the policy reversal. "Cities on the sanctuary city list right now are experiencing a terrifying increase in raids by ICE," he said.
* **U.S. Attorney General Pam Bondi praised the decision** , calling it "a major victory for the Department of Justice." In a statement Tuesday, Bondi said, "This should set an example to other cities. Instead of forcing us to sue you -- which we will, without hesitation -- follow the law, get rid of sanctuary policies, and work with us to fix the illegal immigration crisis."

* * *
# Dems refuse to admit Trump tariffs are working, strategist says
Republican strategist Melik Abdul said Wednesday that **[President Donald Trump's tariff strategy is showing signs of success](https://substack.com/redirect/00031fb8-e9c6-426b-a327-d7ee49bc938c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**, but Democrats will never admit to it.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/dc648c4e-4ba3-44a5-8ccc-6cf8cebfff05?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Appearing on CNN** , Abdul argued that critics' early concerns about Trump's tariff policy have not materialized. "All of the gloom and doom that was predicted as far as the tariffs are concerned, they have not been realized," Abdul said.
* **Abdul pointed to strong economic indicators,** including rising manufacturing output, a decline in jobless claims and better-than-expected retail sales. "At this point, Donald Trump's tariff policy seems to be working," he said. "And I think it's very difficult for Democrats to actually give him credit for that."
* **Economic data released this month supports the positive outlook.** The Federal Reserve Board reported a 0.1% increase in manufacturing output in June, following a 0.3% gain in May. Weekly jobless claims fell by 7,000 to 221,000, the fifth consecutive decline, and U.S. retail sales rose 0.6% in June, according to Census Bureau estimates.
* **Trump also announced new trade agreements** with Japan and the Philippines this week, with Japan set to pay a 15% reciprocal tariff under the agreement.

body:
Dear Dpwillis67,

We are a DG freight forwarder (NVOCC) focused on the compliance import and export ofdangerous goods(Includes batteries),oversize goodsandsensitive goods.

Company service:[Sea, land (truck or train*) and air transportation]
SEA:FCL ,DG (2,3,4,5,6,8,9 CLASS,Includes chemical and batteries),handle all China base port.
LCL ,DG (3,4,5,6,8,9 CLASS,Includes chemical and batteries)& Sensitive cargo export from HK and Shanghai, Nansha port.
LAND:TRUCK: DG cargo and general cargo and project from China.
TRAIN*:New energy vehicles & normal cargo transportation.
*Pls note that trains originating from China cannot transport dangerous goods. In addition to new energy vehicles, they can only transportnormal goods.
AIR:DG (2,3,4,5,6,8,9 CLASS, Includes chemical and batteries)& Sensitive cargo from Beijing ,Shanghai, Guangzhou, Shenzhen and HK airport.

*Pls provide the following information when you making an inquiry: Name of goods, Gross weight, weight per piece, volume, packaging of goods, MSDS, thx.

Wespecialized in shippingdangerous cargo,over-size cargo,reefer cargo, project cargo.Please do not hesitate to contact me.

[Miki] SHENZHEN GOTONE International Logistics CO.,LTD

body:

| Dear Friend, The numbers are in — and they’re a wake-up call. Brad’s liberal Democrat opponent just announced raising a staggering **$260,000**. That’s a _massive_ haul for someone who wants to flip this seat and bring Joe Biden-style policies right back to Washington. Make no mistake: this is a sign national Democrats are targeting Brad. They know he’s a conservative fighter who stands with President Trump, secures our border, defends our farmers, and protects the values that make southern Minnesota strong. Now they’re lining up donors from San Francisco and New York to buy this seat — and they’ve made it clear they’ll say and spend _whatever it takes_ to defeat Brad. We can’t let that happen. [Brad’s counting on grassroots conservatives like you to fight back. Every $10, $25, or $50 you give today helps us close the gap and show we’re not backing down.](http://link.finstadforcongress.com/api/LinkHandler/getaction2?%3d)

subject: Oh they’re panicking…

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email06302025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email06302025&amount=25]
Peter ,
Republicans are panicking about Virginia. Their top candidate for governor, Winsome Sears, is trailing badly in polling, can’t raise money, and is losing staff.
But let’s be absolutely clear: this is not over.
The GOP is not just going to let Virginia go without a fight. It’s a critical test of Trump’s power down the ballot, and if Democrats win big in November, it’ll send a chilling message to the MAGA movement across the country:
Stick with Trump? You lose. Period.
That’s why we cannot get cocky. Trump’s allies are going to flood Virginia with last-minute money to try to save face. If we’re caught off guard, they could turn this thing around in the blink of an eye.
🚨 So here’s our ask: GOTV PAC is laser-focused on turning out voters in critical down-ballot races, but we need to raise $25,000 by the end of this month to expand our voter contact operations in Virginia and keep this race out of Trump’s reach. Let’s make sure they get the message.
-GOTV PAC

We understand that times are tough for many of us right now, so we have decided to extend this limited-time discount to you. For a limited time, you can use code GOLDENAGE at checkout to recieve 50% off your tickets for this event. That means general admission is just $75. Food, Drinks, a keynote from Congressman Gohmert, and an evening with fellow patriots for just $75? That's a steal! | == | == | Get your tickets at 50% off now before time runs out! Now you can spark your children's pride in our armed forces with our new gift bundle featuring and These fun and will help the kids in your family discover the courage, strength, and sacrifice of our military, fostering respect and connecting them to the brave men and women who protect our freedom and keep us safe every day. As they read, they'll learn about the most fascinating equipment, like the B-2 Spirit Bomber, and other amazing innovations that we use to defend our great nation every day. This new military appreciation gift bundle is our free gift to you. You just need to pay $1 s&p for each guide, which is a tiny price to shape our next generation's pride for the greatest military on Earth. This exciting ofer is available for a limited time, so please don't wait. Order your family's Sincerely, Yout friends at The Kids Guide

Hi, it's Democratic Congressman Robert Garcia.
The Trump Administration is unleashing an unprecedented attack on the rule of law and oversight.
**FIRST: **Donald Trump supercharged ICE and created inhumane detention centers to attack immigrants and spread fear and division.
**THEN: **Kristi Noem illegally prevented Members of Congress from conducting necessary oversight by refusing to allow them to visit these detention centers unannounced.
**SO NOW: We need to fight back like NEVER before if we want any hope of protecting our democracy, saving the rule of law, and holding this administration accountable for its illegal actions.**
**[That starts with grassroots supporters like you chipping in $10 or more to elect a Democratic House Majority so that we can perform the kind of oversight needed to hold Donald Trump and his cronies accountable. Can I count on you to step up when it matters most?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112009343/559124675/789508428?refcode=250723_RG_unprecedented&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGEzYjkxMi0xNzY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NEEVZozTbji4yA2roZSlD3HfxWCRJdFdSdg_wu0-_c0=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112009344/559124676/-309737922?refcode=250723_RG_unprecedented&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGEzYjkxMi0xNzY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NEEVZozTbji4yA2roZSlD3HfxWCRJdFdSdg_wu0-_c0=)
Republicans are counting on us to sit on the sidelines and watch as they unleash a full-blown attack on the rule of law.
We can’t give them what they want. We need to stand up and fight back harder than ever before.
Thank you for being in this fight,
Robert Garcia

I’m on the FRONT lines of this fight—and if you’re sick of the lies, the cover-ups, and the fake leadership...**LET’S FIGHT LIKE HELL, TOGETHER.**

clean_body: | | | Who was running the show? That’s the question every American should be asking about Joe Biden, especially in his final days in office, when executive orders were flying out the door. It’s been CONFIRMED: He wasn’t even signing them himself. Biden’s staff used an AUTO-PEN—a machine—to rubber-stamp nearly EVERY SINGLE ORDER! No signature. No explanation. No real leadership. So again: Who was calling the shots on behalf of the American people? We may never get a straight answer. But I’m not backing down. I’m not waiting for answers—I’m demanding them. I’ve filed new legislation that would ban that from ever happening again. I’m on the FRONT lines of this fight—and if you’re sick of the lies, the cover-ups, and the fake leadership...LET’S FIGHT LIKE HELL, TOGETHER. FOR TRUTH. FOR TRANSPARENCY. FOR AMERICA. Addison | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | ADDISON MCDOWELL Husband. Dad. | Peter, if you've been following the headlines lately, you know that the heat wave gripping Central Florida isn't just uncomfortable—it's a wake-up call.

Extreme heat brings health risks like heatstroke, strains our energy grids, and raises utility costs. Vulnerable populations, including the elderly, suffer the most.

But while we grapple with these severe impacts, MAGA leaders like Ron DeSantis continue to deny climate change and ignore the clear evidence.

Why? Because they’re too busy selling out our economy to billionaires to care about our long term safety.

**_But we can’t give up the fight for environmental justice. Because Peter, combatting climate isn’t just necessary. It’s patriotic. So I have to ask:_** ** [**_Our fight for a livable Earth is one of the most important battles we’re facing. clean_body: | ~~ | Peter, if you've been following the headlines lately, you know that the heat wave gripping Central Florida isn't just uncomfortable—it's a wake-up call. Extreme heat brings health risks like heatstroke, strains our energy grids, and raises utility costs. Vulnerable populations, including the elderly, suffer the most. But while we grapple with these severe impacts, MAGA leaders like Ron DeSantis continue to deny climate change and ignore the clear evidence. Why? Because they’re too busy selling out our economy to billionaires to care about our long term safety. But we can’t give up the fight for environmental justice. Because Peter, combatting climate isn’t just necessary. It’s patriotic. So I have to ask: ~~ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | ~~ It’s not too late, Maxwell Frost | ~~ Maxwell Alejandro Frost is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District. * **TOP NEWS**

**" 2 still missing in Texas floods after body of woman found in Kerrville, Greg Abbott says," **Houston Chronicle's **Jarrod Wardwell** -- "The body of a woman who was missing in the [devastating July 4 floods](https://substack.com/redirect/2128544b-c3f6-489d-b68e-597642dad009?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) has been found, according to Gov. **Greg Abbott**.

Abbott said Task Force 1 -- one of the search teams deployed in response -- recovered the body in the Kerrville area. He [announced the discovery](https://substack.com/redirect/8ce435b0-5d22-4a1b-8925-3f3746eed5c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in a post on X at 10:10 p.m. Tuesday.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/a63ce76f-75f9-4f91-8c40-7da2d85cafaf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Three people [remained missing after the flood,](https://substack.com/redirect/dc333550-e701-49c0-bd0b-51fd12484f84?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) leading up to Tuesday night, according to Kerr County officials. The recent finding would presumably lower that number to two.

A man and a little girl from Camp Mystic were still missing, Abbott said. He last said the death toll stood at 135.

"Our search continues," he wrote.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/a63ce76f-75f9-4f91-8c40-7da2d85cafaf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Floodwaters had surged in the early morning hours of July 4 after rainfall [overloaded the Guadalupe River](https://substack.com/redirect/5c1250d4-79b0-49fb-ab52-d3f6269c6b0c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and inundated parts of the Texas Hill Country. The Guadaulupe River rose[ 20 feet in about 95 minutes](https://substack.com/redirect/7a0c73ca-e6f9-445a-a66c-da82912f6004?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and topped the streambed by 40 feet in some places, leaving little time for those sleeping nearby to escape.

The ensuing flood wiped out riverside camps, RV parks and homes. The most lives were lost in Kerr County, where at least 37 children and 70 adults died in the flooding.

Kerr County was home to summer camps like Camp Mystic, a Christian summer camp for girls that has been [described as heaven on earth](https://substack.com/redirect/94153f78-f45b-42d4-96c1-285cc2d788e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The camp has [confirmed 27 campers and counselors were killed](https://substack.com/redirect/d8ca5e61-8bff-44ef-b789-82eb4d90a7da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the flooding, and one child there remains missing. The camp's owner [died trying to save the young campers](https://substack.com/redirect/94153f78-f45b-42d4-96c1-285cc2d788e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from tragedy.

As of Wednesday morning, state and county officials had yet to issue updates about the flood victims who remain missing." [Hou Chron](https://substack.com/redirect/7b3e958e-48d0-4da1-8ea1-610e224cbab6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ($)

TOP NEWS " 2 still missing in Texas floods after body of woman found in Kerrville, Greg Abbott says," Houston Chronicle's Jarrod Wardwell -- "The body of a woman who was missing in the has been found, according to Gov. Greg Abbott. Abbott said Task Force 1 -- one of the search teams deployed in response -- recovered the body in the Kerrville area. He in a post on X at 10:10 p.m. Tuesday. Three people leading up to Tuesday night, according to Kerr County officials. The recent finding would presumably lower that number to two. A man and a little girl from Camp Mystic were still missing, Abbott said. He last said the death toll stood at 135. "Our search continues," he wrote. Floodwaters had surged in the early morning hours of July 4 after rainfall and inundated parts of the Texas Hill Country. The Guadaulupe River rose and topped the streambed by 40 feet in some places, leaving little time for those sleeping nearby to escape. The ensuing flood wiped out riverside camps, RV parks and homes. The most lives were lost in Kerr County, where at least 37 children and 70 adults died in the flooding. Kerr County was home to summer camps like Camp Mystic, a Christian summer camp for girls that has been . The camp has in the flooding, and one child there remains missing. The camp's owner from tragedy. As of Wednesday morning, state and county officials had yet to issue updates about the flood victims who remain missing." clean_body: Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | It’s Austin, Gabe’s chief of staff. Frontline Democrats raised an average of $661,000 last quarter — with about $1 million on hand. The NRCC? They brought in $1.1 million per candidate and are sitting on war chests close to $2 million. They’re outraising and outspending us. We’re being drowned out not just here, but in races across the country that will determine who controls the House in 2026. If we don’t close this gap now, we risk losing our chance to hold the MAGA extremists in the House accountable. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for standing with us, Austin | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: AOC’s newest bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
In 2024, lobbyists spent $4.4 billion to influence Congress and federal agencies. Currently, over 350 former congressmembers work as lobbyists.1
Some earn over five times their former salaries — others earn millions — to use their connections and pressure Congress to **deliver legislation that benefits the special interests of their clients, on everything from corporate tax rates to healthcare**.2
So Alexandria worked with Rep. Joe Neguse to introduce the Close the Revolving Door Act. If passed, the bill would create a lifetime ban on congressmembers from becoming lobbyists, and restrict the hiring of former lobbyists into government.
Because **the American people deserve elected officials who put the American people first, not special interests and their own career ambitions**.
[Alexandria came to Congress to legislate in a new way: by centering everyday people, not industry lobbyists or corporations. Will you make a $5 contribution today so that we can keep her in Congress fighting for working people?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250723.CRMbnC&refcode=em20250723-9376-P_FND_EGR_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9376%2E2526796%2ED7lHdn)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250723.CRMbnC&refcode=em20250723-9376-P_FND_EGR_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=9376%2E2526796%2ED7lHdn)**
In the face of this administration, our #1 priority is to build a mass movement — a people’s movement — against the rise of authoritarianism. And **the first step to building that community is restoring faith in our institutions**.
The Close the Revolving Door Act would also create a publicly accessible database where all lobbyists would be registered, bar congressional staff from lobbying for six years, and increase penalties for violations of the Lobbying Disclosure Act.
It’s time we tell the special interests trying to buy our elected officials: **our government is not for sale**.
[Will you contribute $5 today to power Alexandria’s campaign for progress?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250723.CRMbnC&refcode=em20250723-9376-P_FND_EGR_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=9376%2E2526796%2ED7lHdn)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250723.CRMbnC&refcode=em20250723-9376-P_FND_EGR_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=9376%2E2526796%2ED7lHdn)**
Whether or not you can give today, thank you for standing with us.
We will keep you informed as more on this legislation develops.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

1 - [**Center for Responsive Politics** : Federal and State Lobbying](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/33488?t=23&akid=9376%2E2526796%2ED7lHdn)
2 - [**Center for Responsive Politics** : Former Members of Congress](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/33489?t=24&akid=9376%2E2526796%2ED7lHdn)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250723?refcode=em20250723-9376-P_FND_EGR_LEG&t=25&refcode2=9376_2526796_D7lHdn&akid=9376%2E2526796%2ED7lHdn)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250723-9376-P_FND_EGR_LEG&t=26&akid=9376%2E2526796%2ED7lHdn)**

---|---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: It's happening again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
If you're standing behind a President, a party, and a policy that would deprive millions of healthcare and slash resources for public schools, you're on the wrong side.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112010442/559128383/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-07-23_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzVkYTZlNmQtMWE2OC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=h_mZkSE0W9mEIcafPI6y5E_tt0vZyGPk83oiJCceqM8=)
Peter, it's happening again.
Republicans in Congress have passed and President Trump signed into law a bill that would gut healthcare for _more than 322,000 Virginians_ and put six of our rural hospitals at risk of closing, according to one estimate. All in order to put more money in the hands of the ultra-wealthy.
_My opponent says Trump's tax bill "does so many great things."_
And when asked about the $1 trillion in cuts to Medicaid, specifically, all Winsome Earle-Sears could offer was "don't panic."
Here's a clue: if you're standing behind a President, a party, and a policy that would deprive millions of healthcare and slash resources for public schools, you're on the wrong side.
**Look, the extremism coming out of Washington has officially reached new heights. It's frightening and disheartening.**
But how we respond is entirely within our control.
[_**Peter, this November, we have the biggest opportunity yet to defeat Trump's agenda at the ballot box. Will you contribute $25 or another amount to help reach and energize voters across our Commonwealth?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112010443/559128384/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-07-23_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzVkYTZlNmQtMWE2OC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=h_mZkSE0W9mEIcafPI6y5E_tt0vZyGPk83oiJCceqM8=)

clean_body: If you're standing behind a President, a party, and a policy that would deprive millions of healthcare and slash resources for public schools, you're on the wrong side. = Peter, it's happening again. Republicans in Congress have passed and President Trump signed into law a bill that would gut healthcare for more than 322,000 Virginians and put six of our rural hospitals at risk of closing, according to one estimate. All in order to put more money in the hands of the ultra-wealthy. My opponent says Trump's tax bill "does so many great things." And when asked about the $1 trillion in cuts to Medicaid, specifically, all Winsome Earle-Sears could offer was "don't panic." Here's a clue: if you're standing behind a President, a party, and a policy that would deprive millions of healthcare and slash resources for public schools, you're on the wrong side. Look, the extremism coming out of Washington has officially reached new heights. It's frightening and disheartening. But how we respond is entirely within our control. = = = = = = = Thanks for standing with me, Abigail Spanberger = By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. I am willing to give up everything I know about Trump and Epstein, on
condition that I am readmitted to the Martha's Vineyard social scene.

by Alan Dershowitz
## **Cliff 's Note: Conspiracies & Pardons Finally Bite Trump in the Arse**
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fd6f917c-8cde-4be0-8bda-277c91482f53?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Donald Trump is...what's the industry term again...oh, right, a necrotically stupid, cruel fascist creep who just once again admitted it all out loud. While further implicating himself in the the societal sickness known as the Epstein files.
Impressive dumbassery, even for Trump.
Asked _again_ about Ghislaine Maxwell, a woman who recruited children into a global rape ring, Trump didn't even flinch. He "wished her well." The sex trafficker. Who sent underage girls to be raped. And was convicted of it.
Ya know, normal human stuff. And you should definitely should feel totally a-ok and not like a giant asshole if you voted for Satan's little helper with the small hands conviction on 34-criminal counts.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e1c077db-95c0-4f1f-96a4-ce8b86d1ddb4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And btw, this is the second time he had kind words for a sexual offender. While trying to distance himself from her deceased sex trafficker boyfriend--that would be the Epstein guy--who he only called "terrific," joined at parties with underage girls and in whose files, we know from the courts, he is all over.
Funny, he's never wished any of Maxwell's victims well. But this is who Trump has always been.
There are _pictures_. There are _videos_. There are _court records_. And yet... silence. Admiration. _" Wishing her well." _This isn't some political footnote--**It 's The Story**.
And now Trump's MAGA cult is coming for him, because he promised them he would deliver--via the files of this dead predator friend of his--some sex ring being run by Democrats or something Trump-University-level stupid like that. And we haven't even gotten into the charges he should face for his role in creating Eric.
But back to the cult. You see, Trump's MAGA cult doesn't want Epstein's files because _they care about victims_.
They want the files because all the blarney Trump barfed up about a child sex ring--ya know, Qanon stuff that got some guy to take an assault rifle to free supposed sex prisoners in a pizza place basement in Washington that turned out to have no basement. Or sex slaves. Also, Hillary Clinton wasn't there running this..non-existent thing, as the overly-online louts said.
I know, I was shocked too!
But being cultists, they're hard to dissuade ([see my Walking Dead Theory of MAGA](https://substack.com/redirect/c0442bea-5830-4434-8fbe-fdd32c5cd4e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and their brain stems). So even as Trump insinuates and obfuscates and reprobates, holding the files back b/c he knows damn well he's in them, they still think the files will help 'em take down _the_ _right enemies_.
You know, t[he President with that middle name "Hussein,"](https://substack.com/redirect/c0442bea-5830-4434-8fbe-fdd32c5cd4e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the Clintons, Hollywood, "the Jews," "the blacks."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c3265dd6-2d4d-4433-b531-3e0308cb3e9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It's the same sick script of conspiracy The Far Right--[referred to in your DSM-5 as "paranoid" and/or "delusional"](https://substack.com/redirect/55f58097-371b-4e00-81b0-89d6da247896?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--has read from for centuries. From medieval blood libel to QAnon. From Emmett Till to birtherism.
They don't want justice. They want _retribution,_ because certain people want to drink the blood of their white Christian children. And "others" want to have un-restrained sexual relations with their women and girls.
Ever read "To Kill A Mockingbird?" Peruse the story of the lynching of Leo Frank? See "Birth of A Nation?" They all expose the DNA underpinning these crusades vs "others," which go back many hundreds of years in this country and all over the world.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3b78fbf3-fe04-417a-8181-5832801047e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
So when Trump promised he'd expose this ring, he thought he was just feeding his usual pile of Hegsethian horse manure for [coporate media stenography](https://substack.com/redirect/4cdf521c-67d5-44a6-9015-7dbdadca8360?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), but he was tapping into something much deeper in conspiratorial white-dude world. It wasn't just "next week's infrastructure week" or "no, my hair isn't made from the same alien material that created Venom."
He thought [his followers ](https://substack.com/redirect/c0442bea-5830-4434-8fbe-fdd32c5cd4e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)and [ monopoly media](https://substack.com/redirect/4cdf521c-67d5-44a6-9015-7dbdadca8360?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) would just forget about it next week... But he told them he'd expose the pedophiles. But all he's done is expose _himself_ (which, tbh, just made me throw up a little in my mouth).
Trump hung out with Epstein. He sexualized his _own daughter,_ calling her a "piece of ass." He let her rub elbows with predators, including Epstein. And, yes, he once bragged about telling Ivanka when she was 17 that she was the cutoff age for who he'd date. But that as she was aging he was _" running out of options."_
**Let that stink in.**
And we won't go into the, what, 28 women who accused him of sexual assault, the 13-yr old girl who sued him for rape, and dropped the case worried about her safety or the fact that in a civil court a judge "adjudicated him a rapist." Or that he owned beauty pageants to peep in on teen girls' changing (letting Trump own a beauty pageant's like letting _Breaking Bad 's _Heisenberg own a cold-medicine company).
`Independent Media Just .26/day W/ Paid-Subscription Benefits!`
_**Weekly Substack AMA w/ Cliff & David, video posted [for paid subscribers](https://substack.com/redirect/5613823f-fd9f-458d-9269-2c3e36eb7d52?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)! Starting next week!**_
_**Insider stories in regular columns or videos, live shout-outs to new paid members, behind the scenes video/pics from oru livestreams, video production, etc, and a lottery for free merch**_
_**Ability to comment on all content and send us DMs (starting next week)**_
_**Support our Soundcheck Fund, create an ecosystem of indy media/creators to[save democracy](https://substack.com/redirect/5613823f-fd9f-458d-9269-2c3e36eb7d52?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.8dsMJC-6T-qFDfMU4byuN9y3KGF9FS-ja77H7EnU9x8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=169055123)
Donald Trump is a human mirror held up to the[ worst corners of our culture](https://substack.com/redirect/166a0aa5-bbd1-4e3f-a01d-03e30c9f1b36?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and human nature--the parts that hide behind private school gates, priest collars or country club memberships. And what he reflects isn't just _him_. It's _us_. Or rather, what we've _allowed_ to happen behind closed doors.
I attended a private school in New York City, Horace Mann, that had exactly this kind of abuse scandal. One of the culprits recruited me to the school (he recruited athletes, I was a sprinter, soccer player, etc.). Another was my music teacher. I never saw either of them do anything, but there were always rumors.
My high school, as is too often the case, chose to "hire their own investigator," a blatant conflict of interest. [Just another powerful institution betraying our trust](https://substack.com/redirect/aa3f27c4-d030-4fd0-b0a9-c4a887aabe5f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), surrounded by wealth and protecting itself (btw, one of HM's haughty competitors was The Dalton School, where Jeffrey Epstein got his start as a teacher).
The moral of this story is that we've tolerated this rot for WAY too long. Power protects power. But suddently Trump's played into age-old stereotypes, scared the bejesus outta his followers for years to get them bonded into MAGA, only now to say "you're on your own with all the predators I told you are out there!"
But now the files are coming due. And the biggest name they're delivering is _his,_ which is why he's frantic to shut this down _._[Trump is cornered by his own bullshit](https://substack.com/redirect/c0442bea-5830-4434-8fbe-fdd32c5cd4e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). He promised Obama. He promised them Clinton. And all he can find is _himself_.
The internal hemorrhoid played with fire, and it seems, perhaps for once, he's the one who got burned.
A right-wing-media influencer he helped create, and walking-talking forensic report on lead-poisoning IQ collapse, Candace Owens, just told her huge audience (i.e. his base--that he "thinks you're stupid." Stewart Rhodes, [Jan 6th Oath Keeper](https://substack.com/redirect/0e86b3c8-a923-4411-91e9-57463d57a9f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Trump pardoned, just said Trump would be in "trouble" if he doesn't come clean.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b89a241f-b047-40b4-ae42-55b231adb9ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dunno about you, but I wouldn't want a guy who violently attacked the Capitol saying I'm in "trouble."But, this is Trump. So all I can manage is: what's for dinner again?
Let him rot in the trap he set. Let the damn files see some transparent rays of sunshine. body:
Dear Peter –

Donald Trump’s second presidency has been nothing short of chaotic and downright disgraceful to the American people.

My friend, Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren, is continuing to fight back for our democracy and the Constitution – something Donald Trump knows nothing about.

That’s why Trump-loyalists like Roger Stone have been making false attacks on Zoe’s character, name, and record to try to tarnish her reputation.

So now more than ever, we need to have Zoe’s back as she continues standing up to Trump and fighting for everyday Americans, while Trump only puts the interest of himself and his friends first.
Peter , will you join me in supporting Zoe in her ongoing fight against Trump and to protect our democracy?

Donate Now >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q32025?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-07-23_ADK_ZOL_ES-28344_RS&amount=25]

If we want to save our democracy from Trump 2.0, we must continue to support and elect leaders like Zoe and others like her across the country.

I refuse to be part of the generation that lets democracy die under our watch, Peter.

Zoe has always fought to protect our democracy, something that is more at risk than ever these days. So please join me in supporting Zoe today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q32025?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-07-03_ADK_ZOL_ES-27001_RS&amount=25]

subject: Guess what we just found…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Some 2026 candidates are already hiding their true loyalties from voters...

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250723?refcode=em20250723-36870&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36870_1203867_S50H-p&akid=36870%2E1203867%2ES50H-p ]Post on X from Usamah Andrabi (@usamahandrabi). The post reads: 'Guess
what else I found hidden on this corporate primary challenger's website:
georgehornedo.com/crypto. Seems like the 2 highest spending lobbies in Dem
primaries (AIPAC & Crypto) are encouraging candidates to (quietly) promise
loyalty in exchange for unlimited Super PAC support.' Below that is a
quoted post from @JesseForIndy, which reads: 'George Hornedo has a secret
page on his website that shows how he really feels about Israel and
Palestine:' The image below shows part of a webpage titled ISRAEL POLICY.

One candidate’s website includes not one, but TWO hidden pages showing his
unconditional support for the Israeli military and government as well as
the Crypto lobby. A clear attempt to signal his loyalty to AIPAC and and
Crypto-backed super PACs to ensure their multimillion dollar backing.

The Crypto and Israel lobbies were the biggest spenders in 2024’s election
cycle, and it’s clear they’re already gearing up to dump more money than
ever into the upcoming 2026 races.

These groups buy votes in Congress on both sides of the aisle using war
chests fueled by far-right billionaires. This is why we’re seeing massive
Crypto giveaway bills getting passed, while efforts to hold Israel
accountable for its genocide of Palestinians are constantly defeated.

Candidates know these policies aren’t popular with voters, which is why
they’re going to these lengths: they can send direct links of these
website pages to their super PAC donors while hiding them from the public
eye.

We can only expect more of this as long as lobby groups like AIPAC and
Crypto-backed super PACs are allowed to flood our elections with unlimited
sums of dark money, pulling the strings on our leaders in Washington.

But organized people CAN beat organized money: we’ve proven it by building
a grassroots-powered movement to elect progressive champions like Rashida
Tlaib, Ilhan Omar, and Summer Lee.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250723?refcode=em20250723-36870&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36870_1203867_S50H-p&akid=36870%2E1203867%2ES50H-p ]Help us take on AIPAC and Crypto in the 2026 cycle: pitch in
your first
donation of $5 to fuel our midterm candidate recruitment
now!

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250723?refcode=em20250723-36870&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36870_1203867_S50H-p&akid=36870%2E1203867%2ES50H-p ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats
